| **_NRSC MEMO_**
**From:** NRSC Chairman Rick Scott
**Date:** July 23, 2022
**Subject:** The border is secure???

Peter,

It’s just the latest example of how truly dishonest and out-of-touch the Biden Democrats really are.

At a recent security forum, **Joe Biden’s** radical Homeland Security Secretary **Alejandro Mayorkas** was asked about the chaotic crisis at the border with the astounding declaration that _"the border is secure"_!!!

**__Secure?__** It would be if it weren’t so dangerous and downright untrue. Secretary Mayorkas will never admit it, because the Democrats are determined to make permanent their open-border policies, but the last thing our southern border with Mexico should be described as is _"secure."_

In fact, Peter, the situation - _and the numbers_ - keep getting worse.

**[Help the NRSC Support Nationwide GOP Senate Victories and hold the Biden Democrats Accountable for Their FAILURE to Secure the Border!](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=09c93141d017451ba01c617bbf398a48&_e=oDHFtaFXjkuc1jYL_9eNBzpSrcO6SZY9VCdSk4TCvFrv62VlJVhIkukCLy5UBGLEfGGgVLueguN90CLJrnqwMnuQBVkwu3bWuhcc6ROCieVM2Cf0iYPmmUc_6zz7SoYeAIiiLwtnUfX-IyF0RhgQFNRYr0dpZQQLSKdwr6s6HzpOo6423dO-xWDS99jxlpYHAqdD0okQ2-yXw7ejCVwqzrNU9jor6gzGl3PZK71n_YuLrKdxlp0GxhO2N6MosvsqnIjOQvQvn8yrzdaAWQw4dYVyfQvHL3oHPCkKm6elHk2V7CXR5-GUMoE9Rfj3D7wIxZ9MG1YmTjwlP130TZSSqfhdMoBahdmSVyROnofjBItF28S8tVtz9fwDQsHrmxyHCE1lnBJQuuQmQ1Oj58ZXXLVVll32VhAcCKNdTdVpTbsIS5J_hEChPUi6FJRJ8y1PDIzdcqo-Ip95cJwjIhJKnowSEQHeRUhDRTjjPVbdc7MKtnSmhm2aKErrVOntzk_3)**
What would we expect after Democrats rolled back the Trump-era Migrant Protection Protocols, slashed Immigration and Customs Enforcement efforts, stopped construction of President Trump’s wall, and made it easier for foreigners breaking our laws and infiltrating our border to remain in the United States?

As _Fox News_ points out, there have been more than 200,000 encounters with migrants per month the last four months, totaling more than 1,746,000 total encounters for this fiscal year - already more than in fiscal year 2021 - **with over three months left to go in FY’22!**

**[Help the NRSC Support Nationwide GOP Senate Victories and hold the Biden Democrats Accountable for Their FAILURE to Secure the Border!](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=09c93141d017451ba01c617bbf398a48&_e=oDHFtaFXjkuc1jYL_9eNBzpSrcO6SZY9VCdSk4TCvFrv62VlJVhIkukCLy5UBGLEfGGgVLueguN90CLJrnqwMnuQBVkwu3bWuhcc6ROCieVM2Cf0iYPmmUc_6zz7SoYeAIiiLwtnUfX-IyF0RhgQFNRYr0dpZQQLSKdwr6s6HzpOo6423dO-xWDS99jxlpYHAqdD0okQ2-yXw7ejCVwqzrNU9jor6gzGl3PZK71n_YuLrKdxlp0GxhO2N6MosvsqnIjOQvQvn8yrzdaAWQw4dYVyfQvHL3oHPCkKm6elHk1s_xSuflGgKodJq69QKowhZFbdhey7gGY-A2ArvV38AD9KXyCeEU4--bf8lP8nDNRLwhT-SfwsigGnv7OKqwUUW2A-Pb9P9pwO20Qx8IXnbGtX4rK0m0PGQ8ujC3UBofZY4qUv7ZRgRX_kn07MvSREDhgb2m2ymXCxFy29ps9jD3AyVMm83GfE4J9mfu95DREKtdDlBDK_8ZazQ8vd2QK-)**
Untold numbers of successful illegal border crossings continue to bring deadly drugs, gang violence, sex trafficking, terrorist infiltration and unaccompanied minors - and though Mayorkas as least acknowledges it’s an _"historic challenge,"_ Democrats are totally unwilling to meet it and protect our country and people - their efforts are quite the opposite!

It’s totally unacceptable - **and it’s just more confirmation how critically important it is to defeat the Democrats in the rapidly approaching 2022 Midterm Elections** - _and win a new Republican U.S. Senate Majority on Capitol Hill._

**[Help the NRSC Support Nationwide GOP Senate Victories and hold the Biden Democrats Accountable for Their FAILURE to Secure the Border!](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=09c93141d017451ba01c617bbf398a48&_e=oDHFtaFXjkuc1jYL_9eNBzpSrcO6SZY9VCdSk4TCvFrv62VlJVhIkukCLy5UBGLEfGGgVLueguN90CLJrnqwMnuQBVkwu3bWuhcc6ROCieVM2Cf0iYPmmUc_6zz7SoYeAIiiLwtnUfX-IyF0RhgQFNRYr0dpZQQLSKdwr6s6HzpOo6423dO-xWDS99jxlpYHAqdD0okQ2-yXw7ejCVwqzrNU9jor6gzGl3PZK71n_YuLrKdxlp0GxhO2N6MosvsqnIjOQvQvn8yrzdaAWQw4dYVyfQvHL3oHPCkKm6elHk0duECrDb1iKdmMYJVA8JYS-7u_eq7ajEpTCSROaknSz9lI3WcM2x1KTEA2MqLKxBNPUOEJQpiRu9ZaFUVQqAmqsd20c4-KVH3flNpnd7o7ETCz_rdnXb7kmn88PGK15ZI6A1P389OeXWE98pRWb7dsHPx_EnHQV_H3JY66pmt5urvdgSmfSBuXoFsXOwkIv1ho0TVsO9doVKIB9pvIyddz)**
**The National Republican Senatorial Committee(NRSC) is doing everything we can do support our strong on the border GOP candidates** to do just that, but we’re being massively outraised by the Democrats and their elite open borders bankrollers.

Peter, we only need to pick up one additional seat to flip the Senate, and we’re counting on grassroots conservatives like you who want to make our border truly _"secure"_ to help make it happen.

**[Will you step forward now with a generous contribution of $10, $20, or even more now to ensure our tremendous GOP Senate candidates can get their winning message to the voters and secure a crucial victory for real border security in November?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=09c93141d017451ba01c617bbf398a48&_e=oDHFtaFXjkuc1jYL_9eNBzpSrcO6SZY9VCdSk4TCvFrv62VlJVhIkukCLy5UBGLEfGGgVLueguN90CLJrnqwMnuQBVkwu3bWuhcc6ROCieVM2Cf0iYPmmUc_6zz7SoYeAIiiLwtnUfX-IyF0RhgQFNRYr0dpZQQLSKdwr6s6HzpOo6423dO-xWDS99jxlpYHAqdD0okQ2-yXw7ejCVwqzrNU9jor6gzGl3PZK71n_YuLrKdxlp0GxhO2N6MosvsqnIjOQvQvn8yrzdaAWQw4dYVyfQvHL3oHPCkKm6elHk1BvMxYcnBJkupO0QiqNLGHWOoj1Hcfq1WvNOQQvXwvDaKtVnopha0jt2_ohTE7nRVfEtLnUDqKizJrFzSOZgR0kbOZqX8lKtPUg0viwttyVjfDHJ5tWy1RENVvZ_tI2X5zT9gfQK3ZJIOdLB3ovZnuKq3WZfGPJrGojdNctuvDTm0UVo1TY0jGuvgavn0djRn-mj4pTHq0WS50Oz9Qkedo)**

Chairman Rick Scott

body:

---
Fellow American,

A new article from _Axios_ , discussing recent financial reports filed by Senate candidates across the country, is setting off alarms. This line from the article summarizes the situation:

| _**"Fundraising issues...are contributing to the chance of a Republican Senate debacle despite the enviable political environment."**_
---

You read that correctly. The "Red Wave" we've all been hearing about may turn out to be a "debacle" in the Senate because Democrats are outraising Republicans by such huge margins.

The article mentions OUR CAMPAIGN and has this to say:

_**"Even the GOP's best small-dollar performers are being swamped by huge grassroots backing on the other side."**_
---

While we've raised $8 million in small dollar donations since we launched our campaign 11 months ago, our Democrat opponent has raised $28 million. 😧

[** Help Close the Fundraising Gap

When the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , top analysts warned us that the right to use contraception could be next -- **so Democrats are acting _decisively_ to stop the GOP from targeting yet another fundamental freedom.**

**But team, nearly 200 Republicans in Congress just voted _against_ protecting Americans' access to contraception!**
With Republicans and far-right justices like Clarence Thomas _already_ teaming up to threaten even more of our rights, it's NEVER been more important to act.

We've launched an urgent Live Poll to PROVE to voters that Democrats are fighting to protect our right to use contraception -- _but the poll closes at 11:59 PM and we’re MISSING your response!_

**Tell us now:**
**Should Congress act to protect access to contraception?**

With time running out before the midnight fundraising deadline, we need to raise another $1,386 to keep our new TV ad on the air. **Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. | | Next week is all about motivating reluctant voters. Can you help?

| | From Monday July 25th to Friday July 29th, there will be DAILY door-to-door outreach, phone and text banking out of the Yakima Democrats office at 402 S 3rd St in Yakima.

Campaign members will be available from 8am to 4pm DAILY to assist volunteers in getting out the vote.

Canvassing will continue from 5-8pm nightly.If you can't make it to Yakima, email [campaignmanager@dougwhite4congress.us](https://www.dougwhite4congress.us/so/57O8kBIvP/c?w=v02k4Hxmu8eXgffqTSWqzgxxpJT6uh91P6r0Aa6UmU0.eyJ1IjoibWFpbHRvOmNhbXBhaWdubWFuYWdlckBkb3Vnd2hpdGU0Y29uZ3Jlc3MudXMiLCJyIjoiYzdiYWI5MzMtOTJhNi00OTliLWYyZTMtMzQ5MzViODY2ZmVjIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMDQ5NmZmZTAtYzBiYS00NjA2LTk5ODYtYzI4MDM3ZThkMTU1In0) to learn about how you can help from a distance.

Let's knock the socks off the opposition by turning out the biggest primary vote this district has seen!

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Peter, I wanted to share a memory with you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
|
---
| | | Peter, I wanted to share a memory with you.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862481:J0PJ7sVpN:m:1:3253819041:9216AE62ADB6AB59834847416D72BB9D:r)
---
(^that's me with Senators John Thune and Ron Johnson)
I visited Wisconsin in 2016 during Ron's last campaign. I saw firsthand there -- and in the U.S. Senate -- that Ron is a tough conservative who puts Americans first. He beat the odds in that campaign and won handily.

Now, Ron is facing another tough battle to keep Wisconsin **RED**. He's been named the most vulnerable Republican this election cycle and Democrats have already dumped _$40 MILLION_ into Wisconsin to defeat him.

Just as I didn't sit on the sidelines in 2016, I'm not going to do so now. We cannot afford to lose Ron Johnson in the U.S. Senate, but Ron can't win without YOU standing with him in this fight.
** **
**_[So, Peter, can I ask you to chip in now to help Ron beat the odds and win again?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862481:J0PJ7sVpN:m:1:3253819041:9216AE62ADB6AB59834847416D72BB9D:r "So, Peter, can I ask you to chip in now to help Ron beat the odds and win again?")_**

---
| | | [STAND WITH RON >> ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862481:J0PJ7sVpN:m:1:3253819041:9216AE62ADB6AB59834847416D72BB9D:r "STAND WITH RON >> ")
---

I'm not giving up on Ron, and you shouldn't either, Peter. Stand with us now.

---

WITH RON >> ")
---

In service,

Tom Cotton

A note from Ron Johnson: America is in peril. President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches: this is a fight for freedom. **This is not someone else 's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.****As a grandpa, dad, and businessman, I refuse to lose our country to radicals and woke liberals with their socialist agenda. I refuse to jeopardize America's future. I know you feel the same.

_**[**Can I personally ask you to join me in this fight for Freedom, Peter?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862482:J0PJ7sVpN:m:1:3253819041:9216AE62ADB6AB59834847416D72BB9D:r "Can I personally ask you to join me in this fight for Freedom, Peter?")**_**

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Stop kids from going "Woke"
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
Fellow American, Every year, I criss-cross the country for Turning Point USA and speak with THOUSANDS of our patriotic student activists. When I'm on campus or at our national student events, I often ask for a show of hands for all those who have been discriminated against because they are not part of a protected class of people. _And nearly every hand is raised!_ This is wrong -- and, no matter what the D.C. Swamp and Fake News Media tell you, it is UNCONSTITUTIONAL and ILLEGAL. **It's time for "Woke" schools and businesses to be held accountable IN COURT by the young people who have been hurt by the Left's so-called Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) policies.** That's why Turning Point USA has launched a NEW, EXCITING partnership with America First Legal to help TPUSA students take "Woke" authorities to court and WIN in defense of the Constitution, Equality, and Justice. [**Can I count on you to support us in this critical fight with your gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now?**](http://trk.readactnews._gLSUHlcyd6Yjkjbnw)
---
[**Stop the "Woke" agenda**](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
**"Woke" activists are using their power in tech, business, and education to brainwash an ENTIRE GENERATION of young Americans to believe that:** -> School programs, from dorms to graduations, segregated by skin color, sexual orientation, or gender are "celebrating diversity" -> Forcing Americans of faith to violate their consciences and moral values or risk losing _everything_ is "freedom of speech" -> Workplace hiring policies that don't treat all job candidates equally, regardless of what they look like or where they come from, are "progress toward equity" _And every day, the Leftists Power-That-Be harm hard-working young people's futures with their racist, sexist, illegal, and unconstitutional "Woke" policies ... while using their control in Education, the Mainstream Media, and Big Business to force everyone else into silence._ You and I know the truth -- and we won't be silenced. **These "Woke" DEI policies are wrong. They're un-American. They're also illegal.** [**And with your urgently needed support of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, or more today, Fellow American, we can fight back against "Woke" policies and in defense of our Constitutional Rights.**](http://trk.readactnews.-XSada5NKtVg)
---
[**Stop the "Woke" agenda**](http://trk.readactnews._g)
---
I'm urgently asking for YOUR support to help me EDUCATE, MOBILIZE, and ACTIVATE Turning Point USA's 500,000+ student activists to work with America First Legal in this fight. [**Can I count on you to chip in $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, or more today to support our cause? Any amount you're able to give will make a difference.**](http://trk.readactnews._hxlkXMavQXIcHJPZnE7QA) The hateful schemes of the radical Left can't survive an impartial judge who's faithful to the Constitution ... and each victory for our TPUSA students' rights will bring us closer to ending the Leftist takeover of our country for good.
---
[**Stop the "Woke" agenda**](http://trk.readactnews._gpWkamQ)
---
Our country was founded on the principle that you are defined by your own character, by your own achievements, and by your own decisions. With your support today, we will restore Liberty _and Justice_ for all!
---
For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
[**Support Turning Point USA**](http://trk.readactnews._R-Ow60wYegD27d7b0w)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.readactnews.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIyMDUtMzY3MTFmODM5M2U0NGY4NWIyN2IzOTI5MzYyMTA1MjMiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2V9/Z23n91oLL7GyCC5c1X9sAQ) to unsubscribe.

Dear Friends:
I am excited to invite you to an evening of insightful conversation and a book signing with former Congressman, CIA Officer and now author of a new book called "American Reboot: An Idealist's Guide To Getting Big Things Done", Will Hurd.
This Monday evening, July 25th, at 7 PM, please join me at the Offices of McGuireWoods LLP, 1750 Tysons Blvd., Suite 1800, McLean, VA 22102 to meet and speak with Will.
In his book, Will discusses how as our Nation grows more diverse, our engagement with minority communities is paramount to turn the country around from the progressive socialist direction the Democrats are pushing. Diverse communities share our conservative values but the GOP has had a challenge connecting with minority voters.
I am enthusiastic to join with my good friend and the former Prince William County Republican Chairman, Tim Parrish, in support of Right Appeal PAC's efforts dedicated to diverse engagement for the GOP.
Please join us by purchasing tickets for this event, or even better, sponsoring the program by following the link [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iJyTEIWcLJh-GpTmevn9wsiUS7WP-lz76DbzSRSimwc_4Vix3TeoZr4gemVr1j-rvqFHmJprixNDApCWSUbeuliq3X0OwzopelyumIcX_TJsE1AZhzIj4-83-5NW0DqsIvDMrsphUYcbtYDOeBWuu6Z_aOzOQDd1o-Dw6Of5gYsJ_wNmrJoRdA0foAYyK_h4-m3DMODkug8=&c=vvoh5C1WlCaapJ_A6H2Rf7Rp5ggBLIiOYd3XD-4qk-PUdnR2e0-f-w==&ch=yfC6lowHs4cIutXWyiLblDaYt8Qk6og4GFae_ewsGzfkSM3laeECDQ==).
Thank you again for all the support you provided to me in my campaign and I am truly excited about our ability to win numerous congressional seats this Fall and flip to a sensible Republican majority in the House and Senate. Key will be building our support in the diverse communities across Virginia!
May God Bless, Caleb
---

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Humbly asking you to read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I’d like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zb2fj19c2p9p2tn1g42t7ulrejiag79tnocl5as8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4ongedh61cb1maqb2plgcdhmcdth65on0ptlc8rb2or269gj5cr1e4precjjegpm0puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6ccdn6kpm0shmcopb9ddgcuobapbi46h22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6p75c1h2bs)

|
---
| | | Friend,

I'd like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out. I know I've been emailing, texting, and calling more than normal right now, but I need to reach my goal by midnight and need you to listen to me.

I hope you know me to be an honest man of integrity, so I thought I'd take a second to walk you through why I'm running for office and why this deadline means so much.

---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zoijvrbl9bjmq717iabq0kt5qoaq1dg5v85e0jr0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6p75c1h2bs "2")
---

This is a photo of my dad (of course wearing a Miami Dolphins shirt). He was the best role model for being a father, a friend, and an American.

He and my mom thankfully came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba to a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to stay put in America and get to work to achieve the American Dream.

---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zc8o0447door1lam1lv4843b44e77br6ad6amc0g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6p75c1h2bs "1")
---

Eventually, my sister and I became first generation college graduates, and while we had to take on student loans to do so, we knew the work ethic our parents instilled would help us pay them down once we graduated.

I met my wife Jeanette through mutual friends and we got married in 1998. We started our beautiful family of four kids: Amanda, Daniella, Anthony, and Dominick. We eventually adopted two dogs, Winston and Arthur (who I found with my laptop typing some emails to you recently...).

---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgra4ncpdt9quc1vi13607bfgbk0htfahm0gat9g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6p75c1h2bs "3")
---

All jokes aside, being a father to my wonderful kids is by far my favorite and most important job, and I will never take that for granted.

I first ran for Senate because I saw what Barack Obama and Joe Biden's policies were doing to families like mine. More families were living paycheck to paycheck at the expense of tax-and-spend Democrats. My parents taught me to work if I wanted to make a change, so that's exactly what I did.

My dad never got to see me become a U.S. Senator in the country he immigrated to in order to make a better life for us, but I carry his work ethic and family values with me every day in the Senate to honor him, and now, I'm teaching my kids exactly what he taught me.

---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlj8d7ricv95uvvb3cgn2emf9f5159p3bimqphcg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6p75c1h2bs "4")
---

After seeing the dysfunction in Washington firsthand, I decided to run for President so I could bring my passion for America to the White House. My loving family was right by my side, and I couldn't have been more grateful for their support.

I wanted to stop Hillary Clinton at all costs, and eventually, that meant dropping out of the race and working with Donald Trump to win. Throughout his term, we worked on pro-family and pro-veteran bills to make America great and restore the American Dream.

---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbom88csk9f3ee92u9vcavcnva69t8aahg8omtrg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6p75c1h2bs "5")
---

This brings me to my main point: I'm running for Senate because I will never stop fighting to restore the American Dream.

I feel so blessed looking through these photos, and I wanted to share them with you so you can understand where I am coming from.

Reaching these deadlines may seem like a fundraising ploy, but this is real. **If we 're outraised again, that will be a major step back in our fight to restore the American Dream.**
**[I hope you'll make a donation today and join this fight before my deadline:](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zh98hj8ko5k5cig3ukqh161l7qrg15v2s9g9sp9g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6p75c1h2bs "I hope you’ll make a donation today and join this fight before my deadline:")**
---
| | | [I'LL JOIN YOU, MARCO!](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztd50ue6698g2ukup7d28cvkllac5242u10csc98_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6p75c1h2bs "I'LL JOIN YOU, MARCO!")
---
Thank you so much for taking the time to read this,

Marco Rubio
---
| | | | |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7k4v6er9tbbs8h4l9hlk35vddcss9mn5lioep3o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6p75c1h2bs "Footer Graphic 1")
---
I talk to folks every day who say they haven't donated because they think they need to write a big check or they think my race isn't close.

Well, let me tell you, this race will be decided on a razor-thin margin. Currently, we're only separated by 2%, but considering the MILLIONS my opponent is raising, she could easily take the lead after smearing me in new campaign ads.

With such a tight race, any amount donated today can make a difference.

**[Please, can you give $4, 8, $12.55, or $17 today?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zogvdst8ieo6sggqo5j1mmbm7qpnjcn7rc4c54tg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6p75c1h2bs "Please, can you give $4, 8, $12.55, or $17 today?")**

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: The state of America’s energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9qjgvrt0g9d67erh4kbtcs0hshm1l821jmr4u5o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6o76cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t31m3gm4dhicqrb4s3kcqp3adb469hm9pr7maorapdkm4pr2s3hc9in3d376uo6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p30pjh6iqr6ptncdj30s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zng74bfmuk4t5af5fvq71hasuj9clb1e57r6b0tg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6o76cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family.
---
| | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlia4rjr5j5m0vvqp7voq5jvgvhu6il8qn81kr5g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6o76cph2bs)
---
[**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr81itp6kpp61hk3pudjk8dqpha6j2o9oi93eps8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6o76cph2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjt78b068l6tq90l2gh3rlee36mc5t57bevvqbl8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6o76cph2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Humbly asking you to read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I’d like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl0r64ufqlodn7gitnkdk9ljue8448g1dn0p7u38_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6o77cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tbj6uqm3cb3clob6dhjeupn9d9gs3ij1pb4cpqjcddj65r65dpm69g7as336drrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33dpl6dg74dj66phbbdhnm2qmash5u)

|
---
| | | Friend,

I'd like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out. I know I've been emailing, texting, and calling more than normal right now, but I need to reach my goal by midnight and need you to listen to me.

I hope you know me to be an honest man of integrity, so I thought I'd take a second to walk you through why I'm running for office and why this deadline means so much.

---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi8123bars7q3ql8e2h9ls89dq25qehk51ml7b38_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6o77cph2bs)
---

This is a photo of my dad (of course wearing a Miami Dolphins shirt). He was the best role model for being a father, a friend, and an American.

He and my mom thankfully came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba to a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to stay put in America and get to work to achieve the American Dream.

---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq44v7kvk4m42jkn3eunnergua2hb1qk27960c0o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6o77cph2bs)
---

Eventually, my sister and I became first generation college graduates, and while we had to take on student loans to do so, we knew the work ethic our parents instilled would help us pay them down once we graduated.

I met my wife Jeanette through mutual friends and we got married in 1998. We started our beautiful family of four kids: Amanda, Daniella, Anthony, and Dominick. We eventually adopted two dogs, Winston and Arthur (who I found with my laptop typing some emails to you recently...).

---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp31ntbvc43kj45paibgbu6rainjibsh647a7q7g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6o77cph2bs)
---

All jokes aside, being a father to my wonderful kids is by far my favorite and most important job, and I will never take that for granted.

I first ran for Senate because I saw what Barack Obama and Joe Biden's policies were doing to families like mine. More families were living paycheck to paycheck at the expense of tax-and-spend Democrats. My parents taught me to work if I wanted to make a change, so that's exactly what I did.

My dad never got to see me become a U.S. Senator in the country he immigrated to in order to make a better life for us, but I carry his work ethic and family values with me every day in the Senate to honor him, and now, I'm teaching my kids exactly what he taught me.

---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvvc3msnq2r111j1fduinb5snv89nf7sphvhiuv8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6o77cph2bs)
---

After seeing the dysfunction in Washington firsthand, I decided to run for President so I could bring my passion for America to the White House. My loving family was right by my side, and I couldn't have been more grateful for their support.

I wanted to stop Hillary Clinton at all costs, and eventually, that meant dropping out of the race and working with Donald Trump to win. Throughout his term, we worked on pro-family and pro-veteran bills to make America great and restore the American Dream.

---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8f1c1ptovtq06snql6cpcjpjg2jurbu7t2nibkg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6o77cph2bs)
---

This brings me to my main point: I'm running for Senate because I will never stop fighting to restore the American Dream.

I feel so blessed looking through these photos, and I wanted to share them with you so you can understand where I am coming from.

Reaching these deadlines may seem like a fundraising ploy, but this is real. **If we 're outraised again, that will be a major step back in our fight to restore the American Dream.**
**[I hope you'll make a donation today and join this fight before my deadline:](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z26gccqafpcs0i3s2lb712n0hlv69ddso9cod1fg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6o77cph2bs)**
---
| | | [I'LL JOIN YOU, MARCO!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg6sok1r1nnt7s2c6jogl8n17jid5rijqv9q1lq8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6o77cph2bs)
---
Thank you so much for taking the time to read this,

Marco Rubio
---
| | | | |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhmnqkr3jhpgq4oqjskfefvilmsgbouu3p3p1ak0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6o77cph2bs)
---
I talk to folks every day who say they haven't donated because they think they need to write a big check or they think my race isn't close.

Well, let me tell you, this race will be decided on a razor-thin margin. Currently, we're only separated by 2%, but considering the MILLIONS my opponent is raising, she could easily take the lead after smearing me in new campaign ads.

With such a tight race, any amount donated today can make a difference.

**[Please, can you give $4, 8, $12.55, or $17 today?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrthitsh5ni5e0n6q2bfcdlu525c0ppev8uqvou8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6o77cph2bs)**

name: Ron Johnson
subject: I am asking you 👉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
|

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Humbly asking you to read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I’d like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1il4etlh3n4e0uaqvl3k5emjvd5fkngu45u8720_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uqp62ppnmpgecp31mhr66obh6jh7ep5gmkom4t72eco62tpjeson4pb1mtg79o37q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhmsqj6o3i6pj3co5lm5jr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5c3hmaor0sdh649fg)

|
---
| | | Friend,

I'd like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out. I know I've been emailing, texting, and calling more than normal right now, but I need to reach my goal by midnight and need you to listen to me.

I hope you know me to be an honest man of integrity, so I thought I'd take a second to walk you through why I'm running for office and why this deadline means so much.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z140gkve4hmlsev74ms29i1k24ogkqmm1qrikkp8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6o73c9h2bs "2")
---

This is a photo of my dad (of course wearing a Miami Dolphins shirt). He was the best role model for being a father, a friend, and an American.

He and my mom thankfully came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba to a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to stay put in America and get to work to achieve the American Dream.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaudj2fkq6s9sc9v5db85tuhfspe51sj17ueeh08_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6o73c9h2bs "1")
---

Eventually, my sister and I became first generation college graduates, and while we had to take on student loans to do so, we knew the work ethic our parents instilled would help us pay them down once we graduated.

I met my wife Jeanette through mutual friends and we got married in 1998. We started our beautiful family of four kids: Amanda, Daniella, Anthony, and Dominick. We eventually adopted two dogs, Winston and Arthur (who I found with my laptop typing some emails to you recently...).

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjd2c8qhn53v1oq649mjbbfdp8ffnob11bho875g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6o73c9h2bs "3")
---

All jokes aside, being a father to my wonderful kids is by far my favorite and most important job, and I will never take that for granted.

I first ran for Senate because I saw what Barack Obama and Joe Biden's policies were doing to families like mine. More families were living paycheck to paycheck at the expense of tax-and-spend Democrats. My parents taught me to work if I wanted to make a change, so that's exactly what I did.

My dad never got to see me become a U.S. Senator in the country he immigrated to in order to make a better life for us, but I carry his work ethic and family values with me every day in the Senate to honor him, and now, I'm teaching my kids exactly what he taught me.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8cl3bcbncqrlt9hndcrurrq6g8pkiak43u93fu0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6o73c9h2bs "4")
---

After seeing the dysfunction in Washington firsthand, I decided to run for President so I could bring my passion for America to the White House. My loving family was right by my side, and I couldn't have been more grateful for their support.

I wanted to stop Hillary Clinton at all costs, and eventually, that meant dropping out of the race and working with Donald Trump to win. Throughout his term, we worked on pro-family and pro-veteran bills to make America great and restore the American Dream.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh7jod9ct52cbsmvm98nno754le5er4jq429191o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6o73c9h2bs "5")
---

This brings me to my main point: I'm running for Senate because I will never stop fighting to restore the American Dream.

I feel so blessed looking through these photos, and I wanted to share them with you so you can understand where I am coming from.

Reaching these deadlines may seem like a fundraising ploy, but this is real. **If we 're outraised again, that will be a major step back in our fight to restore the American Dream.**
**[I hope you'll make a donation today and join this fight before my deadline:](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztb90u0q21mkrdg00saccpeuk1t8j0u6as07gmi8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6o73c9h2bs "I hope you’ll make a donation today and join this fight before my deadline:")**
---
| | | [I'LL JOIN YOU, MARCO!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcal329l365h2ibo3urr4ph43d33l4a68pbbo91g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6o73c9h2bs "I'LL JOIN YOU, MARCO!")
---
Thank you so much for taking the time to read this,

Marco Rubio
---
| | | | |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhhpk19n9t9do2r3h33kahugdq5a4qla478utvm0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6o73c9h2bs "Footer Graphic 1")
---
I talk to folks every day who say they haven't donated because they think they need to write a big check or they think my race isn't close.

Well, let me tell you, this race will be decided on a razor-thin margin. Currently, we're only separated by 2%, but considering the MILLIONS my opponent is raising, she could easily take the lead after smearing me in new campaign ads.

With such a tight race, any amount donated today can make a difference.

**[Please, can you give $4, 8, $12.55, or $17 today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5m4h1eecus1jq9q1rju3bg2b6tongqig06uujbo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6o73c9h2bs "Please, can you give $4, 8, $12.55, or $17 today?")**
---
| | | [DONATE NOW >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl6sg9s342hl94bthr57djapk8go52jvg2mrs8lg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6o73c9h2bs "DONATE NOW")
---
| | Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
---

PO Box 530650
Miami, FL 33153

[Privacy Policy](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqut3ibqf6si6vdpcqug35vh096q7139k5jto3tg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdim6o73c9h2bs)

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsgd7pd50i2iik0j1j548pk7q7k4i9b66eqpgvu0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or5c3hmaor0sdh649fg)

name: Kristi Noem
subject: Here is one last chance to secure your exclusive signed copy! 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | 🚨🚨 **LAST AND FINAL CALL TO CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY** 🚨🚨

Hi there Peter,

This is your _**LAST AND FINAL CALL**_ to secure your signed copy of my new memoir, _Not My First Rodeo_! Because fewer than 50 signed copies remain!

Copies have been flying off the shelves, and we are down to our last box. I wish I could sign a copy for every conservative supporter, but sadly this exclusive offer must come to a close.

_**[So here is ONE LAST CHANCE to secure 1 of 50 remaining signed copies!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862498:J8gWcsV6N:m:1:3253819041:9B744DFE602057C380336FBDC9A8D2FF:r "So here is ONE LAST CHANCE to secure 1 of 50 remaining signed copies!")**_

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862498:J8gWcsV6N:m:1:3253819041:9B744DFE602057C380336FBDC9A8D2FF:r "Kristi Noem Book")
---

**_Not My First Rodeo_ by Kristi Noem**
---
| | | [CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862498:J8gWcsV6N:m:1:3253819041:9B744DFE602057C380336FBDC9A8D2FF:r "CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY")
---

From growing up on a ranch, to serving in Congress, and now leading my home state as Governor, I'll share with you the humorous stories and larger than life people who made me who I am today.

This memoir is incredibly important for every Conservative to read because America must return to the values my ranch upbringing instilled in me like: grit, hard work, and rugged individualism.
**_Not My First Rodeo_ by Kristi Noem**
---
| | | [CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862498:J8gWcsV6N:m:1:3253819041:9B744DFE602057C380336FBDC9A8D2FF:r "CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY")
---

_**[So get your signed copy today before we must end this offer for good.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862498:J8gWcsV6N:m:1:3253819041:9B744DFE602057C380336FBDC9A8D2FF:r "So get your
signed copy today before we must end this offer for good. ")**_

Thanks,

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862498:J8gWcsV6N:m:1:3253819041:9B744DFE602057C380336FBDC9A8D2FF:r "Kristi Noem Book")
---

Kristi Noem
Governor of South Dakota
---
| |
* * *

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862499:J8gWcsV6N:m:1:3253819041:9B744DFE602057C380336FBDC9A8D2FF:r "Can we count on
you to step up?")**
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

# NEW YORK'S CRIME CRISIS

| It was a bad end to the week for New York State. We tragically lost a Rochester police officer on Thursday night. My sincerest prayers go out to the fallen officer's loved ones, his injured colleague, and the Rochester Police Department. The violent attack on Congressman, and candidate for governor, Lee Zeldin was shocking and concerning. I am very relieved that Lee is okay, thanks to the quick action of those around him. Unfortunately, due to the radical pro-criminal policies of Albany Democrats, the attacker was released within hours of his arrest, not only endangering the victim, but all New Yorkers. This is why Lee Zeldin's campaign is so important to every New Yorker. Come November, we will enact real change to finally restore public safety and common sense in New York.
Sign the petition below and tell the Governor and One-Party-Rule politicians to repeal bail reform and put law-abiding citizens above criminals!

subject: This is your LAST AND FINAL CALL

body:
|
---
| | | 🚨🚨 **LAST AND FINAL CALL TO CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY** 🚨🚨

Hi there Peter,

This is your _**LAST AND FINAL CALL**_ to secure your signed copy of my new memoir, _Not My First Rodeo_! Because fewer than 50 signed copies remain!

Copies have been flying off the shelves, and we are down to our last box. I wish I could sign a copy for every conservative supporter, but sadly this exclusive offer must come to a close.

_**[So here is ONE LAST CHANCE to secure 1 of 50 remaining signed copies!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862510:JDGjJsV6N:m:1:3317145305:59D7615B86F97CC101FFECFC1B23C717:r "So here is ONE LAST CHANCE to secure 1 of 50 remaining signed copies!")**_

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862510:JDGjJsV6N:m:1:3317145305:59D7615B86F97CC101FFECFC1B23C717:r "Kristi Noem Book")
---

**_Not My First Rodeo_ by Kristi Noem**
---
| | | [CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862510:JDGjJsV6N:m:1:3317145305:59D7615B86F97CC101FFECFC1B23C717:r "CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY")
---

From growing up on a ranch, to serving in Congress, and now leading my home state as Governor, I'll share with you the humorous stories and larger than life people who made me who I am today.

This memoir is incredibly important for every Conservative to read because America must return to the values my ranch upbringing instilled in me like: grit, hard work, and rugged individualism.
**_Not My First Rodeo_ by Kristi Noem**
---
| | | [CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862510:JDGjJsV6N:m:1:3317145305:59D7615B86F97CC101FFECFC1B23C717:r "CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY")

signed copy today before we must end this offer for good. ")**_

Thanks,

Kristi Noem
Governor of South Dakota

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862511:JDGjJsV6N:m:1:3317145305:59D7615B86F97CC101FFECFC1B23C717:r "Can we count

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Humbly asking you to read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I’d like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6285%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=bwF32aFTI%2bQd8Ss78tNC%2bg&sysid=1)
I’d like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out.

|
---
| | | Friend,

I’d like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out. I know I’ve been emailing, texting, and calling more than normal right now, but I need to reach my goal by midnight and need you to listen to me.

I hope you know me to be an honest man of integrity, so I thought I’d take a second to walk you through why I’m running for office and why this deadline means so much.

---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64715%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rIcudpxIrLeHDwrCwj8B0g&sysid=1)
---

This is a photo of my dad (of course wearing a Miami Dolphins shirt). He was the best role model for being a father, a friend, and an American.

He and my mom thankfully came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba to a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to stay put in America and get to work to achieve the American Dream.

---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64715%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rIcudpxIrLeHDwrCwj8B0g&sysid=1)
---

Eventually, my sister and I became first generation college graduates, and while we had to take on student loans to do so, we knew the work ethic our parents instilled would help us pay them down once we graduated.

I met my wife Jeanette through mutual friends and we got married in 1998. We started our beautiful family of four kids: Amanda, Daniella, Anthony, and Dominick. We eventually adopted two dogs, Winston and Arthur (who I found with my laptop typing some emails to you recently...).

---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64715%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rIcudpxIrLeHDwrCwj8B0g&sysid=1)
---

All jokes aside, being a father to my wonderful kids is by far my favorite and most important job, and I will never take that for granted.

I first ran for Senate because I saw what Barack Obama and Joe Biden’s policies were doing to families like mine. More families were living paycheck to paycheck at the expense of tax-and-spend Democrats. My parents taught me to work if I wanted to make a change, so that’s exactly what I did.

My dad never got to see me become a U.S. Senator in the country he immigrated to in order to make a better life for us, but I carry his work ethic and family values with me every day in the Senate to honor him, and now, I’m teaching my kids exactly what he taught me.

---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64715%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rIcudpxIrLeHDwrCwj8B0g&sysid=1)
---

After seeing the dysfunction in Washington firsthand, I decided to run for President so I could bring my passion for America to the White House. My loving family was right by my side, and I couldn’t have been more grateful for their support.

I wanted to stop Hillary Clinton at all costs, and eventually, that meant dropping out of the race and working with Donald Trump to win. Throughout his term, we worked on pro-family and pro-veteran bills to make America great and restore the American Dream.

---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64715%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rIcudpxIrLeHDwrCwj8B0g&sysid=1)
---

This brings me to my main point: I’m running for Senate because I will never stop fighting to restore the American Dream.

I feel so blessed looking through these photos, and I wanted to share them with you so you can understand where I am coming from.

Reaching these deadlines may seem like a fundraising ploy, but this is real. **If we’re outraised again, that will be a major step back in our fight to restore the American Dream.**
**[I hope you’ll make a donation today and join this fight before my deadline:](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64716%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fm3c5hrmHK5lWgDvAVQyhQ&sysid=1)**
---
| | | [I'LL JOIN YOU, MARCO!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64717%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oRaiZlg8atN1EEWql00rRw&sysid=1)
---
Thank you so much for taking the time to read this,

Marco Rubio
---
| | | | |
* * *
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64718%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DeRX1eO8zyxkVXwnkop9mw&sysid=1)
---
I talk to folks every day who say they haven’t donated because they think they need to write a big check or they think my race isn’t close.

Well, let me tell you, this race will be decided on a razor-thin margin. Currently, we’re only separated by 2%, but considering the MILLIONS my opponent is raising, she could easily take the lead after smearing me in new campaign ads.

With such a tight race, any amount donated today can make a difference.

**[Please, can you give $4, 8, $12.55, or $17 today?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64719%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vhHUE1cHZsAT4e93T1Xlvg&sysid=1)**
---
| | | [DONATE NOW >> ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64710%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JagfaGFcG%2beOm8FqyOx5AA&sysid=1)
---
| Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
---

PO Box 530650
Miami, FL 33153

[Privacy Policy](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64711%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TmDhkH6dcs6adoxqqryPww&sysid=1)

_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6285%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=bwF32aFTI%2bQd8Ss78tNC%2bg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6285%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=bwF32aFTI%2bQd8Ss78tNC%2bg&sysid=1)

subject: It's time to make change
body:
In 1973, the U.S. Supreme Court decided the case Roe v. Wade. And since that day, more than 63 million babies have been killed t
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrdlrs0q57cu8pts4vgmqh89dmt4bshcl70h749g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqm6pjj6dqebdbnc6qr5d3gssq3edjkmkqb0sj0mhonctj0sapnadjgecrb2tjgcv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666rjacr7m9q6cd32mdh6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933clge6or1c1j62oh5u)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, In 1973, the U.S. Supreme Court decided the case Roe v. Wade. And since that day, more than 63 million babies have been killed through abortion in our country. It was the most destructive ruling in the history of our nation. And it led to an anti-life ideology that still infects America to this day. From what I've been told, you are someone who values and respects life in all its stages, and I'm guessing this makes you sick to your stomach just like it does to me. But the tide is changing, and that's why I asked if I could send you this email today. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zenrmcs3rjm5gmaojk22d1rp22d6s39crvclmi88_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdhm2o36c5h2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ The U.S. Supreme Court's decision to overturn Roe gives us a historic opportunity to rebuild a culture of life. The battle for life has returned to the states. And we have a lot of work to do. Because the laws and needs of each state vary, it will take a supercharged effort to fight for the protection of the unborn. But the American Cornerstone Institute is committed to providing resources to support pro-life efforts in each state. And that's why we need YOU! **Will you help rebuild a culture of life in states across America by making a tax-deductible gift today?** We have seen that the opposition is more hostile than ever now that the official decision has come down. We got a glimpse at those who are anti-life have reacted since the leak was made public. That's why we're asking you to give right now to help us fight back to protect life for the unborn with every tool at our disposal. So, please don't wait. You can make your tax-deductible gift to protect life in states across America using this secure link: **[https://secure.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-states-confirmation](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbpqmpf8plt982er2d7ilb4ukd4n07d1069vaqfo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdhm2o36c5h2bs)** Thank you so much for any support you can offer. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: BLM vs Blexit
body:
I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Matter. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9425%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Tqo41zieingYurOW3ANBUQ&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38428%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9hUuycPn%2fjtZ8gPfbbts5A&sysid=1)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America -_Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you’re thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, “what about them is influential?!”

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren’t, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That’s why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I’ll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38429%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DsBO0U4yF5zHNiqmQShrGQ&sysid=1)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the “Black Lives Matter” organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn’t have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I’m giving back to the Black community to make sure they don’t become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38420%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ltJJRPrlmElzNQdhwMdB0Q&sysid=1)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here’s how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38421%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=d2QZSqM6eMTwJ4DJhyMrHQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38422%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mtEFNrCiv71WdYR%2f7yY6wQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38423%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fFpM2bvMOCGLN7CmbNteyg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38424%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RjUuZhVzl%2fNsxK1IG1FjFA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38435%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rvEGYB0eRo2Rmqx3w6ZQDw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38436%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vTW2CYoFCLkTQ0QMiYrzAA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38437%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Rz6njHMDua20lz39C%2fqYBw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38438%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VC6fO7nLlZFOarD9ri6z9Q&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38439%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yB7fBZy9yew9ZO1hSRMQmA&sysid=1)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a “DO” tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

**So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. **

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38421%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=d2QZSqM6eMTwJ4DJhyMrHQ&sysid=1)

clean_body: I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Matter. Friend, I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America -Black Lives Matter. Now, I know what you’re thinking... What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis? I ask, “what about them is influential?!” This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities? No. They aren’t, but BLM is. BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations. I saw the hypocrisy long ago. That’s why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. BLEXIT is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I’ll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support. How I Started BLEXIT I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans. With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me. This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever. I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM. Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the “Black Lives Matter” organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn’t have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others. Now, I’m giving back to the Black community to make sure they don’t become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes. BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law. BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them. BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character. BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. Here’s how you can help: I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities. This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter. BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today: HOW BLEXIT Works Step One: We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods. Step Two: We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy. We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time. Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses. As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them. Step Three: Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media. BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families. Step Four: We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities. What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a “DO” tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods. Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man. We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods. So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. People ask me, “What does BLEXIT mean?” It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. “If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor.” - Candace Owens We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end. Thank you, Brandon Tatum Co-Founder BLEXIT Foundation 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: Share your thoughts on American energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum

Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3rhqbcone3gicsasgg9va8kj984pirjn9lli318_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdhm2o30sjh2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi1di8lp27j0egfb232tdg5i17vf3id6jp8vg2t8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdhm2o30sjh2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

---

name: Ron Johnson
subject: I need your support 🙏
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
|
---
| | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862569:Jh7_JsVN5:m:1:3299561967:658109C1F78FDB4D651FADB44D9090BE:r "Johnson0")
---
Patriot - I hate that I have to do this, but the Democrats have left me no other choice.

The Democrats are POURING money into Wisconsin at an insane rate. Since I announced in January, liberal groups have poured at least $10.5M into Wisconsin to kick me out of the Senate. Between the 11 Democrats that are running against me, they've raised $17.6M.
**THINGS.
DO.
NOT.
LOOK.
GOOD. **
I am running up against my first extended deadline of Quarter 2 and I am incredibly concerned about what happens if I don't meet my goals this time around. Wisconsin is going to be one of the TOP battleground states this cycle, **_CNN_** has even rated me the MOST vulnerable Republican running for re-election.

Here is what this means for you if we don't win this one:
1. Two MORE years of a **BLUE** majority in the Senate
2. More **RADICAL WOKE** policies to interfere with your life as an American
3. A perilous future for our children and grandchildren.

When I first ran for the Senate, I ran because I was a concerned father who did not want my children's future mortgaged on woke liberal policies. Now, as a grandfather, I am still worried because it seems our situation has gotten worse. America is in **PERIL**.

_**[If you want to save America, can I personally ask you to join me in the Fight for Freedom? I am not giving up anytime soon but I am going to need a lot of help, especially with the Democrats pouring millions in Wisconsin.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862569:Jh7_JsVN5:m:1:3299561967:658109C1F78FDB4D651FADB44D9090BE:r "johnson1")**_
---
| | | [JOIN THE FIGHT FOR FREEDOM NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862569:Jh7_JsVN5:m:1:3299561967:658109C1F78FDB4D651FADB44D9090BE:r "johnson2")
---
Please don't delay, I need you on my team.

Thank you,
Ron Johnson

---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862570:Jh7_JsVN5:m:1:3299561967:658109C1F78FDB4D651FADB44D9090BE:r "RonJon Gif")
---
|
A note from Ron Johnson:
America is in peril. President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches: this is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.

As a grandpa, dad, and businessman, I refuse to lose our country to radicals and woke liberals with their socialist agenda. I refuse to jeopardize America's future. I know you feel the same. Can I personally ask you to join me in this Fight for Freedom?

---

My team just wrapped up an emergency fundraising meeting. Chuck Grassley has already started smearing me across the entire state with attack ads, and Mitch McConnell is raising millions more to stop me from turning Iowa blue.

body:
This is where change happens.
Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48233855/357474962/1793776944?refcode=em_20220724_f_a_survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjc5ZWE4Mi01MDBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DtrHPUauL0V5Ko1jndT_zNQWUegb_AyiTdFgTGMad7s=&emci=98bbcc47-3609-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=3279ea82-500b-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277)

| | Hi there, right now, there are a lot of pundits talking about national politics — who will win the Senate, whether the House will flip parties, and so on. These races are incredibly important, and at the same time those aren't the only elections that matter. And as a team, we're spending a lot of time focused on the local races that will have the most direct impact on our families and communities. Many of the issues that most directly impact ourselves and our families are decided at the local level. **Our team wants to know: What are the issues that are most important in your community?** On your ballot, you and your neighbors have a say in the make-up of your school board, the budget of your police department, the parks department’s maintenance of your child’s playground, or which district attorney is enforcing your community’s laws. Each of these local issues is important and the Fair Fight Action team wants to know which matters most to you and your community. [_**Will you share with us by taking this short survey?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48233859/357474967/1141972042?refcode=em_20220724_f_a_survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjc5ZWE4Mi01MDBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DtrHPUauL0V5Ko1jndT_zNQWUegb_AyiTdFgTGMad7s=&emci=98bbcc47-3609-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=3279ea82-500b-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277) | [LET US KNOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48233866/357474971/1141972042?refcode=em_20220724_f_a_survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjc5ZWE4Mi01MDBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DtrHPUauL0V5Ko1jndT_zNQWUegb_AyiTdFgTGMad7s=&emci=98bbcc47-3609-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=3279ea82-500b-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277)
---
Historically, a lot of local elections have had low turnout, leaving big decisions about the direction of our communities in the hands of very few. Fair Fight Action wants to change that by partnering with other organizations on the ground to register, educate, and protect every person’s right to vote. Together, we can make elections free and fair so that everyone has a voice in their community, their state, and their country.
Thank you for your support in this fight — because when we fight, we win!
André D. Fields
Political Director
Fair Fight Action

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8h16po0jk1020if67dqbsh38beahdud5s5v9000_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdhmep74clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfct1iedobfd5mc9qbbdpge9h64phkmdqn4slksho6ed9lclrrcp3gs4qj4sb3msrt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coored9jcup7ephimipm8dtgmlin49fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zuliu4jeia2ntpcc2rp2l94nqlr32d1opksa3080_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdhmep74clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmvgr0prmvn5c8qubhecd58dccvvou434v3g8ai0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdhmep74clh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3bu4ig7qm7lhc8eefdfrj9s71fq62q1bbkji49g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdhmep74clh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Normally about 90% of the hairs on your scalp are in what’s called a “growth phase,” while the other 10% are in a “resting & shedding” phase... But after a stressful event, such as COVID-19 infection, surgery, menopause, or a hormonal imbalance “...**up to 50 PERCENT of hairs are resting and shedding** ,” says Powell Perng, MD, a hair loss specialist at University of Utah Health. Fortunately, [**one distinct type of protein**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znhd2l3u5vqur0q0ekvl6cbjepj2in3avp58vd88_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdhm1o31chh2bs) was recently proven to boost hair follicle thickness & help prevent balding... Now, we're closer than we've ever been to bringing Trump to justice. That's why we're looking for another 45 top Democrats – including you – to respond to our live poll before it closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight. So please, tell us now: Do you support the Jan. 6 investigation to hold Donald Trump accountable? | | | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | We’re pretty used to Republican shenanigans when it comes to elections in Georgia.

In 2018, Brian Kemp ran for governor while simultaneously being in charge of elections in Georgia.

Last year, the GOP passed a voter suppression law that outlawed even handing out food and water to people waiting in line to vote.

**_And that’s not even touching on Republicans changing polling locations and ensuring there are fewer voting options in heavily Democratic areas._**

[_**It just means we have to be ready for whatever tricks they may pull.
