clean_body: | | | We’re pretty used to Republican shenanigans when it comes to elections in Georgia. In 2018, Brian Kemp ran for governor while simultaneously being in charge of elections in Georgia. Last year, the GOP passed a voter suppression law that outlawed even handing out food and water to people waiting in line to vote. And that’s not even touching on Republicans changing polling locations and ensuring there are fewer voting options in heavily Democratic areas. = | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = We know they’re going to try to pull something to make it harder to vote – we have to be ready for whatever it is. = – The Democratic Party of Georgia | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” | | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7bd1db511efa44f58d999d5b88df1db3&_e=Zblv1HYiC2oKKQ63TefmVYS3wmFUQWU3CpNAkHQcuekK1QknTeAg8eK3x18oTrn9PmWMgp-wQbSXp1AyvBsu_KLG2458vMpjBK4Bc304HKh6Ar-AJtyV5PeLpsGA3517wWIUD7NLI1D8TlmUSXXbOISPi5XE34kxMUCRaB0-5MrAOc0E6EhsYYlbXtYrEnnDoSVRkgvA_pDE5FGtTduVRZElncKKFFIce22avlDpkA7N0-Ijf2mW6INyE298DsIPz00ODI2fie9em10sFysppjbVJnad5ctXucjm4G1Ka1dCzLCm3G49ID5eM8dlfVf9fBBvGqpK_JDjCjVmpu92THY7nfvvOWNXw6ZIgLSB3jeGCq1tyRpyB945_eXf0xvP7UfHagmhmPFjFUGQNlQ5m9NpbGYrC_NNduC0ApfiwvVJissGOo57tVvIKjX0lLS0VonhjPZShRIZEGIjXQnilMlsDFPuFd8Ucd_pC5p9TiA%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7bd1db511efa44f58d999d5b88df1db3&_e=Zblv1HYiC2oKKQ63TefmVYS3wmFUQWU3CpNAkHQcuekK1QknTeAg8eK3x18oTrn9PmWMgp-wQbSXp1AyvBsu_KLG2458vMpjBK4Bc304HKh6Ar-AJtyV5PeLpsGA3517wWIUD7NLI1D8TlmUSXXbOISPi5XE34kxMUCRaB0-5MrAOc0E6EhsYYlbXtYrEnnDoSVRkgvA_pDE5FGtTduVRZElncKKFFIce22avlDpkA7N0-Ijf2mW6INyE298DsIPFfLUWaRK9BUtIQX83T9iYwhn-9XipAUjpKm2eyucy69E-Z5BofSamogFNQnw5NMd28MssygWQYha7wPUCUY1lXVMp2ndMXZRr-FLaMwXbqz6mxtrK2lcF2UVcxf_furABBY7VpnhhVnhNJtqBGfy_TslYG-BYtx_f8HZM35xa6n805qI8zfnODXPe_Z3DhKKnrqE0D9UshrjI50pHX8Pd0oJ9RBjAmNJpwQWCjKmrh0%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7bd1db511efa44f58d999d5b88df1db3&_e=Zblv1HYiC2oKKQ63TefmVYS3wmFUQWU3CpNAkHQcuekK1QknTeAg8eK3x18oTrn9PmWMgp-wQbSXp1AyvBsu_KLG2458vMpjBK4Bc304HKh6Ar-AJtyV5PeLpsGA3517wWIUD7NLI1D8TlmUSXXbOISPi5XE34kxMUCRaB0-5MrAOc0E6EhsYYlbXtYrEnnDoSVRkgvA_pDE5FGtTduVRZElncKKFFIce22avlDpkA7N0-Ijf2mW6INyE298DsIPT1-pp_Y96O4UNQfSZcpexdTvCIeY5CBG9woovOG2hJJhiqXfdnD3zNZIu4A9Bti7czFSD50gXGtM7TzOVZZn0ZYRBoiZGza644fL6Tv_G7-ZOXACsW1TpUOdQXjnypbFeVVgZ-JdeUAiHPc_eqhepVUxZYQPYkUXXTutJ0psHOcLRSznKd2oIGtG3MkCAFskxRwwF7DFattJybDruEFdUGghwFTmryW11DdwQXUR5xs%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Sent to Defend the Constitution subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d695ca28aec34d6aa5a1114413cbec88&_e=uaYwbd2FfpNOmWaau_jBXsPXfQJmxmlHPO8D8YBT8CFtEmxJ_4C_mw_y_Gaw_t6XHmKIEI0sBKmI9GV4CS8VYxovxRoHM4Lg2G8vf06_lsRDyaA2lMn8bFUze_wvufPOPJ2Y4-NenAllxz2PZYlzjvSXLe2i_sEAHxBziT2MmaX0xBSY42efuq2pB42AFHflpDLCzG41AvG3Us58RgubB1w6OhxGJJ6LRvTF9JU0FKEUaNFJJyf0PE_m-9ohXe396WeHe1_UOAfocWxzDlXsiNRZUSdhFLt3zTIcYwAxLIj9YxqY5tuFowVDirBY-QLiLMnJTDaCR0Iwnttqnh8weZr8YVZQKKpCPc2q_G_NNBdGgEq6bgC0iUcDJlTITp0SQTp7EXQY4OQJBryU4JY8puVeyHgM51Jb2Y35DnB-dDhzbKBa_liC4BTVunS_x5lAuoRGuO-ZAYfx_t2wnsDQZg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d695ca28aec34d6aa5a1114413cbec88&_e=uaYwbd2FfpNOmWaau_jBXsPXfQJmxmlHPO8D8YBT8CFtEmxJ_4C_mw_y_Gaw_t6XHmKIEI0sBKmI9GV4CS8VYxovxRoHM4Lg2G8vf06_lsRDyaA2lMn8bFUze_wvufPOPJ2Y4-NenAllxz2PZYlzjvSXLe2i_sEAHxBziT2MmaX0xBSY42efuq2pB42AFHflpDLCzG41AvG3Us58RgubB1w6OhxGJJ6LRvTF9JU0FKFehyPvsh38Re3AR-FInwECbQliKNoAGgE7AjqEPkcT2LaFGydi3BwhlV3QUZLOwJpDRStGZZNjMgLBFRaqZcrqz_HXVsuy7KRfWHIq_8zidami7GNUH5mRyVWXSus9fSzvBZvBBZvF003PRwk7MVWxlmoobQ4IRyi8CmuBdkSqDsWcwY-HUzRD5j80aeMrPi4mBstUgOxDD5TS_ppIl0EqzNc2-vJyh2Nl7UhAdsbQGA%3D%3D)**
For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d695ca28aec34d6aa5a1114413cbec88&_e=uaYwbd2FfpNOmWaau_jBXsPXfQJmxmlHPO8D8YBT8CFtEmxJ_4C_mw_y_Gaw_t6XHmKIEI0sBKmI9GV4CS8VYxovxRoHM4Lg2G8vf06_lsRDyaA2lMn8bFUze_wvufPOPJ2Y4-NenAllxz2PZYlzjvSXLe2i_sEAHxBziT2MmaX0xBSY42efuq2pB42AFHflpDLCzG41AvG3Us58RgubB1w6OhxGJJ6LRvTF9JU0FKF7dzCh5Zx7SpxoLpg8pkMuBbOrPQ8JuiIZSVoAdR0jblJ3q21hudby9ED9qGj6ZX2BHX7rvHgeG8MkZKJ_GPbZR2afqTX8OyYYAFKeUcYtubUY2b3IZ2sZUQmXvYa1PtbEj1hEKNnvXunOHzy_e2w2gRo3OeOWms8u4KGbgIhdvwrbIc1A3vI7DuX1TYUnJ1mbG4y8YBeasLGne5oS3D3g921DBV7jrk02cfReCu-75w%3D%3D)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.
Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.
Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Take the National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” | | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c3910579d27e4023a8611554f23d6487&_e=vPniosqjxexLI3kRWmeiyf_Rg-7tPjwe9g-1obMCbbTfktwotNbOIxQiuvgWWc9vI4XRWzaYHI35DnM45olZkg2gOlYeG1s31rxGfbFmPtK2VoyJN8daIsmyeC7Lh0mrQUD3Rit1g9H7w4G9E4EKosEGmFZgy4IhIrdkvBNCy_c-UYoWsgNT9GO6xi6j1gqOPn2qsoOh32fiTjmJfkp_M5d5wMRihSd-Gd3Ij8s9N16yitj01Yup1N4vmZYTcls60iZ_Dy_iGj8TNEy2EeCRqQx5nfOnHeVUiziurV56M1XXy0VGKK-8NFYGdtXMnXz99NJzPiaAm8wZX8etAkJWR8jaxdVy0Sum-u5gp9D97AXz5O2TtFP7MDWwk_LPESfPeX7z88yVaLQ-2T3i67p_Wjh8-5FSEA_X5PhFoWuvojpiKKRKTOSMyhAtQppQy_jOJua7NnCrcHfdZovzHBuQ8bk2WtzaMQr0BNvDfoz-AYs%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c3910579d27e4023a8611554f23d6487&_e=vPniosqjxexLI3kRWmeiyf_Rg-7tPjwe9g-1obMCbbTfktwotNbOIxQiuvgWWc9vI4XRWzaYHI35DnM45olZkg2gOlYeG1s31rxGfbFmPtK2VoyJN8daIsmyeC7Lh0mrQUD3Rit1g9H7w4G9E4EKosEGmFZgy4IhIrdkvBNCy_c-UYoWsgNT9GO6xi6j1gqOPn2qsoOh32fiTjmJfkp_M5d5wMRihSd-Gd3Ij8s9N16yitj01Yup1N4vmZYTcls68pSOhhfFsfvybOFfwEBiwVteW7aj3daTWHAHJ_EOKLwXoFzCCWox6YhmesAUEbLTdj3Pm-eflNKt98dNfBSE1tdhD4qKWP1D7pfjACYyGmVklpAMmGhkx-BRPnXEYZgMk3qh1imcRhDq3ZN0YAzYN4gMIiRDir45kmyA0HrU1QH2cK_JxLZ6zNKtQ4scq8ZMR85ZvgSiDkG4xuw4u1PeOYVls7Et7CFfR7BR9jsUuaQ%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c3910579d27e4023a8611554f23d6487&_e=vPniosqjxexLI3kRWmeiyf_Rg-7tPjwe9g-1obMCbbTfktwotNbOIxQiuvgWWc9vI4XRWzaYHI35DnM45olZkg2gOlYeG1s31rxGfbFmPtK2VoyJN8daIsmyeC7Lh0mrQUD3Rit1g9H7w4G9E4EKosEGmFZgy4IhIrdkvBNCy_c-UYoWsgNT9GO6xi6j1gqOPn2qsoOh32fiTjmJfkp_M5d5wMRihSd-Gd3Ij8s9N16yitj01Yup1N4vmZYTcls6n04PZWXcKqnoQqDcQ62jg_Kb9OZeNInNxv79e5mTyyl7YwrRvv3eWUdAp70tHnb34EipDR0LjPHfyxTpAbdZmsJE9KfCmmvxMbi1IXF9tz_U3xyzp6Gz64MYwJj32G6j-YM4lgl1Yesbfx9NZ-0vC37rkKHtJPZZQso5vsYp8y7t83idZC73GuBH8AOm37AbEFklOKmYi7IrA9_OSqqdrc5mCpNXnECVcLUZ45rSFN0%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Friend,

Our country is at a tipping point. **We will either win this November and save it or lose our country forever.**

**Your urgent response has been requested by every Republican Senator to get a sense of all voters in your Congressional District. If you don’t respond, Democrats will take control.**

_This survey is only intended for the most loyal grassroots supporters. Americans are struggling right now. Senate Republicans and President Trump need YOUR help if we’re going to rescue our nation. Don’t wait._

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: One month post Roe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
The past month has been difficult, to say the least.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48241172/357504443/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk1324-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTA3ZTY5YS01OTBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9h-v02m3t5wVJI0MR7hcgnJ-rhqqhi5N4cZui0eb6i8=)
---
I wanted to check in –
The past month has been difficult, to say the least.
The Supreme Court, enabled by extreme, anti-choice politicians, overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , making half of America's population second-class citizens.
This is a dark moment for our democracy. For the first time in our country's history, a generation of American women have fewer rights than their mothers did.
And make no mistake, this is just the beginning. Mitch McConnell has made it clear that if he takes back Senate control, he will push to ban abortion nationwide.
The danger now facing women and our democracy is very real.
But like the women of the suffragist movement who came before us, we must keep fighting. And that fight starts with the midterm elections – when a woman's fundamental freedom will be on the ballot.
With the Senate split 50-50, this race is the only thing standing in the way of anti-choice extremists implementing a national abortion ban.
I'm doing everything in my power to protect the fundamental right to abortion. But I need your help to keep my extremist opponents from retaking the Senate majority.
**[So please, if you can, chip in $3 to defend our Senate majority and stop a national abortion ban.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48241173/357504446/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1324-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTA3ZTY5YS01OTBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9h-v02m3t5wVJI0MR7hcgnJ-rhqqhi5N4cZui0eb6i8=)**
This is a fight not just to defend reproductive health care — but a woman’s fundamental freedom.
And it’s a fight we must win.
Thank you for standing with me.
With every good wish,

clean_body: The past month has been difficult, to say the least. | | | = I wanted to check in – The past month has been difficult, to say the least. The Supreme Court, enabled by extreme, anti-choice politicians, overturned Roe v. Wade , making half of America's population second-class citizens. This is a dark moment for our democracy. For the first time in our country's history, a generation of American women have fewer rights than their mothers did. And make no mistake, this is just the beginning. Mitch McConnell has made it clear that if he takes back Senate control, he will push to ban abortion nationwide. The danger now facing women and our democracy is very real. But like the women of the suffragist movement who came before us, we must keep fighting. And that fight starts with the midterm elections – when a woman's fundamental freedom will be on the ballot. With the Senate split 50-50, this race is the only thing standing in the way of anti-choice extremists implementing a national abortion ban. I'm doing everything in my power to protect the fundamental right to abortion. But I need your help to keep my extremist opponents from retaking the Senate majority. = This is a fight not just to defend reproductive health care — but a woman’s fundamental freedom. And it’s a fight we must win. Thank you for standing with me. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. Focus on state legislative races** rather than quixotic campaigns against high-profile national Republicans you don’t like. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Eric Holder, Chair. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

subject: Stop Biden’s War on American Energy!
body:
We know you are seeing outrageous gas and energy prices.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EUA-hjDVth1aG33gJviOUjF4FY2eUrW-Zk32GNjW6-mz4Mog-gvAQgEwjDZzBycbeI3j5lhYgKqsk-RaWnXubzwFF85CXzr-iwDP-rP8Tbd4orZ97WPOriDhm46m8lpoNO00ndC1nAe7aphU0uZwTAnQiiIoXLDTLeeuB8E7PMyUmXa6Yi6LqPry8FmpnwvJBaLUcNGuaSB0vUK9c2LhnA==&c=fjTbTIwzSiUTU_iFoEhP3F6o673SnfVZiqEYs6DjaRBXaNacduqrxw==&ch=lxVP7-2MsD7v_HaOdqbg1ElqcKEyUxserWeoeT9wpd_e1aGo0-eQGQ==)
---
| Friend
We know you are seeing outrageous gas and energy prices. They have gotten out of control, so we have to put an end to Biden's war on American energy NOW!
Over the past few months, Biden has issued executive orders banning oil companies from public lands. He has given over 5 million barrels of our oil to China, and let's not forget how he begged nations like Saudi Arabia and Venezuela to increase their oil production instead of increasing ours.
He would rather see our nation indebted to dictators before trusting America. So while he keeps our country down, and makes you suffer at the pump, join Kat's fight for AMERICAN energy independence!
---
| | | [SIGN ON AND SUPPORT AMERICAN ENERGY](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EUA-hjDVth1aG33gJviOUjF4FY2eUrW-Zk32GNjW6-mz4Mog-gvAQgEwjDZzBycbeI3j5lhYgKqsk-RaWnXubzwFF85CXzr-iwDP-rP8Tbd4orZ97WPOriDhm46m8lpoNO00ndC1nAe7aphU0uZwTAnQiiIoXLDTLeeuB8E7PMyUmXa6Yi6LqPry8FmpnwvJBaLUcNGuaSB0vUK9c2LhnA==&c=fjTbTIwzSiUTU_iFoEhP3F6o673SnfVZiqEYs6DjaRBXaNacduqrxw==&ch=lxVP7-2MsD7v_HaOdqbg1ElqcKEyUxserWeoeT9wpd_e1aGo0-eQGQ==)

body:
a LOT has changed, but the minimum wage hasn’t | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/48242153/357508326/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzg4MzhhZS01YjBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fvViclBD5E3hqh5PtWDOLZmtWy1Cyuol6iVPfslRrLg=&emci=9f925f31-fa09-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=3c8838ae-5b0b-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=561582) | Friend, Picture this — it’s 2009. Barack Obama is sworn in for his first term as President. Kanye interrupts Taylor Swift at the VMA’s. Jersey Shore makes its debut on MTV. _Avatar_ becomes the highest-grossing movie of all time. **And Congress just raised the federal minimum wage to $7.25.** A LOT has changed since 2009, but the federal minimum wage? Well, it hasn’t budged. We need a minimum wage that reflects the economic reality we’re living in _now_ , not the one we remember from more than a decade ago. We’ve seen IRL how raising wages improves the lives of America’s working families. _How?_ Since 2016, we’ve won campaigns in **9 different states** to raise wages, and this work has put **_more than $22 billion_** into the hands of workers. [**Now we’re taking the fight to Nebraska → Team, will you support our work to raise wages across the country?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/48242154/357508327/-2082079997?refcode=E17168-20220724-NEMinWage1-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzg4MzhhZS01YjBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fvViclBD5E3hqh5PtWDOLZmtWy1Cyuol6iVPfslRrLg=) **[FIGHT FOR A LIVABLE WAGE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/48242155/357508328/-2082079997?refcode=E17168-20220724-NEMinWage1-SB-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzg4MzhhZS01YjBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fvViclBD5E3hqh5PtWDOLZmtWy1Cyuol6iVPfslRrLg=)** When you think about it, it’s simple._We aren’t living in the same economic conditions as we were in 2009 —_ back when an iPhone cost $199 _not $1,099_ and the average cost of a home in the U.S. was $173,200,_not $348,079 (!!)_ **Bottom line, friend: We shouldn’t expect families to make ends meet with a 2009 minimum wage in 2022.** [**We know how to get this done — we’ve done it 9 times over now. So, team, will you join us in the fight for fair wages? Chip in today to help bolster our campaigns to raise wages across the country. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/48242156/357508329/-2082079997?refcode=E17168-20220724-NEMinWage1-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzg4MzhhZS01YjBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fvViclBD5E3hqh5PtWDOLZmtWy1Cyuol6iVPfslRrLg=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately:_ | **[$7.25](https://click.everyaction.com/k/48242157/357508330/-2082079997?express_lane=true&refcode=E17168-20220724-NEMinWage1-EG-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=7.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzg4MzhhZS01YjBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fvViclBD5E3hqh5PtWDOLZmtWy1Cyuol6iVPfslRrLg=)** | **[$15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/48242158/357508331/-2082079997?express_lane=true&refcode=E17168-20220724-NEMinWage1-EG-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzg4MzhhZS01YjBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fvViclBD5E3hqh5PtWDOLZmtWy1Cyuol6iVPfslRrLg=)**

clean_body: a LOT has changed, but the minimum wage hasn’t | | Friend, Picture this — it’s 2009. Barack Obama is sworn in for his first term as President. Kanye interrupts Taylor Swift at the VMA’s. Jersey Shore makes its debut on MTV. Avatar becomes the highest-grossing movie of all time. And Congress just raised the federal minimum wage to $7.25. A LOT has changed since 2009, but the federal minimum wage? Well, it hasn’t budged. We need a minimum wage that reflects the economic reality we’re living in now , not the one we remember from more than a decade ago. We’ve seen IRL how raising wages improves the lives of America’s working families. How? Since 2016, we’ve won campaigns in 9 different states to raise wages, and this work has put more than $22 billion into the hands of workers. = = When you think about it, it’s simple.We aren’t living in the same economic conditions as we were in 2009 — back when an iPhone cost $199 not $1,099 and the average cost of a home in the U.S. was $173,200,not $348,079 (!!) Bottom line, friend: We shouldn’t expect families to make ends meet with a 2009 minimum wage in 2022. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks, team — we couldn’t do this work without you. Fairness Project = Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 24 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to the Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at the Fairness Project’s sole discretion. **Team, it’s been one month since the landmark decision _Dobbs v. Jackson_ , where the Supreme Court radically decided to strip women of their reproductive freedom. This essential human right is now in jeopardy in one of the largest democracies in the world.**

When _Roe_ was officially voided, several states’ trigger laws on abortion immediately went into effect. And as we speak, state legislatures across the country continue to introduce anti-abortion laws to limit and criminalize women’s health and safety.

Team, protecting Tom’s seat and keeping him in office this November is **_absolutely crucial_** if we have any chance at codifying _Roe v. Wade_ into federal law. We need to maintain our majorities, but the **_GOP is pouring millions into flipping Tom’s seat._**

subject: The Ron DeSantis Round Up
body:

---

_**Welcome to the Ron DeSantis Round Up! This is a chance for the Freedom Team to keep you up-to-date with America 's favorite Governor and his freedom agenda in the Sunshine State. Keep reading to see how Governor Ron DeSantis is fighting for all Floridians this week.**_
This week, Governor DeSantis continued to refute the false narratives pushed by the smear merchants in the legacy media and championed his freedom agenda while traveling across the state.

name: Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: this is about freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
I'm furious. I’m heartbroken. But I’m not giving up. Our worst nightmare has come true: **the Supreme Court has officially overturned _Roe v. Wade_** , but we can’t yield a single inch in the fight for women’s reproductive freedoms.

Anti-choice extremists like Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell stacked the Supreme Court with ultraconservative justices, and now their horrific agenda has become our reality – a country where women don't have the freedom to make our own decisions about our own bodies.

**But the GOP's cruel agenda won't stop here. They _will_ pass a nationwide abortion ban if they retake the Senate.** And experts agree Senate control _will_ be decided right here in Nevada, where Nate Silver is calling my race the GOP’s best pickup opportunity. [**That’s why I’m asking you to rush a $15 gift to split between my campaign and Lisa Blunt Rochester's, so we can defend the Senate and prevent a national abortion ban from ever happening.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48242743/357510882/662711198?refcode=em_fr_220724ccm_n_ccm_actives_7_ng_n_l1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDg1OTgxNC01ZDBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7A36r_aAuef2vkZ5p_Vpt4ieUNI_9eWF5N52ETGWEbA=)

This fight is not going to be easy. Politico is reporting that the GOP is FAVORED to flip the Senate, and **Mitch McConnell’s super PAC is spending $18 million on attack ads to defeat me.**

So I just set an emergency $50,000 goal and I need your immediate support to reach it. **Senate control and the future of abortion access will be decided here in Nevada, so there is zero room for error:**

subject: Meet Carlina!
body:
Hello!

I'm writing to invite you to a meet and greet/fundraiser we're doing at the
Little Shop, a bar at the South Street Seaport. It's a great opportunity to
meet Carlina and other supporters and -- if you're able -- to contribute to
the campaign. Please RSVP here
<https://secure.actblue.com/donate/little-shop>.

Hope to see you there!

[image: Little Shop Invite.png]

--
Xan Aird
Deputy Field Director

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Humbly asking you to read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I’d like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out.

|
---
| | | Friend,

I’d like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out. I know I’ve been emailing, texting, and calling more than normal right now, but I need to reach my goal by midnight and need you to listen to me.

I hope you know me to be an honest man of integrity, so I thought I’d take a second to walk you through why I’m running for office and why this deadline means so much.

---
| [](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e8bda85e24d24d6696897e067440e158&_e=FcZucsKoUAnZTUF_bd5Sap3zrDi8VedvhBWGOiJUHpjt7G0Z9RKzh65reFP0cSbuyOnbwZpq1TTTeqIm6jLJabmKEFkiBYrLTRuGEVZ-zSKhGdx9Su-s3R3gmJTKyLY0FT_3y2LMfgunTOFPxaQuMPdbCWWgBKu_Gj0GEct31b5clRBG75IUVvNS7xGdRRqjJ1A2EaeOeXdShWngaj60pMNGmj_KBlH3ncvQgDe3h-QTmrZPu5ptSbJZtw9rk6wOyITSMS17qCeqqomMahseqbP9c4Wbtk2d9h9pueRqnotKH8Vc0p5YDRwphec9iVXwJZf-aIQDRZp1Z9GIX3qbhq5J8boETb83nD_KG6wfH8V8h5soggotoE0q8KTurJGNwVEvDhyqIC0VCyiyD29XJSmmsTcKelr-KDgMzCoZdcRPPTTpSPQ6yhgHqMVGPtw0 "2")
---

This is a photo of my dad (of course wearing a Miami Dolphins shirt). He was the best role model for being a father, a friend, and an American.

He and my mom thankfully came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba to a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to stay put in America and get to work to achieve the American Dream.

---
| [](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e8bda85e24d24d6696897e067440e158&_e=FcZucsKoUAnZTUF_bd5Sap3zrDi8VedvhBWGOiJUHpjt7G0Z9RKzh65reFP0cSbuyOnbwZpq1TTTeqIm6jLJabmKEFkiBYrLTRuGEVZ-zSKhGdx9Su-s3R3gmJTKyLY0FT_3y2LMfgunTOFPxaQuMPdbCWWgBKu_Gj0GEct31b5clRBG75IUVvNS7xGdRRqjJ1A2EaeOeXdShWngaj60pMNGmj_KBlH3ncvQgDe3h-S1c230i72pS9Z3ZMlzOvdXCKXn_u3hk1_FaUHTqEbqNd0xHVhlJ5sHkDkpqrnNEKjwwIzS7KViBo033qx_ibirycPwymHPbgNK6reStAdGm5MmCLyYBmCNJgUijCazkmRSSM3DjYgiTWVp_F3RcC7v3Xzu6RleNqYwo4OCJeadLQn-chYU5koM6SlIBzcYAsXdAduetIUSaUBgjUndqO0X "1")
---

Eventually, my sister and I became first generation college graduates, and while we had to take on student loans to do so, we knew the work ethic our parents instilled would help us pay them down once we graduated.

I met my wife Jeanette through mutual friends and we got married in 1998. We started our beautiful family of four kids: Amanda, Daniella, Anthony, and Dominick. We eventually adopted two dogs, Winston and Arthur (who I found with my laptop typing some emails to you recently...).

---
| [](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e8bda85e24d24d6696897e067440e158&_e=FcZucsKoUAnZTUF_bd5Sap3zrDi8VedvhBWGOiJUHpjt7G0Z9RKzh65reFP0cSbuyOnbwZpq1TTTeqIm6jLJabmKEFkiBYrLTRuGEVZ-zSKhGdx9Su-s3R3gmJTKyLY0FT_3y2LMfgunTOFPxaQuMPdbCWWgBKu_Gj0GEct31b5clRBG75IUVvNS7xGdRRqjJ1A2EaeOeXdShWngaj60pMNGmj_KBlH3ncvQgDe3h-QdQ8_I_FzR9V8NSh7RGx-A2t_tAayRUX9tAawqpnfW4s5oWMe8Wj6oqLByAqlcrOQEIzjl8ayPuH_zcgmFEllAGoGwGJocJvxUVvpoaMMqdBqdwS06-0z5QeEBF2rbhzDMJptp_gHrZ0vlJko_5_qMdwn3j91PZjSHRHRvixwyyrbuvHbbqIFcgU4zrct7-aKrO63iQBPTjzBiCTh8Pppz "3")
---

All jokes aside, being a father to my wonderful kids is by far my favorite and most important job, and I will never take that for granted.

I first ran for Senate because I saw what Barack Obama and Joe Biden’s policies were doing to families like mine. More families were living paycheck to paycheck at the expense of tax-and-spend Democrats. My parents taught me to work if I wanted to make a change, so that’s exactly what I did.

My dad never got to see me become a U.S. Senator in the country he immigrated to in order to make a better life for us, but I carry his work ethic and family values with me every day in the Senate to honor him, and now, I’m teaching my kids exactly what he taught me.

---
| [](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e8bda85e24d24d6696897e067440e158&_e=FcZucsKoUAnZTUF_bd5Sap3zrDi8VedvhBWGOiJUHpjt7G0Z9RKzh65reFP0cSbuyOnbwZpq1TTTeqIm6jLJabmKEFkiBYrLTRuGEVZ-zSKhGdx9Su-s3R3gmJTKyLY0FT_3y2LMfgunTOFPxaQuMPdbCWWgBKu_Gj0GEct31b5clRBG75IUVvNS7xGdRRqjJ1A2EaeOeXdShWngaj60pMNGmj_KBlH3ncvQgDe3h-QCpsGlL69RRH4EB4xDETC5ZwLoB2vI00awBofpl7Ye_78tz7yoeF22ZWBDgLK_wFtqDlRZifLYW5F7tITj-hUShhR1UvTFNNONnwSCYUUl73_57wJPc2ETOdCfa6fZjUwT63Vl-kRJKxFyFVu2kug0vKFvKUbUhzU11rNVXD4eZoAWNsBPUqhEuL5ZjgWq6Im98ejvltLfgOMQHPf153_w "4")
---

After seeing the dysfunction in Washington firsthand, I decided to run for President so I could bring my passion for America to the White House. My loving family was right by my side, and I couldn’t have been more grateful for their support.

I wanted to stop Hillary Clinton at all costs, and eventually, that meant dropping out of the race and working with Donald Trump to win. Throughout his term, we worked on pro-family and pro-veteran bills to make America great and restore the American Dream.

---
| [](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e8bda85e24d24d6696897e067440e158&_e=FcZucsKoUAnZTUF_bd5Sap3zrDi8VedvhBWGOiJUHpjt7G0Z9RKzh65reFP0cSbuyOnbwZpq1TTTeqIm6jLJabmKEFkiBYrLTRuGEVZ-zSKhGdx9Su-s3R3gmJTKyLY0FT_3y2LMfgunTOFPxaQuMPdbCWWgBKu_Gj0GEct31b5clRBG75IUVvNS7xGdRRqjJ1A2EaeOeXdShWngaj60pMNGmj_KBlH3ncvQgDe3h-RdcKWEMCDiLBAyQyciRtkyX97hfMlKaY9JxiKgfRupJr93k6dpVKY6ZUPyqhOGl1nTSzy_Fs9PJ89cKRnhkFZGBRvy9ygh5OQWOidRzGHIZYbCSAJh12RnU0MnbFlOcePoYS3_4A9q6ZTXuM6fjkw4CBy0zCEbnGJHq4E66AHcP-RIw9vPghOKhWfB6XqubnbRQbM8iL3-Q-yPQlhwI3k- "5")
---

This brings me to my main point: I’m running for Senate because I will never stop fighting to restore the American Dream.

I feel so blessed looking through these photos, and I wanted to share them with you so you can understand where I am coming from.

Reaching these deadlines may seem like a fundraising ploy, but this is real. **If we’re outraised again, that will be a major step back in our fight to restore the American Dream.**

clean_body: I’d like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out. | | | | Friend, I’d like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out. I know I’ve been emailing, texting, and calling more than normal right now, but I need to reach my goal by midnight and need you to listen to me. I hope you know me to be an honest man of integrity, so I thought I’d take a second to walk you through why I’m running for office and why this deadline means so much. | "2" This is a photo of my dad (of course wearing a Miami Dolphins shirt). He was the best role model for being a father, a friend, and an American. He and my mom thankfully came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba to a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to stay put in America and get to work to achieve the American Dream. | "1" Eventually, my sister and I became first generation college graduates, and while we had to take on student loans to do so, we knew the work ethic our parents instilled would help us pay them down once we graduated. I met my wife Jeanette through mutual friends and we got married in 1998. We started our beautiful family of four kids: Amanda, Daniella, Anthony, and Dominick. We eventually adopted two dogs, Winston and Arthur (who I found with my laptop typing some emails to you recently...). | "3" All jokes aside, being a father to my wonderful kids is by far my favorite and most important job, and I will never take that for granted. I first ran for Senate because I saw what Barack Obama and Joe Biden’s policies were doing to families like mine. More families were living paycheck to paycheck at the expense of tax-and-spend Democrats. My parents taught me to work if I wanted to make a change, so that’s exactly what I did. My dad never got to see me become a U.S. Senator in the country he immigrated to in order to make a better life for us, but I carry his work ethic and family values with me every day in the Senate to honor him, and now, I’m teaching my kids exactly what he taught me. | "4" After seeing the dysfunction in Washington firsthand, I decided to run for President so I could bring my passion for America to the White House. My loving family was right by my side, and I couldn’t have been more grateful for their support. I wanted to stop Hillary Clinton at all costs, and eventually, that meant dropping out of the race and working with Donald Trump to win. Throughout his term, we worked on pro-family and pro-veteran bills to make America great and restore the American Dream. | - "5" This brings me to my main point: I’m running for Senate because I will never stop fighting to restore the American Dream. I feel so blessed looking through these photos, and I wanted to share them with you so you can understand where I am coming from. Reaching these deadlines may seem like a fundraising ploy, but this is real. If we’re outraised again, that will be a major step back in our fight to restore the American Dream. "I hope you’ll make a donation today and join this fight before my deadline:" | | | "I'LL JOIN YOU, MARCO!" Thank you so much for taking the time to read this, Marco Rubio | | | | | | "Footer Graphic 1" I talk to folks every day who say they haven’t donated because they think they need to write a big check or they think my race isn’t close. Well, let me tell you, this race will be decided on a razor-thin margin. Currently, we’re only separated by 2%, but considering the MILLIONS my opponent is raising, she could easily take the lead after smearing me in new campaign ads. With such a tight race, any amount donated today can make a difference. name: Matt Gaetz
subject: FW: Liz Cheney's kangaroo court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz_
body:
Dear Peter:

**Liz Cheney won't stop at locking up Donald Trump.**

Liz Cheney is now helping the January 6 witch hunt committee fabricate the grounds to impeach Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas.

Ilhan Omar and other Democrats are already on record demanding Congress impeach Justice Thomas over the events of January 6.

_And now, the committee is seeking to frame Justice Thomas' wife Ginni as an "insurrectionist."_

All because Ginni Thomas questioned the results of the 2020 election.

Going after Ginni Thomas is cowardice, and it's why I'm working with President Trump to FIRE Liz Cheney.

**But President Trump and I can't kick Liz Cheney out of Congress and out of the Republican Party without your help.**

**[So will you chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, or $100 so I can mobilize the America First movement to defeat Liz Cheney in her August 16 primary](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60513998:WoaV4bhRN:m:1:2365227053:26FBF39241FFB0E11AF06CBDF913031F:r)?** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60513998:WoaV4bhRN:m:1:2365227053:26FBF39241FFB0E11AF06CBDF913031F:r) [_**HELP MATT GAETZ FIRE LIZ CHENEY
CHIP IN TODAY**_](hhttps://gaetzforcongress.revv.co/em0725) **The January 6 witch hunt committee is a show trial straight out of Stalinist Russia.**

Due process doesn't exist, and Nancy Pelosi stacked the deck with Never Trumpers like Liz Cheney, Adam Kinzinger, and Adam Schiff.

Cheney and co-conspirators already made it clear their goal is to stop Donald Trump from running for re-election in 2024.

But stopping Trump isn't enough for this band of petty tyrants.

**Attacking Justice Thomas as part of a decades-long vendetta by sliming his wife is the last straw.**

Democrats desire to impeach Justice Thomas as part of a bullying campaign to force conservative justices to change their votes on issues like gun control, abortion, and free speech.

A lunatic liberal already tried to assassinate Justice Brett Kavanaugh to bully the justices.

It's time to bring the curtain down on the January 6 kangaroo court.

**And that starts by firing Liz Cheney.**

**[That's why I'm asking you to stand with President Trump and myself in the fight to end the January 6 witch hunt and oust Liz Cheney from Congress by chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or $2,900 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60513998:WoaV4bhRN:m:1:2365227053:26FBF39241FFB0E11AF06CBDF913031F:r).**

| | | [ JOIN THE FIGHT ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60513998:WoaV4bhRN:m:1:2365227053:26FBF39241FFB0E11AF06CBDF913031F:r) |
---|---|---
Sincerely,

Matt Gaetz
Congresman (R-FL)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60513998:WoaV4bhRN:m:1:2365227053:26FBF39241FFB0E11AF06CBDF913031F:r)

---
Peter, there is no acceptable reason why military-style assault weapons should still be allowed on our streets.

In 2012, a legally purchased AR-15 was used to end the lives of 20 children and six staff members in Sandy Hook Elementary School. In 2016, a similar legally purchased rifle was used to take 49 lives at Pulse nightclub. A couple of months ago, a legally purchased AR-15-style weapon was used to kill 10 New Yorkers in a Buffalo supermarket._And one week after that, a legally purchased assault weapon was used to murder 19 children and two teachers in an elementary school in Uvalde, Texas._ And now, over the 4th of July weekend, a high-powered rifle similar to an AR-15 was used to kill seven people in Highland Park, Illinois.
**The facts are painfully clear: Legally purchased military-style assault weapons are the weapon of choice for most mass shooters and make shootings _significantly_ more deadly.** We MUST ban these weapons before they’re used in yet another tragedy.
I’ve spent my years as your attorney general fighting to protect New Yorkers from gun violence in any way I can – including holding gun manufacturers and sellers accountable for their part in this epidemic – but I need to know if you’re in this fight with me. **Peter, I need to hear from 10,000 fearless fighters before midnight, so please take a moment to answer this quick one-question survey:**
| | **Should we ban military-style assault weapons?**
---

---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48245986/357523774/-822847262?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk604-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDE5YmYxMi02NDBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7sdEVzUOZoBgz3TijgqD_y92y12uiGa9hcPLiFIkfT8=&emci=191d902e-4809-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=c419bf12-640b-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)

Peter,

Ron Johnson has spewed racist comments, conspiracy theories, and continues to vote against much-needed legislation that would help Wisconsin. **He is one of America’s worst Senators, but I’m running for more reasons than to just defeat Ron Johnson.** **[Before I continue, I’m asking you to contribute $10 to our campaign to flip this seat blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48246297/357525030/1785566411?refcode=EM_FR_220724FR_N_AL_60DA_5_NG_N_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWI0Mzc3OC02NTBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JsMEVxLausPoV4FlGsDtjSvG7W9XcZIGy_4rMvmFwFA=)**

I’m running to be a champion for common-sense legislation that would move Wisconsin forward. Paying workers family-sustaining wages, providing them with good benefits, and treating everyone with the dignity and respect they deserve shouldn’t be controversial. During my time with the Bucks, we’ve shown that it’s possible to have progressive values while still running a successful and profitable business.

This can be the blueprint for all of Wisconsin and our country. We can pass a $15 minimum wage, codify Roe into federal law, pass common sense gun reform laws, and so much more—**but we need to ensure that Democrats hold on to our majority in the Senate.**

Right now, with a 50-50 split, this race will be one of the most watched races in our country. That’s why CNN continually ranks this seat as one of the most competitive senate races in the country.

**[I can win this race, but it is not a slam dunk. I need you to help encourage even more people to join our team before my August 9 primary. name: Kevin Roberts, Ph.D.
subject: Let’s do this together
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWDYk5bhNY

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWDYk5bhNY

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Fellow
Patriot,
I'm sure
you'll agree that today America finds itself at a crossroads.
Soaring
inflation … rampant crime … an impending national
disaster along our Southern border.
Not to
mention a historic and deliberate attempt to subvert our
children, break apart the family unit and destroy any semblance
of polite civil discourse.
And so I
probably don't need to tell you that change is sorely overdue.
The problem?
With
things the way they are today, it's tough for well-informed
citizens like you-who want to help restore America's greatness-to
know where to begin.
My name
is Kevin D. Roberts, President of The Heritage Foundation. And
I'm writing today because I would like to help.
If you
believe that the principles of individual freedom, limited
government, and free enterprise are our best hope to restore
America's strength and prosperity …
And if
you'd like to join over 500,000 other conservatives in fighting
for lasting reform …

Then I
want to personally invite you to become a member of The Heritage
Foundation: America's most influential conservative think tank,
consistently rated #1 in the world for "Significant Impact on
Public Policy."

Right
now, the Radical Left thinks they've won. But we refuse to allow
the tone deaf lawmakers in Washington to ignore the reform that
you (and millions like you) want to see. We are determined to
fight (and win) on your behalf.
For
almost 50 years the Heritage Foundation and our renowned team of
more than 100 policy experts have been on the front lines
fighting for your conservative principles.
Can I
count on you to join us?
Please
click or tap this secure link to accept your invitation today:
https://secured.heritage.org/activate-your-membership/
Once you
join, we'll send your Heritage Foundation membership card to you
right away. Thank you for supporting conservative principles.
All the
best,
Kevin D.
Roberts
President
The
Heritage Foundation
P.S. The
Radical Left is counting on you to sit this fight out. But let's
remind them what happens when the silent majority closes ranks
and pushes back. Don't miss this opportunity to be an active
participant in returning our founding principles to Washington
and making America a nation we can be proud of again.
https://secured.heritage.org/activate-your-membership/

The
Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington
D.C. 20002

body:
I don’t know about you, but I’m sick of failed career politicians like Biden, Pelosi, and my opponent, Bill Foster, who’ve
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq9hvr2e09cpg7a8hni8e4puqmaeibkiqkn5gmpo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdjm6or2clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s9ks1j65cbge9pmdd1lclrraodle1om1djhe5h64t1ic5qj0tr66ipj5chgmljrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p30pjh6aqr6ptie9j33c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)

Friend,

I don’t know about you, but I’m sick of failed career politicians like Biden, Pelosi, and my opponent, Bill Foster, who’ve been in office for decades.

_All they have done is make America poorer and less safe_.

**It’s time for fresh faces — new ideas. **

I’m Catalina Lauf, and I’m running for Congress in the 11th District of Illinois.

_**[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z74ijjivbrma4plq1dp2ee94knllpel3stdp4v1g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdjm6or2clh2bs)**_
Because of our campaign’s grassroots support, I won the primary election! But now, the real work begins.

Getting an early start is critical to our success. I’ve set a goal to raise $30,000 before the end of July to jumpstart our campaign into action!

[_**This election will determine whether Republicans can take back Congress or not.**__**Can you help conservatives WIN in 2022?**__**Click here to rush your support today >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgiuq37s4rhh01d3oc3khkriu4g0p78ra5l14meo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdjm6or2clh2bs)

The election will be here sooner than you think, and there’s a lot at stake.

_In just two years of the radical Left controlling Congress_ , they have caused out-of-control inflation, a gas crisis, supply-chain issues, and the death of small businesses.

They have allowed illegal immigrants to flood our borders, Big tech to censor conservative voices, and radical Leftist teachers to indoctrinate our children.

It’s going to take a new generation of strong, conservative American leadership will save this country from the radical left.

_Unlike my opponent, I don’t rely on the DC money machine, woke corporations, or corrupt special interests to fund my campaign. _

**I’m counting on outsiders - everyday Americans - to help me turn this country around.**

[_**Will you join the fight? Please click here to donate $10, $25, or even $100 and take back America from the radical Left >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5d1neo9bvl2aejiq645k9esqhvivlof8uaovm58_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdjm6or2clh2bs)

Failed Bill Foster is nothing more than Nancy Pelosi’s puppet. He won’t lift a finger unless she tells him to. Do you want a weak Democrat in Congress who always votes in favor of the Biden/Pelosi agenda?

The patriots of this country have him figured out and aren’t going to settle for it any longer.

**It’s time for a new generation of Republicans to take back Congress.**

Can I count on your support? This is a key district that we can flip from blue to red.

Click below to help bring the red wave to Illinois this fall.

[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu4q7ajt93vtg20gg3e588a8jihfk4dotejecelg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdjm6or2clh2bs)

Catalina Lauf

I'm afraid these GOP attacks will push me behind ...
| | |

Friend: My daily fundraising deadline is tonight at midnight, and I'm WAY behind on my $100,000 goal. **With hours left, I'm personally asking for your immediate support.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48246759/357526386/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3828-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjUyNTk4Zi02NzBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EvEfrsQ0GorpDhq01ooUqxmXH-VvfaUslo6FJCb8a0o=)
The GOP is POURING money into this race, friend. A Rubio-linked super PAC just spent $1.5 million on attack ads that distort my reputation – and the Senate Republican campaign arm has over $150 million in the bank that they'll pour into Florida because they know this race could determine which party wins Senate control.
I'm doing everything I can to make sure I win this race, expand our majority and send Marco Rubio packing, but I'll be honest, it's beginning to get hard to keep up with the millions of dollars of outside money being spent to stall my momentum.
**I'm statistically tied with Marco Rubio in recent polls – but I'm afraid these GOP attacks will push me behind if I don't have the resources to defend myself, so please:[Will you donate $5 right now to help me reach my midnight goal, keep my ads on the air to spread the truth to as many voters as possible and protect our Senate majority from the GOP? Val Demings

name: Latinos for America First
subject: Border 911 Event in Houston TX with Lara Logan and Tom Homan
body:
Border 911 Event We are proud to announce and would like to invite you to the first Border 911 event powered by The America Project in Houston Texas.
| |
---
[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=746383.2756.1.4d235b21ae5c21be5bede4f6b4698066) |
---
# Border 911 Event
---
We are proud to announce and would like to invite you to the first Border 911 event powered by The America Project in Houston Texas. Come listen to experts and professionals talk about the Texas Invasion, but most important we will have Call to Action panels with experts to train and teach you: How you can Help and Impact policy changes affecting our state and nation. Lara Logan, former FOX NATION journalist will be our Master of Ceremonies. Tom Homan former Acting Director of the U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement under the Trump administration and Fox News Contributor, along with General Michael Flynn retired United States Army Lieutenant General who was the 24th U.S. National Security Advisor under the Trump Administration will be headlining the event. Many more speakers will join us. You will not want to miss this event! ONE WEEK ONLY PROMO CODE LFAF for 20% off your ticket.
---
Saturday, August 27
8:30 AM - 6:30 PM
CT Church
9701 Almeda Genoa Rd.
Houston, Texas 77075

Tom Homan former Acting Director of the U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement under the Trump administration and Fox News Contributor, along with General Michael Flynn retired United States Army Lieutenant General who was the 24th U.S. National Security Advisor under the Trump Administration will be headlining the event. Many more speakers will join us. You will not want to miss this event! ONE WEEK ONLY PROMO CODE LFAF for 20% off your ticket. Saturday, August 27 8:30 AM - 6:30 PM CT Church 9701 Almeda Genoa Rd. Houston, Texas 77075 | | | | | | | | | Latinos for America First is not affiliated or associated with and candidate or campaign. name: Virginia Democrats
subject: Who would you vote for in VA-10?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
Rep. Jennifer Wexton v. Hung Cao

|
---
Derek, Jennifer Wexton has been a tireless public servant on behalf of Virginians. She spent years serving as a prosecutor, as an advocate for children, as a State Senator, and, since 2019, as the Congresswoman representing Virginia’s 10th district. She’s used her time in office to protect Virginian’s access to healthcare, to promote gun safety legislation, defend LGBTQ rights, and to fight for workers across the Commonwealth. Now, she’s being challenged by Hung Cao. Hung Cao, who is “honored” to be endorsed by far-right Sen. Tom Cotton, supports banning abortion after the moment of conception, lends credence to President Trump’s “Big Lie,” and remains a passionate climate change denier. **[We’re reaching out to hear your voice. If you could vote for Rep. Wexton or Cao, for whom would you be voting? Take our straw poll and let us know!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48247361/357529635/1954631080?refcode=dpva-em-220724-cd10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWE2ODZhOS02OTBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1XJjsnnnkG6CUPdK9lmxnDW83QlW7mmzTdkVxjEi3SU=&emci=10174f49-000a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=49a686a9-690b-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=15759664)** Thanks for sharing your thoughts and letting us know how you feel about this race! name: Marco Rubio
subject: Humbly asking you to read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I’d like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out.

|
---
| | | Friend,

I’d like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out. I know I’ve been emailing, texting, and calling more than normal right now, but I need to reach my goal by midnight and need you to listen to me.

I hope you know me to be an honest man of integrity, so I thought I’d take a second to walk you through why I’m running for office and why this deadline means so much.

---
| [](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3247e481e99146bb8a12fb4a47ea0510&_e=Eb964UHfSjq-a-U8EaUwfZDn2w-TQ_i8eX4wh89498sFEf6-qMNGZwIsEUGWwT4glIPT980W3IefnPWf10cXRyRF-p2cKKHmBYxdzBjB-1fnhnw_HuNhd1QmpyV7bLyGnEkyw7rEm9_OwlThvi6O5SMzMMuFzSelil4uDhIdyHj2UW_kA3H0_Byb4g6QQa691WG8CxLDEk_8KLuPqwNm2_bkILv9DZYoSP7p88ONpMjAGDrx42xcaglZEdds4U8jfUST10mvNpQp1bjoL9QAJQdACTEcNmXQvKD_oMRuW0t01J-8niXiYJP8UdP_9yQl31dzQtAGcbWFXeowlt_KrWAeEEk-1BX9L3Xuk2cDhbiVCKPH8xt1a3rNX4eTe3KfgTb8SXpeJZqR-lO0_CfUPdSyJ-ngWPptHc370NP0ak5ob_iEi1IKpG3e06Thh6HO "2")
---

This is a photo of my dad (of course wearing a Miami Dolphins shirt). He was the best role model for being a father, a friend, and an American.

He and my mom thankfully came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba to a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to stay put in America and get to work to achieve the American Dream.

---
| [](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3247e481e99146bb8a12fb4a47ea0510&_e=Eb964UHfSjq-a-U8EaUwfZDn2w-TQ_i8eX4wh89498sFEf6-qMNGZwIsEUGWwT4glIPT980W3IefnPWf10cXRyRF-p2cKKHmBYxdzBjB-1fnhnw_HuNhd1QmpyV7bLyGnEkyw7rEm9_OwlThvi6O5SMzMMuFzSelil4uDhIdyHj2UW_kA3H0_Byb4g6QQa691WG8CxLDEk_8KLuPqwNm2_bkILv9DZYoSP7p88ONpMg7sS9Dcdb0pJFxjmGaCMbYY1w4qkINGfyIol6snVljQCZDqDSyLtBIm7rCCBgWcAr53tG0vAS4dYfk5I-PCSBFykT4g5EqduB2Uq5326WVUhpJyYiOK9QEYTXe_guDDIansSJojREYEkQ90f4Z6IM_3NUyg4U2rLp4kmSqJk6xr2JBj97MRg_FJVN6AFNETnbVuowqqu1_8rdJMmeCvkMY "1")
---

Eventually, my sister and I became first generation college graduates, and while we had to take on student loans to do so, we knew the work ethic our parents instilled would help us pay them down once we graduated.

I met my wife Jeanette through mutual friends and we got married in 1998. We started our beautiful family of four kids: Amanda, Daniella, Anthony, and Dominick. We eventually adopted two dogs, Winston and Arthur (who I found with my laptop typing some emails to you recently...).

---
| [](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3247e481e99146bb8a12fb4a47ea0510&_e=Eb964UHfSjq-a-U8EaUwfZDn2w-TQ_i8eX4wh89498sFEf6-qMNGZwIsEUGWwT4glIPT980W3IefnPWf10cXRyRF-p2cKKHmBYxdzBjB-1fnhnw_HuNhd1QmpyV7bLyGnEkyw7rEm9_OwlThvi6O5SMzMMuFzSelil4uDhIdyHj2UW_kA3H0_Byb4g6QQa691WG8CxLDEk_8KLuPqwNm2_bkILv9DZYoSP7p88ONpMj-Fbti-RHizB2txsvvUtMkX-zsUgfmYNFE58DqPIssyG5dJk-Wjezkkjbryku35HhDYnRXfwatOHwjD2Af2j_foviTZdPRFQ55WlDfUCCT8HIKEYuWcVN-4kTz3jz9lX6dfUBP6V01oDHuUsTP3e-m7pjejaeYA_ocK0xIhsEbdK7oXSKOUvn2Rt9oZ31tEGuw0ipmEOS1GJPDiS9TvRoK "3")
---

All jokes aside, being a father to my wonderful kids is by far my favorite and most important job, and I will never take that for granted.

I first ran for Senate because I saw what Barack Obama and Joe Biden’s policies were doing to families like mine. More families were living paycheck to paycheck at the expense of tax-and-spend Democrats. My parents taught me to work if I wanted to make a change, so that’s exactly what I did.

My dad never got to see me become a U.S. Senator in the country he immigrated to in order to make a better life for us, but I carry his work ethic and family values with me every day in the Senate to honor him, and now, I’m teaching my kids exactly what he taught me.

---
| [](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3247e481e99146bb8a12fb4a47ea0510&_e=Eb964UHfSjq-a-U8EaUwfZDn2w-TQ_i8eX4wh89498sFEf6-qMNGZwIsEUGWwT4glIPT980W3IefnPWf10cXRyRF-p2cKKHmBYxdzBjB-1fnhnw_HuNhd1QmpyV7bLyGnEkyw7rEm9_OwlThvi6O5SMzMMuFzSelil4uDhIdyHj2UW_kA3H0_Byb4g6QQa691WG8CxLDEk_8KLuPqwNm2_bkILv9DZYoSP7p88ONpMi2kOlJ9vnf80SSnT18V_jpL38iF5W3bjZUvjReE0Ug6aNFjAR9P1zIC_SagZbw6H_T1Zj3FkQq3WJl0_Z_DcUhjTTqSm70od73wUpSxDMd2oceZk2Xt4p-zCHYTLOkGN8QRRmBBmEKzKTpJzFJJwAzWytC4HMYH3UdKWTme8RFQ9ZHG14o_f__0n1C1qMArA6y4yJU-Cb4mo9EZhX1cOI0 "4")
---

After seeing the dysfunction in Washington firsthand, I decided to run for President so I could bring my passion for America to the White House. My loving family was right by my side, and I couldn’t have been more grateful for their support.

I wanted to stop Hillary Clinton at all costs, and eventually, that meant dropping out of the race and working with Donald Trump to win. Throughout his term, we worked on pro-family and pro-veteran bills to make America great and restore the American Dream.

---
| [](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3247e481e99146bb8a12fb4a47ea0510&_e=Eb964UHfSjq-a-U8EaUwfZDn2w-TQ_i8eX4wh89498sFEf6-qMNGZwIsEUGWwT4glIPT980W3IefnPWf10cXRyRF-p2cKKHmBYxdzBjB-1fnhnw_HuNhd1QmpyV7bLyGnEkyw7rEm9_OwlThvi6O5SMzMMuFzSelil4uDhIdyHj2UW_kA3H0_Byb4g6QQa691WG8CxLDEk_8KLuPqwNm2_bkILv9DZYoSP7p88ONpMhsXEbw7BscNJzGhnT3fnJWrCPYSkCr_TVwMZkE47z_l_vWCh6DmBlQypY9XObljp7bnrc-GQCqpEawoXgjjXoH4C0LSNK7MhQWaY9Ww8_sC-Wq9awYckEgUs7WfYpukyO4WCkkS4_7HOVjF2r0GKQh7JSuDdLY9mr34UcEG7l3oHSocI_IfPks1vE9KZ3oPfE11skvzE2Cof-oxexG3Pui "5")
---

This brings me to my main point: I’m running for Senate because I will never stop fighting to restore the American Dream.

I feel so blessed looking through these photos, and I wanted to share them with you so you can understand where I am coming from.

Reaching these deadlines may seem like a fundraising ploy, but this is real. **If we’re outraised again, that will be a major step back in our fight to restore the American Dream.**
**[I hope you’ll make a donation today and join this fight before my deadline:](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3247e481e99146bb8a12fb4a47ea0510&_e=Eb964UHfSjq-a-U8EaUwfZDn2w-TQ_i8eX4wh89498sFEf6-qMNGZwIsEUGWwT4glIPT980W3IefnPWf10cXRyRF-p2cKKHmBYxdzBjB-1fnhnw_HuNhd1QmpyV7bLyGnEkyw7rEm9_OwlThvi6O5SMzMMuFzSelil4uDhIdyHj2UW_kA3H0_Byb4g6QQa691WG8CxLDEk_8KLuPqwNm2_bkILv9DZYoSP7p88ONpMgD3cTCeb3s3U5_c2QJTllklpI5go_OHqxpkRyXS26V2Kf7zl5B3FkTJVqxppbhgdia2RmlZzCcwZs5dno5n9P6oLdZYw6J_Ztx0-S-Jhfj2F_cR35fnCGVflpVptPJ8134TY7WGMQxL9GJ9nywyxU7lzDWUpeeL6BXqcRw0XMTJ_HoU-987huo53gz8jYyFdUQUj_0Ypu6DxdMErgOiwV6 "I hope you’ll make a donation today and join this fight before my deadline:")**
