clean_body: I’d like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out. | | | | Friend, I’d like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out. I know I’ve been emailing, texting, and calling more than normal right now, but I need to reach my goal by midnight and need you to listen to me. I hope you know me to be an honest man of integrity, so I thought I’d take a second to walk you through why I’m running for office and why this deadline means so much. | "2" This is a photo of my dad (of course wearing a Miami Dolphins shirt). He was the best role model for being a father, a friend, and an American. He and my mom thankfully came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba to a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to stay put in America and get to work to achieve the American Dream. | "1" Eventually, my sister and I became first generation college graduates, and while we had to take on student loans to do so, we knew the work ethic our parents instilled would help us pay them down once we graduated. I met my wife Jeanette through mutual friends and we got married in 1998. We started our beautiful family of four kids: Amanda, Daniella, Anthony, and Dominick. We eventually adopted two dogs, Winston and Arthur (who I found with my laptop typing some emails to you recently...). | "3" All jokes aside, being a father to my wonderful kids is by far my favorite and most important job, and I will never take that for granted. I first ran for Senate because I saw what Barack Obama and Joe Biden’s policies were doing to families like mine. More families were living paycheck to paycheck at the expense of tax-and-spend Democrats. My parents taught me to work if I wanted to make a change, so that’s exactly what I did. My dad never got to see me become a U.S. Senator in the country he immigrated to in order to make a better life for us, but I carry his work ethic and family values with me every day in the Senate to honor him, and now, I’m teaching my kids exactly what he taught me. | "4" After seeing the dysfunction in Washington firsthand, I decided to run for President so I could bring my passion for America to the White House. My loving family was right by my side, and I couldn’t have been more grateful for their support. I wanted to stop Hillary Clinton at all costs, and eventually, that meant dropping out of the race and working with Donald Trump to win. Throughout his term, we worked on pro-family and pro-veteran bills to make America great and restore the American Dream. | "5" This brings me to my main point: I’m running for Senate because I will never stop fighting to restore the American Dream. I feel so blessed looking through these photos, and I wanted to share them with you so you can understand where I am coming from. Reaching these deadlines may seem like a fundraising ploy, but this is real. If we’re outraised again, that will be a major step back in our fight to restore the American Dream. "I hope you’ll make a donation today and join this fight before my deadline:" | | | "I'LL JOIN YOU, MARCO!" Thank you so much for taking the time to read this, Marco Rubio | | | | | | "Footer Graphic 1" I talk to folks every day who say they haven’t donated because they think they need to write a big check or they think my race isn’t close. Well, let me tell you, this race will be decided on a razor-thin margin. Currently, we’re only separated by 2%, but considering the MILLIONS my opponent is raising, she could easily take the lead after smearing me in new campaign ads. With such a tight race, any amount donated today can make a difference. "Please, can you give $4, 8, $12.55, or $17 today?"** | | | "DONATE NOW >>" | Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate PO Box 530650 Miami, FL 33153 Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Harriet Hageman
subject: Send Liz Cheney packing
body:
This will be the most important race in the entire country... |
Friend,

Will you help me FIRE Liz Cheney and take back our conservative movement from the elitist establishment that is working arm-in-arm with Joe Biden?

No sooner had President Trump endorsed my primary challenge to Liz Cheney did she shoot back with her usual arrogance to "bring it."

[**Well, I'm counting on you to help me bring it by chipping in with an emergency donation to my campaign to FIRE Liz Cheney.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64725%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o6nqirq1cCp1Mk5kFCUhuw&sysid=1) [DONATE NOW](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64726%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TayN3zVkyHShXaeA6TTJ5w&sysid=1)
You and I don't have a moment to lose...

That's because establishment elitists, like George W. Bush, headline ritzy fundraisers in other states to raise millions for Cheney.

That was even after Cheney admitted in a 60 Minutes interview that her record-breaking fundraising haul was helped out by Democrats.

If there was ever a time for conservative Americans to stand up to the elitist establishment, it's now. And it's against Liz Cheney.

[**Will you help me stand up with an urgently needed donation today?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64727%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l91o1KchTTJFYwEhLKj%2fIA&sysid=1)

I'm getting ahead of myself.

Before you decide to give to my campaign to FIRE establishment-anointed Liz Cheney from Congress, **let me tell you a little about who I am, why President Trump endorsed my primary challenge, and why we need your immediate help.**

My name is Harriet Hageman, and Wyoming is my home.

Growing up on a ranch outside Ft. Laramie, I learned the value of hard work, integrity, self-sufficiency, and honesty from an early age.

They're not just values Joe Biden and his socialists hate - they run absolutely counter to the establishment elites who have for too long controlled our Republican Party... and sold out our country to the highest bidder.

**I should know - like many in my state, and many more around the country, I was duped by these same "Republicans."**

**And as a constitutional lawyer who fought against Bill Clinton's EPA regulations, I watched in disgust as establishment elites like Liz Cheney embraced big government and abandoned our conservative values.**

Unfortunately, it's only gotten worse since President Trump left office.

And now, backed by their friends on the left and the media, Cheney and the establishment are waging a full-blown war on Americans like you and me!

[**No more. Will you support my campaign to defeat Liz Cheney by making an emergency donation today? I'll be honest, her LIBERAL big money backers are putting millions of dollars into her campaign right. Without your help, I don't stand a chance.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64728%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bgO8YmEjejXDDnFtlSduhg&sysid=1) [DONATE NOW](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64726%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TayN3zVkyHShXaeA6TTJ5w&sysid=1) As I said at the start of this email, **President Trump is 100% behind me.**

He knows the people of Wyoming - and the _American_ people - deserve better than Cheney, and he knows I'll never abandon our conservative values once elected to Congress.

In Wyoming, we have a long and proud history of standing up against an overbearing government.

In Washington, I promise to do the same...

...unlike Cheney, who spends more time fist-bumping Joe Biden and complimenting Nancy Pelosi than she does fighting back against big government bureaucrats who _waste our tax dollars_ , _fling open our borders_ , and _silence, censor, and even lock up conservatives_ who disagree!

**But even though I have President Trump's complete and total endorsement, there's one endorsement I still need: yours.**

[**Will you make an donation today to show President Trump that you're still a part of his MAGA-America First Movement?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64729%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hL9NtcSWNNB7%2bjqWfHwJoQ&sysid=1) [DONATE NOW](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64726%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TayN3zVkyHShXaeA6TTJ5w&sysid=1) You should know that, even though polls show Cheney is grossly unpopular in Wyoming, she still thinks she can win re-election.

**In fact, when liberal _60 Minutes_ asked her if she could beat me in the primary, she said "absolutely...this is going to be the most important House race in the country."**

Well, she was right about something - this will be the most important race in the entire country - but only because it will be the first step in saving America from the big government elites who enable Joe Biden.

Again, I'll need your help to beat her.

As I said, Cheney can count on the deep pocketbooks of the entire establishment.

That's not even saying anything for her left-wing supporters, who see this as their chance to weaken our Republican Party for good.

**But with your help, I know we can beat them. And I know we can send the disastrous Cheney political dynasty packing for good.**

[**So please, won't you ensure that Liz Cheney bury me, a true conservative, with money from her swampy elite friends?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64720%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IwhmvoZ80l21ARxQgtNVdQ&sysid=1) [DONATE NOW](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64726%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TayN3zVkyHShXaeA6TTJ5w&sysid=1) Liz Cheney represents everything the left stands for, and everything we must fight against.

Will you help me make sure we win that fight?

Respectfully,
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64721%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9UToWBK55SGcYTCyFmVPQg&sysid=1)
Harriet Hageman
America First Conservative for Congress (WY)

P.S. It's disgusting to see Liz Cheney teaming up with George Bush to demonize conservatives and raise millions to back Nancy Pelosi's unconstitutional power grabs in Congress.

It's even more disgusting to watch her claim she speaks for the people of Wyoming and America.

[**No more - will you make an urgent donation to my campaign to defeat her in the Republican primary?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64722%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lTXs6hFi%2fTq8DwHbvE3mcg&sysid=1) [DONATE NOW](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64726%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TayN3zVkyHShXaeA6TTJ5w&sysid=1)
---
| [ ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64723%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7dU2Upg5hICHrq6dw5NF3w&sysid=1)
---
| Paid for by:
Hageman For Wyoming
P.O. Box 4157
Cheyenne, WY 82003
---

_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6288%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=zVAp4LmR1ZTaHfPAaZaPbg&sysid=1)_

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: The state of America’s energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuvalvp354k6rih6298uhg1094rncp7tunv51ds0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdjm1ob4c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6splmio62cbnctjbapb2elg6at1nmjjb8cljmli31ddie2o65c5l6oqr8c33c3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coored9jc1p70pjlcipm8ptgmlin49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmckmm35306g7qh2fikcpolmj9ebboku8dmdlbqg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdjm1ob4c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family.
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4l8ff2sm15vtbvdpngoav5eniu25rkljuus59t0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdjm1ob4c3h2bs)
---
[**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt3k369vkhe6rldtq0fatdr70nifrmao2dgv99b0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdjm1ob4c3h2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4e3ts5l6s4lt580r8hurmc68fh6dqgcg6j5se6g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdjm1ob4c3h2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Diehl for Governor
subject: Reminder: Geoff calls out Maura Healey for failing to do her job - again!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DIEHL FOR MASSACHUSETTS
body:
| | | |
---
---
| Yesterday, Geoff issued a strong statement calling for Maura Healey to do her job and stand with him in defense of the volunteers collecting signatures for the ballot question on driver's licenses for illegal immigrants.
Check out full coverage on Page 2 of today's Boston Herald:

name: Ronny Jackson
subject: Patriot, this makes me SICK.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | **" If you don't shower with a transgender person, we're kicking you OUT of the Marine Corps!"**
Patriot, this is the reality members of the military are facing. Instead of setting our sights on America's enemies, Biden put a target on the back of every Marine who believes in traditional values.

_**If Marines refuse to shower with members of the opposite gender, Biden pledged to have them removed WITHOUT an honorable release.**_ This makes me SICK.

This is Trump's #1 Ally in Congress, Rep. Ronny Jackson. When I was deployed to Iraq as a combat physician, I saw the horrific wounds Marines suffered on the battlefield.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862612:6Sf5zsVaN:m:1:3299561967:315A29F70FE098C417A2E6FA375E7583:r)
---

These wounded Marines were the bravest Americans I've ever encountered, and not a day goes by where I don't think of the sacrifices they made for our country. I treat military service with the utmost seriousness, and what Biden is doing to our military is a DISGRACE to everyone who's worn the uniform.

**[Now, I desperately need your help to protect every Marine serving our country.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862613:6Sf5zsVaN:m:1:3299561967:315A29F70FE098C417A2E6FA375E7583:r "Now, I desperately need your help to protect every Marine serving our country.")**

The DC Swamp hates me for this, and they're primed to spend millions to crush me. I have a crucial fundraising deadline tonight and I'm humbly asking you for help.

**[Would you give a donation to make sure I have what it takes to stop the insane Left from destroying our nation?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862613:6Sf5zsVaN:m:1:3299561967:315A29F70FE098C417A2E6FA375E7583:r "Would you give
just $5 to make sure I have what it takes to stop the insane Left from destroying our nation?")**
___ ___
---
Please, please help our Marines today. Without your support, they'll all be kicked to the curb.
---
| | | [STAND WITH RONNY JACKSON](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862613:6Sf5zsVaN:m:1:3299561967:315A29F70FE098C417A2E6FA375E7583:r "STAND
WITH RONNY JACKSON")
---

Ronny Jackson is a U.S. Navy Veteran. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Department of Defense or the Department of the Navy
---
| |
* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862614:6Sf5zsVaN:m:1:3299561967:315A29F70FE098C417A2E6FA375E7583:r "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862614:6Sf5zsVaN:m:1:3299561967:315A29F70FE098C417A2E6FA375E7583:r "Can we count on
you to step up?")** ********
---
| | | [DONATE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862614:6Sf5zsVaN:m:1:3299561967:315A29F70FE098C417A2E6FA375E7583:r "Donate Button in Footer")

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

name: Marisa Wood
subject: What to expect from McCarthy’s revenge tour
body:
His scorched-earth revenge campaign will essentially leave Democrats (and cooperative Republicans) with their hands tied. | _We are alerting Democrats about Marisa Wood -- a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. To support Marisa Wood's campaign,[chip in here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48249060/357536549/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmFlNzdjMS02ZTBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t9GEnj6PN9CBHymUcA7bfEHJxqFo-KCPA-xiQ96s6ZE=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/54vQjwqOs0S94s4JEtZ-gw2?unsubscribedata=HjG6nVJNj2L2tXdJwpM3JRqW7dWY2Qy%2Bw0zgIECFcid%2F%2BRpLdthH3UK3zNVwbFrzyyYSXOH4lBqb3PO%2F6JCLcpldLUdUwavhSg40mcU1e4DJ6XZk6HRukmNPf%2FuSwpX5Ut1FbinU7LAxDNNfu3cJeoTJ4D7Y64csgF6xT07uNCJfLrzRPuk516Au22jVFtMWiXBZHYV0WmFsSUYZPCTYqM4mPsLSIorlXd16Ow%2Fts8Q%2BKR9BCXlNfYcd7eThZPY7TTJ37IC7FXslr4eJLF6g5YVXTSwIK0VfoWwGooS7VE%2B3L3iFMUWqYqSjv1swP%2FVWLxvFCM0JS016Vp8sX5mmLzUrAA0PCHBDOfPa6cndt2trS0AlS1RKiqASQaIEVpSqbtX3YdSga8FZ1FBKHGZW%2FLKPXkB3EWGRA8gF08tTutFhfmisbkbtBorLIi0VnIKo)._
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48249061/357536577/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmFlNzdjMS02ZTBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t9GEnj6PN9CBHymUcA7bfEHJxqFo-KCPA-xiQ96s6ZE=)
Friend, As the January 6th hearings concluded last week, Kevin McCarthy took the opportunity to remind us once again what his _true intentions_ are if Republicans take back the House in November. **First:** McCarthy plans to **strip** anyone who supported or worked on this committee of their assignments and leadership roles in Congress. His scorched-earth revenge campaign will leave Democrats (and cooperative Republicans) with their hands tied. **Then:** With the gavel in his hand, McCarthy and his extremist allies will launch a series of **nonsense investigations** with the sole purpose of discrediting Democratic leaders, riling up the conservative base, and dividing our nation even further. While working families in our community struggle, McCarthy is plotting his revenge tour and paving the way for a Trump comeback. _It's repulsive, and I won't sit by and watch our community suffer. _ **I’m more determined than ever to make sure McCarthy never serves another term in office. But if we're going to stop him from getting the Speaker's gavel, we need to see a wave of grassroots support.**

[**We need your help to keep pace with McCarthy’s special interest, dark money donors. Will you chip in $5 today? I believe we can win this, folks, but only if we all come together in times like these.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48249062/357536578/2034249441?refcode=em-7.24.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmFlNzdjMS02ZTBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t9GEnj6PN9CBHymUcA7bfEHJxqFo-KCPA-xiQ96s6ZE=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48249063/357536579/2034249441?refcode=em-7.24.22-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmFlNzdjMS02ZTBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t9GEnj6PN9CBHymUcA7bfEHJxqFo-KCPA-xiQ96s6ZE=)

Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives. As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy. body:
Ohio Republicans are ignoring the will of the people.
| Team,

A recent Gallup poll states **70% of Americans believe the law should protect the right to same-sex marriage.** A majority among both Democrats _and_ Republicans. Yet, Ohio Republicans are ignoring the will of the people.

Following the ruling on _Roe_ , Justice Clarence Thomas openly stated the court should reconsider the previous ruling on same-sex marriage.

The House debated the Respect For Marriage Act to protect marriage equality. House GOP leadership did not whip its members against this bill, **but Ohio Republican Jim Jordan took it upon himself to urge his colleagues to vote against marriage equality.**

Jordan even incoherently claimed, “This bill is simply the latest installment of the Democrats’ campaign to delegitimize and attempt to intimidate the United States Supreme Court.”

In the end, _**157 House Republicans voted against marriage equality**_ – including eight in Ohio: Troy Balderson, Steve Chabot, Warren Davidson, Bob Gibbs, Bill Johnson, Jim Jordan, Bob Latta, and Brad Wenstrup.

**[We need leaders in power willing to stand up and fight for marriage equality – those ready to move Ohio forward. House GOP leadership did not whip its members against this bill, but Ohio Republican Jim Jordan took it upon himself to urge his colleagues to vote against marriage equality. Jordan even incoherently claimed, “This bill is simply the latest installment of the Democrats’ campaign to delegitimize and attempt to intimidate the United States Supreme Court.” In the end, 157 House Republicans voted against marriage equality – including eight in Ohio: Troy Balderson, Steve Chabot, Warren Davidson, Bob Gibbs, Bill Johnson, Jim Jordan, Bob Latta, and Brad Wenstrup. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you, Ohio Democratic Party The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. We have the chance to flip not only Ohio's open U.S. Senate seat, but to elect a Democratic governor as well. Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio. = | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Brandon Tatum
subject: BLM vs Blexit
body:
[](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d2286c2a44614a9ab768bd4af02a6624&_e=UPt-8L2IUtakmQKGGT56hrKFLYtOlqJld0xV-YfLLRgRP7LsvvP75eiEiTaFewifOOP5g8LgQ2eona-HcxZ8DubJmC4B_WV6f4KCsP6xKcf-r2ACNNAk44F7P0kvlpClHihkUiLNs-3Z8PtHSZ3Ai7KLHqQblgZYtEb1YJCuiPNcBPdZiSmu05TRKNFlzNvqGzmsbkqa1iz94ylyJHs8mWXpxpk6cH2PGMdpdGD9Xzvkp0XjJrLZpWVR70faxma5VM8yIpEUk8z-mm9eflwkGqlKw11UEQBCAPOXjTl0pjMiyPIK8FvcoQn_QJyW1PuhE2y7Gwk4ytDnJgL2bV1TpowPgcDrncy1c_I7ZvuDqsg%3D)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America -_Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you’re thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, “what about them is influential?!”

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren’t, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That’s why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I’ll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d2286c2a44614a9ab768bd4af02a6624&_e=UPt-8L2IUtakmQKGGT56hrKFLYtOlqJld0xV-YfLLRgRP7LsvvP75eiEiTaFewifOOP5g8LgQ2eona-HcxZ8DubJmC4B_WV6f4KCsP6xKcf-r2ACNNAk44F7P0kvlpClHihkUiLNs-3Z8PtHSZ3Aiy21ESP1CfSfHMiKlCOwfalq4BTnfkFsHStbQwKEaGcfSeE0sD6yKpLQpPRVrTdTRPjcngw_UKJqUHTIQRKOyP6LFwW1LoeLu3LB4-uOR2TOlhs6c9428u3L3X2yH3XkkZ2j4IiIuF3ItXNSFnJlCyO2XlquZG_p3kG5cNmF-JuV0yl2ow0v9CKhxnHtVSyITRmBvvpFyu2GuHCx5R8uaM0%3D)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the “Black Lives Matter” organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn’t have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I’m giving back to the Black community to make sure they don’t become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d2286c2a44614a9ab768bd4af02a6624&_e=UPt-8L2IUtakmQKGGT56hrKFLYtOlqJld0xV-YfLLRgRP7LsvvP75eiEiTaFewifOOP5g8LgQ2eona-HcxZ8DubJmC4B_WV6f4KCsP6xKcf-r2ACNNAk44F7P0kvlpClHihkUiLNs-3Z8PtHSZ3Aiyk6GSdnrQ6ENiGza6_Alp-_is-2jN8phiy37m8vLHsPZ2U5afoYoEK4r0w3FgwMUKjqRoq4r16NX1q57lkbyk9AHld6KjsG3PSXcGnJk6GLdZ5sFd30f_X6M4CwuLRDgU-XAlnJB9zIZeq6w86iLvPIVB9wmY9neuQVCpmqKHkKrWXd4QcbhLN8Kuoj0TRKY29c7ui57MSlvgmnMhDuIpg%3D)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here’s how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d2286c2a44614a9ab768bd4af02a6624&_e=UPt-8L2IUtakmQKGGT56hrKFLYtOlqJld0xV-YfLLRgRP7LsvvP75eiEiTaFewifOOP5g8LgQ2eona-HcxZ8DubJmC4B_WV6f4KCsP6xKcf-r2ACNNAk44F7P0kvlpClb3E2VKRwZ7CaKanrkoXCJoVaBukfHLcHyYVe8Fua7sY3sw1CxRCaLsB7AIvgCEEEQAuaAn5yWcS8Ha7Wo5lre9ytvOfbPdBG8GIJh1rpOWFIhBQs9JF-2vbamRS5vD9UNb1g1D1kvbOa9BzIwF2dMrYhCHb3u9chFwkONxe_xzgOvXyFFgEDMNi0DGFvqEYxj0uMqsiETABqg1jdn5xjQWZFTb4g96qPmbW0bp67g04%3D)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d2286c2a44614a9ab768bd4af02a6624&_e=UPt-8L2IUtakmQKGGT56hrKFLYtOlqJld0xV-YfLLRgRP7LsvvP75eiEiTaFewifOOP5g8LgQ2eona-HcxZ8DubJmC4B_WV6f4KCsP6xKcf-r2ACNNAk44F7P0kvlpCllEYrJfC8uE9bST8pMm7WhBB_4mDiQFZbdHX8trBIl3DpCA1LschHs2u5vNqFsx6fPb7vROq1JUU3Dp7KH3oTXrP4h5ASo99BVbZ_W4sGBaC4DSysXQJh7STs61vNZPcVeXxo8oWgTjqv81MgwTqwhy9b72Gn3PEfuM5q9JqJOIUaNrIc_vj8vQronHXATLuISdSEitj_Yip5mlip3LmhDEPUbDWstMdR2PPOLRCd2o0%3D)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

clean_body: Friend, I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America -Black Lives Matter. Now, I know what you’re thinking... What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis? I ask, “what about them is influential?!” This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities? No. They aren’t, but BLM is. BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations. I saw the hypocrisy long ago. That’s why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. BLEXIT is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I’ll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support. How I Started BLEXIT I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans. With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me. This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever. I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM. Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the “Black Lives Matter” organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn’t have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others. Now, I’m giving back to the Black community to make sure they don’t become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes. BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law. BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them. BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character. BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. Here’s how you can help: I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities. This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter. BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today: HOW BLEXIT Works Step One: We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods. Step Two: We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy. We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time. Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses. As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them. Step Three: Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media. BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families. Step Four: We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities. What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a “DO” tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods. Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man. We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods. So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. People ask me, “What does BLEXIT mean?” It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. “If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor.” - Candace Owens We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end. Thank you, Brandon Tatum Co-Founder BLEXIT Foundation Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Team Kelly
subject: Respectfully asking you to make your first donation now that Trump has left Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
If we show up for Mark today, we’ll be one step closer to securing victory in November.
#

Friends —
We’re writing to humbly ask if you’ll make your first donation to Mark Kelly’s campaign today.
Trump just left Arizona, and while he was here, he riled up his MAGA-right base and generated massive support for candidates like Blake Masters. So, we absolutely can’t fall short of our fundraising goals this month. We need your help.
Whether you’re sending $5 or another amount, it adds up quickly when we’re all doing our part.
And that’s how we defeat Trump and our eventual opponent and re-elect Mark Kelly — together.

name: Sherry Gay-Dagnogo
subject: We're Almost at the Finishline... Please join our GOTV Launch Meeting, Sunday, July 24th, 8 p.m.
body:
Happy Saturday, It's been a wonderful 7 months on the campaign trail, and you have helped to make it successful! We are proud that we've been able to run an exemplary grassroots campaign with limited resources, and that's because of diehard supporters like you! However, we need your help these next 10 days to get the word and the vote out.

**The new 13th District includes the following cities:** Allen Park, Ecorse, Dearborn Heights (South), Hamtramck, Highland Park, Harper Woods, All the Grosse Pointes, Lincoln Park, Melvindale, Romulus, River Rouge, Southgate, Taylor, Wayne, Wyandotte, Downtown Detroit, Midtown Detroit, Southwest Detroit, Detroit East of Wyoming.
Ways you can help Team Sherry:
[**Please click here and view and share our 30 " video: **](https://youtu.be/cRSzdE6RR1I) with everyone you know!

I: Phone Banking: No experience is needed. We have skilled team leaders that will get you up and running in no time.

Step 1: Download the MiniVAN app onto your smartphone
iPhone: [https://apps.apple.com/us/app/minivan-touch/id352087547](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/minivan-touch/id352087547)
Android:[https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.voteractivationnetwork.minivan&hl=en_US&gl=US](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.voteractivationnetwork.minivan&hl=en_US&gl=US)
You can watch this video to get a tutorial on how to use the app. [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pa7SENFCntA](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pa7SENFCntA)
Step: 2: Create an ActionID account in order to use the app to canvass. [https://accounts.ngpvan.com/Account/RegisterPublic](https://accounts.ngpvan.com/Account/RegisterPublic)

**Access Our List Here:** [https://www.openvpb.com/vpb_bycode/E07525N-308425](https://www.openvpb.com/vpb_bycode/E07525N-308425)

II: Canvassing helps us connect with voters right where they live. You can join us for a block, or an entire community. Wear comfortable shoes and clothes, and make sure you bring a fully charged phone.
III: Peer to Peer Contact: Contact your friends and family that live in the new 13th District and share Sherry’s message, newsletter, videos and webpage from [www.SherryforCongress.com](http://www.sherryforcongress.com)
IV: Display a Lawn Sign: Show Your Sherry Team Spirit for your neighbors [https://sherryforcongress.com/lawnsign/](https://sherryforcongress.com/lawnsign/)
V: Sign up to volunteer a few hours on Election Day, Tuesday, August 2nd: We need poll workers, drivers, meals delivered and troubleshooting at polls.
VI: Make a Donation at [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sherryforcongress?refcode=web](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sherryforcongress?refcode=web)

Paid Full-Time Positions: Become a Canvasser or Election Day Poll Worker:

We are currently looking for 100 energetic and enthusiastic people to work the polls on behalf of Sherry Gay-Dagnogo for Congress
Canvassers: Hiring Now through August 2nd
Requirements: Must have transportation, like to walk, and talk with a friendly demeanor while sharing Sherry's campaign message and literature to voters throughout the 13th Congressional District.
* Must have a smart phone to input data.
* Benefits: $15 dollars an hour

Poll Workers:
Tuesday, August 2nd, Election Day Poll Workers Requirements:
\- Must be at least 17 years old
\- Be available from 7 am - 8 pm on Election Day
\- Distribute literature and give a brief elevator speech about Sherry
\- Passionate and Motivated
Benefits:
\- $150 stipend
\- continental breakfast, lunch, dinner and snacks
-Apply Here: [https://forms.gle/KhQPc2jdVK4Mb1aQA](https://forms.gle/KhQPc2jdVK4Mb1aQA)

**Zoom Information for Sunday, July 24th, 8 p.m.****
**Member Sherry Gay-Dagnogo, M.Ed. is inviting you to a scheduled Zoom meeting.

Topic: Sherry for Congress GOTV Meeting
Time: Jul 24, 2022 08:00 PM America/Detroit

Join Zoom Meeting
<https://us02web.zoom.us/j/83255431801?pwd=ckdyV0ZGZXBsczRmQ2NhMlpIdTczZz09>

Meeting ID: 832 5543 1801
Passcode: 148793
One tap mobile

name: Presidential Alert
subject: re: a new Gallup poll -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | |
---
**URGENT via Gallup: America’s standing abroad is SOARING thanks to President Biden’s leadership!**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/8427?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220724-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220724-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&akid=5392%2E9716520%2EoWlvcb)
**Now, we need to know where you stand:****Do you approve of President Biden?**

| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/8427?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220724-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220724-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&akid=5392%2E9716520%2EoWlvcb)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/8427?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220724-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220724-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&akid=5392%2E9716520%2EoWlvcb)
---

Team, **President Biden is showing us what real leadership looks like** \-- _and the world is taking notice._

A recent Gallup poll shows that after **_years_** of Trump undermining America's allies abroad, our country's standing in the world is finally SOARING again!

But while President Biden works to secure our nation and democracy, **Republicans are still slamming him and obstructing his agenda at every turn.**

We need to show President Biden that Democrats are standing with him during this pivotal moment -- _but we’re still missing 34 responses from Pennsylvania!_

**Please, lock in your response before midnight:**

**Do you approve of President Biden?**

| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/8427?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220724-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220724-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&akid=5392%2E9716520%2EoWlvcb)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/8427?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220724-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220724-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&akid=5392%2E9716520%2EoWlvcb)
---

Thank you,

Team DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2022-q3?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=5392_9716520_oWlvcb&akid=5392%2E9716520%2EoWlvcb)**.

**[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=5392%2E9716520%2EoWlvcb)** to receive fewer emails. **[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=5392%2E9716520%2EoWlvcb)** to unsubscribe.

name: AlessandraBiaggi.com
subject: Emailing this morning to humbly ask for your $3 contribution
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
We don't want to wake up one month from today — the day after Election Day — and be left wondering if there's anything more we could have done to defeat Sean Patrick Maloney.
#

Friends -
We're emailing this morning to ask for $3. Here are 3 reasons why:
➡️ We're officially less than **1 MONTH** away from Election Day.
➡️ Our opponent outraised us this past fundraising quarter, and has over **$2.5 million** on hand ready to pour into this race.
➡️ Every cent we raise between now and August 23 will go directly toward reaching as many voters as possible so we can win.
The truth is that running for Congress takes a lot of resources, and since Alessandra isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money, we're counting on your support. What do you say?
[**Can you add your $3 contribution to stand with our people-powered campaign today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-july/?refcode=em220724-1-subs&refcode2=940_59515_bPWPhu&akid=940%2E59515%2EbPWPhu)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-july/?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220724-1-subs&refcode2=940.59515.bPWPhu&akid=940%2E59515%2EbPWPhu)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-july/?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em220724-1-subs&refcode2=940.59515.bPWPhu&akid=940%2E59515%2EbPWPhu)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-july/?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em220724-1-subs&refcode2=940.59515.bPWPhu&akid=940%2E59515%2EbPWPhu)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-july/?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220724-1-subs&refcode2=940.59515.bPWPhu&akid=940%2E59515%2EbPWPhu)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-july/?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em220724-1-subs&refcode2=940.59515.bPWPhu&akid=940%2E59515%2EbPWPhu)**
---
****
| **[Or another amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-july/?express_lane=true&refcode=em220724-1-subs&refcode2=940.59515.bPWPhu&akid=940%2E59515%2EbPWPhu)**
---
****
Alessandra has been here before. When she won her race for State Senate in 2018, we were outspent nearly 10-to-1, and outside interests spent millions of dollars to try and stop us.
It didn't work then, and it won't work now — so long as all of us stand together.
We don't want to wake up one month from today — the day after Election Day — and be left wondering if there's anything more we could have done to defeat Sean Patrick Maloney.
That's why we have to ask:
[**Can you add your $3 contribution today? Your support will go immediately toward running our latest ads, expanding our organizing and outreach programs, and talking to as many voters across NY-17 as we possibly can.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-july/?refcode=em220724-1-subs&refcode2=940_59515_bPWPhu&akid=940%2E59515%2EbPWPhu)
31 days to give it everything we've got. Let's leave it all out on the field.
Onward,
Team Biaggi

| **[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-july/?refcode=em220724-1-subs&refcode2=940.59515.bPWPhu&akid=940%2E59515%2EbPWPhu)**
---

name: Team Dunn
subject: 9 days left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Reagan Dunn for
body:
As the Republican candidate most likely to flip the 8th from blue
to red, Reagan is the number one target for Democrats. And he's
also the one to bet on this Primary Election.

Friends -

This is a critical time. Voters
are already submitting their Primary ballots. And Reagan is
facing a continued onslaught of false attacks from both the
incumbent Democrat and - unfortunately - a fellow Republican
candidate.

As the Republican candidate most
likely to flip the 8th from blue to red, Reagan is the number one
target for Democrats. And he's also the one to bet on this
Primary Election.

But we're not taking anything for
granted - and neither should you. With less 9 days left before
voting ends, we need your help to fight back against the attacks
and set the record straight. Will you help us reach more voters
with the facts by contributing $100, $50, or $25 today?

HELP SET THE RECORD
STRAIGHT

Reagan's opponents are lying
about his proven conservative record as a King County
Councilmember. Let's be clear. Reagan has increased police
funding by an average of over $90 million annually since taking
office and opposed more new taxes than any other councilmember.

Reagan is also endorsed by the
Washington Council of Police and Sheriffs, and the King County
Police Officer's Guild. He is the only candidate to ever beat Kim
Schrier in a public poll.

With just 9 days left before the
August 2 voting deadline, can we count on your support?

Flipping the 8th from blue to red
is possible. But Reagan is the only candidate who can do it.

Please consider chipping in to
help us fight back against false attacks.

Thank you,

Team Dunn

DONATE TODAY

To contribute by personal check,
please make checks payable to "Reagan Dunn for Congress" and send
to: Reagan Dunn for Congress - PO Box 1390 - Issaquah, WA 98027

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If we got your name or any information wrong, we apologize. To
update and correct your information, click here. If you would
like to unsubscribe, click here.

Thank you for supporting Reagan
Dunn's campaign for Congress.
Paid for by Reagan Dunn for
Congress

name: Lucinda Schneller, BrittanyPettersen.com
subject: We’re talking about the basics here, Team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
Hey friend, it’s Lucinda, volunteer coordinator for Brittany Pettersen.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48251181/357544851/-4707655?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzViNTMwNC03YTBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0dEGa98a2-1FdOFLVktOJ7Wey0aBql3TfNHaEh6YfyY=&emci=227071e5-e809-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=5c5b5304-7a0b-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=19954364) Hey friend, it’s Lucinda, volunteer coordinator for Brittany Pettersen. Listen, if we’re going to win this toss-up race, and defeat our right-wing, anti-choice opponent, then we need to personally reach out to every single voter between now and November 8th. And it’s my job to make sure that happens — with the help of our incredible grassroots volunteers. But running that kind of operation takes a LOT of resources, Team. We need to account for everything from keeping the lights on in our field offices to buying basic office supplies. [**Any dollar you give to us will go directly toward funding the basics of our field operation. A $5 donation gets us a box of pens for our volunteers. $25 helps us pay for necessities like hand soap and paper towels. $100 helps us keep our cars gassed up as we travel around the district. For all the attention that TV ads and Twitter arguments get, for me personally, the most fun part about campaigns has always been meeting with folks one-on-one and finding out what they’re passionate about.
I know that Brittany feels that way, too — in fact, I’ve worked with her on every race she’s run since her first in 2012. She’s overcome the odds by working her butt off and reaching out to every single voter.
And that’s exactly what we’re going to do between now and November — because that’s what it will take to win this race, defeat the extremists who are targeting this seat, and protect our Democratic majority.
[**Will you help us as we enter the heat of the election season, friend?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48251189/357544859/1751256495?refcode=email_072422_Weretalkingaboutthebasics&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzViNTMwNC03YTBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0dEGa98a2-1FdOFLVktOJ7Wey0aBql3TfNHaEh6YfyY=)

Lucinda Schneller

| | [As the world records _massive_ , **record-breaking** temperatures and climate events, **_the GOP-controlled Supreme Court gutted critical powers of authority for the EPA to battle climate change_**.

body:
The Senate may be a toss-up right now, but there’s still something we can do to swing the odds in our favor.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=699%2E61531%2EvTBVz1)
Hello,
Here’s what the folks at FiveThirtyEight are saying about control of the Senate:
[](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/3517?t=3&akid=699%2E61531%2EvTBVz1)
With Vermont's open seat, Peter’s Senate race is shaping up to be one of the most consequential in the nation—if the GOP flips it, they will certainly regain the majority. We can’t let that happen.
[**We’re just a few weeks away from the primary election. Help Peter take the next step towards keeping Vermont blue with a donation of $5 or more today.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/3518?t=4&akid=699%2E61531%2EvTBVz1)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

name: CharlesBooker.org
subject: Peter, we’re running out of time.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, we’re
running out of time.

Scientists have made it clear that if we don’t take action this year to
reduce greenhouse emissions and address the climate chaos ravaging our
communities — it will be too late to prevent a deadly catastrophe for our
planet.

But Sen. Joe Manchin recently made it clear that he’d rather please his
fossil fuel donors than take action. Manchin officially announced that he
would not support any climate investments this year and has killed the
Senate’s chances of passing a bill.

It’s disappointing, but not surprising as the #1 Senator who receives
donations from the fossil fuel industry. Manchin’s decision is an urgent
reminder why we must elect Charles Booker and elect a leader who will
proudly vote for climate action.

But now, our chances of taking any action this year hinges on President
Biden. He must declare a climate emergency and authorize critical
investments before it’s too late.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/signup/climate-emergency-petition/?source=em20220724&t=1001&akid=2260%2E346206%2E_yAMEI ][IMG]

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/signup/climate-emergency-petition/?source=em20220724&t=1002&akid=2260%2E346206%2E_yAMEI ]Will you add your name right now to urge President Biden to declare a
climate emergency? The future of our planet hinges on our ability to take
action this year before it’s too late to prevent the worst consequences of
the climate crisis.

ADD YOUR NAME

Our so-called leaders in Kentucky, like Mitch McConnell and Rand Paul,
don’t care to be honest with us about what the future holds. They
certainly don’t care to ensure that future generations will have a viable
planet to live on.

They’ve ignored the environmental effects on small farms that are fighting
every day to stay afloat. They’ve ignored coal miners with Black Lung, and
coal communities that have lost vital revenue, and aren’t doing enough to
make sure they aren’t left behind. And the longer they stay in office, the
longer they’ll continue to ignore us and what we need to survive, much
less thrive.

Kentucky is one of the largest coal-producing states in the country, and
our economy has been rocked by the decline of the coal industry. Other
states are in similar positions. We need to build an economy that thrives
on clean, renewable sources of energy — not one that depends on fossil
fuels.

That’s why Charles is proudly fighting this election to pass a Green New
Deal so we can finally address the climate crisis. But before we can get
to work, we can’t waste anymore time: Joe Biden must declare a climate
emergency.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/signup/climate-emergency-petition/?source=em20220724&t=1003&akid=2260%2E346206%2E_yAMEI ]Please, if you have 1 minute to help, add your name right now to our
petition. President Biden must declare a climate emergency and take
immediate action now that the Senate is unable to pass a climate bill this
year.

Together,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220724-2260-footer&t=1004&refcode2=2260_346206__yAMEI&akid=2260%2E346206%2E_yAMEI

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2260%2E346206%2E_yAMEI

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Trudy Busch Valentine
subject: digging through some old photos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate
body:
Motherhood is beautiful, but it should be a choice.
| | |
---
Hi there, Peter. It's Trudy. I was flipping through some old albums the other day, and I found this photo of my mother.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48251899/357547623/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk177-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjEwYTQyMC03YjBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FwxtFI_sdDCQ0pZQ_fMfL_C5TTh7CWbmrZ6JJIHx30M=)
My mom was generous and gentle. She always encouraged me to chase after my dreams, and she instilled in me a duty to serve others. She was a great mom, but I know that it wasn't easy for her to care for all of us kids.
Now that I am a mom myself, I can appreciate even more the difficulties she faced. Make no mistake: I love being a mother. My children have brought immeasurable joy and meaning to my life – and being a Gigi to my sweet grandchildren is just the best! **But being a mother is a lifelong commitment that can be uniquely challenging.**
As a mother, I was fortunate and privileged in so many ways. I became a mother once I had graduated school. I had a supportive and loving husband. I never had to worry about putting food on the table or paying rent. I could just worry about being present for my kids and raising them the best I could.
**But even with all of that, motherhood sure wasn't easy, especially when I lost my husband to cancer and became a single mother to six children overnight.**
You see, being a mother is about putting every one of your kids' needs above your own; it's about comforting them when you are trying to cope with your own grief; it's about making sure you have done all you can to support their dreams; it's about raising them to be kind, loving, happy people.
Motherhood is beautiful, but it should be a choice. **Being thrust into this role and identity when you aren't ready or don't want it is not what is best for women or their babies**. It's wrong, and it has real, painful consequences.
This is why I am so strongly – and proudly – pro-choice. **And I promise you that as your senator, I will do _everything_ that I can to protect our right to choose, defend patient privacy, and codify Roe v. Wade. **This work is so important, Peter, and it would mean the world to me to have your support today. **[So please, can I count on your $5 gift to help send a pro-choice nurse to the Senate? Together, we can restore our reproductive freedoms and win victories for the women who need them most.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48251903/357547632/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk177-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjEwYTQyMC03YjBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FwxtFI_sdDCQ0pZQ_fMfL_C5TTh7CWbmrZ6JJIHx30M=)**

name: Team Fetterman
subject: So, we have some good news and bad news.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Team, we have to talk.
#
Derek,
So we have some good news + bad news for yinz. Let’s start with the good news.
Our campaign has the momentum to win. People know John will fight like hell for us in the Senate, and Dr. Oz won’t. It’s as simple as that. The polls show it, our primary victory across all 67 counties shows it, and the size of our team of grassroots donors (hi, Derek! 👋) shows it.
But, we do have some bad news. We are up against a lot of **$$$**. Dr. Oz’s $, super PAC $, and dark money groups are all pouring into our race to try to buy Pennsylvania.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220724-2?refcode=em20220724-6608&refcode2=6608_434096_1YPivA&akid=6608%2E434096%2E1YPivA)
_Oz HQ, probably_
[**_Our grassroots supporters can outmatch Dr. Oz’s dark money if we work together. That’s why we’re coming to you today, Derek. Can you make a contribution of any amount today so we stay ahead of Dr. Oz?_**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220724-2?refcode=em20220724-6608&refcode2=6608_434096_1YPivA&akid=6608%2E434096%2E1YPivA)
**[MAKE A CONTRIBUTION »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220724-2?refcode=em20220724-6608&refcode2=6608_434096_1YPivA&akid=6608%2E434096%2E1YPivA)**
The power of our team is unmatched. And we’re *so* proud to know that you are on our side + ready to fight for John to be elected this November, Derek.
But we don’t have that much time left. November will be here before we know it — and we need to make sure we have all the resources we need to fund our campaign to victory. Remember, Dr. Oz is self-funding his campaign with the money he made spreading misinformation to people on TV. 🤢
[**_John can win, but he can’t do it alone. We need YOUR support to grow this movement. Your contribution today will go a long way — so we’re asking: can you chip in any amount today to this campaign?_**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220724-2?refcode=em20220724-6608&refcode2=6608_434096_1YPivA&akid=6608%2E434096%2E1YPivA)
We’re ready to win this!!! Thank you for your support,
— Team Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220724-6608-footer&t=1&refcode2=6608_434096_1YPivA&akid=6608%2E434096%2E1YPivA)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=6608%2E434096%2E1YPivA)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=6608%2E434096%2E1YPivA)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

So, will you chip in $25 -- split with Serve America -- to keep our momentum growing and secure a win that no one saw coming?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48252512/357549907/2038802527?refcode=20220724_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjczNWE4Mi03ZDBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ligbTHWoB8l-QqGXFbA3GPdgDfUVnLw-Ck077ei1lhM=) **Poll after poll shows our campaign beating JD Vance.** Even when the experts counted us out, Ohioans continued to show up and support our movement in unprecedented numbers. Now, outlets like FiveThirtyEight have taken notice and changed our race to a toss-up. That’s a BIG deal—and it’s all because of your grassroots support. This shift also means national Republicans and the outside groups funding JD’s campaign are about to ramp up their attacks. **Ohio will decide Senate control, and Republicans are willing to do anything to take down our campaign.** [**That’s why I need your help. clean_body: | | | = BIG update: FiveThirtyEight just ranked Ohio’s Senate race as a “toss-up.” When I entered this race, experts and political pundits said there was no chance we’d flip Ohio blue and defeat whichever right-wing millionaire extremist the GOP nominated. But now we’re a “toss-up”—which means we’ve never been closer to cutting workers in on the deal, putting Ohio first, and winning the race that will decide Senate control. = Poll after poll shows our campaign beating JD Vance. Even when the experts counted us out, Ohioans continued to show up and support our movement in unprecedented numbers. Now, outlets like FiveThirtyEight have taken notice and changed our race to a toss-up. That’s a BIG deal—and it’s all because of your grassroots support. This shift also means national Republicans and the outside groups funding JD’s campaign are about to ramp up their attacks. Ohio will decide Senate control, and Republicans are willing to do anything to take down our campaign. = = Thanks for stepping up, Tim Ryan | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

name: Laura Loomer
subject: 30 Day Contdown!
body:
I've outraised my RINO opponent, Daniel Webster, every fundraising quarter since I announced. I've exposed Webster's chronic absenteeism and is total lack of impact as a member of Congress.
****
| | | **[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/JK0u2QSUOXFyk15hzcMacw/T763yHek28SHIFxOgl0XgYng)**
Patriot,

I've exposed Webster's chronic absenteeism and his total lack of impact as a member of Congress.

I've generated far more media and brought issues to the forefront that **Congress MUST address**.

I've proven through my years of investigative journalism and right-wing activism that I will unfailingly serve voters with enthusiasm and hold our elected officials accountable.

Most importantly, **I will FIGHT against the Communist Left that has infected the halls of Congress and infiltrated our government and major institutions**.

My opponent has done nothing except collect a government salary for 40 years, and for the last 10 years, he's held the title of United States Representative while being nothing but an EMPTY SUIT.

**He 's represented no one during his nearly 40 years in elected office.**

Only 30 days remain until the Florida Republican Primary, **and I need all-hands-on-deck and all boots on the ground to win!**

[Will you make a final push donation today and help me meet my fundraising goal by midnight tonight?](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/JK0u2QSUOXFyk15hzcMacw/T763yHek28SHIFxOgl0XgYng)

We want to have the funds we need to plaster our district with signs and deploy more volunteers to knock on every Republican's door. Thanks so much for all that you do for America.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Joe Shepherd, President of URD
subject: I've been on a "one-road" mind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
Showing up means everything, Peter | | | Hi Peter – You could say I've been on a "one-road" mind for the past couple of weeks. This month, I hit 150,000 miles on my trip to talk to voters all across rural America. I’ve driven from Iowa to Montana all the way to Pennsylvania. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2GcZtdxiOQwxJfkUh_cuApwefQzzfr9qKeTLclhty0AWTpiQBw-KyTdoOn-83dH4cSW25heyL1SpMNUQgRDB_CMPVuf3AT0ztVYYLPJkKZbIW1rgDNoKCpRGkCsb-b7V6sNMI5guw8yh9pwucFaOnYDcfXUQmZSN-X8a_RXdIM-w982hcEczjGu8DO4jm0gTb9vDUKupBebF8xQ6F6pUIBvXzvpvCt7HjwUqwNePHMfjw4-xtkgFjv2GyGkbfrKVOeZGtxT5oTCnCa85vsgRr4TRGaBDTSQZiMW2AU-Z-Gl_DF41SNDv7jJx9YPJUsM-7bR1RRqcBx6NjuXqtO9AAKe4gPmhVmKPdf_sXpiIDHXI48/3o0/uMC_lT9WTD2NHo8y40BSVw/h0/yLYdqJUOP_0JuSJcM4OwoucOFgOLLZEjU6edCLW-LTs) This isn't a summer road trip, and while I love exploring new small towns across the country, I was working alongside Democratic candidates and organizers. **[_Chip in here to support Democrats in rural districts →_](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2GcZtdxiOQwxJfkUh_cuApwefQzzfr9qKeTLclhty0AWTo2c8dhAq_y4G5PsaXuLw7W9z1puPwAsFl18Ax2PQtb4qilXV_9ASqQNBykJyXL9aij1oy2fxOUZ2vDId1sYbTqlflbSRxqKOjovmmmfn_p1rpEtsMXkrJFOljpENKHQ2bxSC1QGp-Aw4sr6gANfGzJkk7WHfwa9oXLGY4nn7pY4ftTMKwflVGCHGVEszM-HgyzzMUAVhQkKyjB_7Ze3rkxY_V109XuwllpNgJpU8wlejrnLdORgzHBYtBpnWl3-lRWIANHnbzuzf_oQLaZA1zPA-ICvlwYIKyZ9Aeji1zZcIr_yQhE76464Ra-nPAeFWY/3o0/uMC_lT9WTD2NHo8y40BSVw/h1/j7sukEkZW5xfkC477hA93L26KwSMapIZxGq0NizoJt0)** We knocked on doors, talked with voters, and marched in campaign rallies and Fourth of July parades. But mainly, we listened. **For a long time now, rural Americans have felt like Democrats left them out of the picture.** At United Rural Democrats, we've set out to change that trend. We're empowering Democratic candidates in rural districts and rebuilding a Democratic organizing infrastructure that will prioritize rural districts. The truth is, our Democratic majority entirely depends on winning in rural America. **[But for Democrats to win back rural America, it’s going to take hard work and years of building trust from town to town. That's why I've driven over 100,000 miles to rural towns across the country. clean_body: Showing up means everything, Peter | | | Hi Peter – You could say I've been on a "one-road" mind for the past couple of weeks. This month, I hit 150,000 miles on my trip to talk to voters all across rural America. I’ve driven from Iowa to Montana all the way to Pennsylvania. This isn't a summer road trip, and while I love exploring new small towns across the country, I was working alongside Democratic candidates and organizers. We knocked on doors, talked with voters, and marched in campaign rallies and Fourth of July parades. But mainly, we listened. For a long time now, rural Americans have felt like Democrats left them out of the picture. At United Rural Democrats, we've set out to change that trend. We're empowering Democratic candidates in rural districts and rebuilding a Democratic organizing infrastructure that will prioritize rural districts. The truth is, our Democratic majority entirely depends on winning in rural America. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: I need your support now more than ever, Peter. – Joe Shepherd United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

Hi Peter, it’s Matt -- Will Rollins’ campaign manager.

As you probably know, midterm elections can be tough for the party holding the majority, and 2022 will be no different. But the good news here is that _Will is in a strong position to flip CA-41_ \-- a critical district for Democrats to win this November.

Needless to say, national Republicans have their sights on this race, and they’re all in on to back our Trump-endorsed opponent Ken Calvert.

**Over the last 30 years, Calvert has had little to show for his tenure except for lining the pockets of his allies. Will believes Congress should be working for the people, and now that we’re in the General Election, Will wants to make sure we’re incorporating the input of Democrats and voters across the district into our gameplan.**

**[Will you take a moment and complete our General Election Priorities Survey, Peter? We’re hoping to hear from at least 14 respondents in your area before the end of the week.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48252685/357550343/-1970491521?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2E4OGJlNy03ZTBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7pV7H8HJcIciz4uQe6FcTTNNYtYc3wguDWXkThqfrm4=&emci=6b6c18ad-7e0b-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=2ca88be7-7e0b-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=12636851)**

name: Leah Cole Allen
subject: Reminder: Strong Leadership in the Corner Office
body:
Read about my Campaign for Lt. Governor
| | | |
---
| Hi Everyone, Geoff Diehl and I have been busy on the trail, but I had time to check in with the Lynn Journal, my hometown newspaper.
"I want to see the government work more efficiently for the people that pay into it and the people that it represents," said Allen. "I want to make sure that we're good stewards of people's tax dollars."
She is confident that Massachusetts voters will support a Diehl-Allen ticket in the election. "I think that Beacon Hill needs a balance," said Allen. "Our state legislature is obviously a super majority of Democrats, and they're getting much more progressive. I think to counteract that, we need strong conservative leadership in the corner office."
Read more here: [Lynn Tech Graduate Leah Cole Allen Seeks Lieutenant Governor's Position - Lynn Journal](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Tml6NM6s716uZWPUrCsNYQIIixC4qXKT0xEqxN7oUhXLiih_5cABKyXVCPYmxx6W41GD3830AbDRjagQM4x8E6-IZXyMoW97GdGThgPZ3hKOK3N29iWhgfp5IwY3j4Vodx-b6fYXiC5y-GC3yrE9a8Wtmue9wMHMcmwxtAkbJs4qMHJCUzC6x99KpYcopXN6FiUxXIP_x6Zx6DzYWhd3qH8LbT7FGZDp_amC0oAtKoUVdVSmdhiSegs4V5zTxJcW2cjAHnmGyyc=&c=WXDGWiQbErE0tMY6b9-dkEHvTXbT8aKjcOrlTGQV1uKHU_CWC6C8VA==&ch=Oswb2_8kMHr3zg8vtQ224vRGrXK-N5iUdqKSaquoW5bD4XSZSZqytQ==)

The front-page article details how the outdoors, our Rio Grande, our public lands, and our outdoor traditions have shaped who Gabe is today.
Though Gabe’s grandfather left behind farmland in central Mexico to seek greater financial security in the industrious Ciudad Juárez, he was a skilled hunter and outdoorsman who passed his love of the outdoors down to Gabe.
He took Gabe and his other grandchildren across the border to New Mexico, an experience Gabe remembers fondly: “We fished under the bridge in Hatch and caught catfish. We played with the box turtles and saw this blanket of stars just take over us at night—stars that I’d never seen before as a kid.”
As Gabe grew up and attended college, he realized he wanted to pursue a career based on his love of the outdoors, not money. He went on to co-found an organization dedicated to passing outdoor traditions down to the next generation and bringing underrepresented youth into nature, and has worked as a conservationist, a staffer in U.S. Senator Martin Heinrich’s office, and a Las Cruces city councilor.
Now, Gabe is running for Congress in New Mexico’s 2nd district, in part because he believes **“The next leaders in making climate change decisions should be as diverse as the people in our country.”**
**[Help us elect a conservation and climate champion to represent NM-02 in Congress this November: chip in $10 or more to support Gabe and flip this toss-up seat blue in just a few months.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48252741/357550492/-1370483914?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220724outdoors_tv_od30_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTM1MzA2Yi03ZjBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y673foAhAFMwWLwDPy0uriX_8duOXOW3OC2ubYePeUY=)**
