name: Team Nikki
subject: Not a good look for Charlie
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,
You’ve probably heard a lot about Thursday’s debate — and Charlie’s team is certainly working overtime trying to clean up the mess he made.
That’s why we want to make sure you caught this moment:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?refcode=724debate4 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?refcode=724debate4]
Charlie didn’t just talk down to Nikki. He wasn’t just condescending and defensive. He literally tried to mansplain abortion rights just weeks after Roe v. Wade was overturned.
A man who proudly called himself “pro-life” THIS YEAR , claimed that he’s better for Florida women than a woman who’s spent her entire life fighting for women’s rights and advocating for reproductive freedom.
We don’t want to be rude here, Peter, but that’s BS.
Florida women don’t need another out-of-touch, pro-life man telling them what to do and using them to score political points. What we need is a proud, pro-choice woman who’s NEVER wavered in the fight for women’s rights.
If you agree, click here to chip in $20 and support Nikki’s fight for Florida women. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?refcode=724debate4]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=724debate4] Express Donate $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=724debate4] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=724debate4] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=724debate4] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=724debate4] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?refcode=724debate4]
No matter how much Charlie tries to rewrite history, facts are facts. Charlie is “pro-life.” Nikki is pro-choice. And only one of them has proven that she can be trusted to fight for our freedoms.
Thank you for standing with us.
— Team Nikki

name: Our Revolution
subject: Hey Dems — do something!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
|
Peter Willis,

The challenges facing our country and our planet are unprecedented, and politicians fail to meet the moment.

Instead of _doing anything,_ establishment Democrats have sat helpless while we backslide into fascism. No more abortion rights, income inequality is exploding, the planet is sweltering, and Trump continues to actively plot to end fair elections..

We fought for Bernie because we believed he was the best candidate to lead us through all of this. He inspired a multi-racial, multi-generational mass movement of working people capable of enacting real progressive changes.

As the corporate wing of the party fights against us, our progressive solutions remain popular — and they’re needed now more than ever. That’s why Our Revolution members are backing candidates like Andy Levin, David Segal and others who will bring the fight to Washington.

**[We can't afford to any more corporate Dems who won't defend our rights against literal fascists. With critical primaries still on the way, can we count on you to pitch in to help us elect progressives who are serious about addressing the crises we face??](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6071?t=8&akid=3181%2E5885482%2E-WIVnG)**
_If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately._ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW »](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6145?refcode=OR_EM_FR_20SP_20220724_1_w&t=9&akid=3181%2E5885482%2E-WIVnG)

| [CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT »](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6061?refcode=OR_EM_FR_20SP_20220724_1_w&t=14&akid=3181%2E5885482%2E-WIVnG)

In this dire time, we have no choice but to keep building and organizing a stronger movement.

**Despair is not an option.** Neither of Bernie's presidential campaigns was ever about him — they were always about all of us. Electoral campaigns are temporary — the only path toward real justice for working people is in long-term mass mobilization and participation in the political process.

[**Bernie founded Our Revolution to outlast his campaigns, and it's our job to beat as many corporate Democrats as possible so that we can actually get things done. Pitch in here if you are with us!** ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6071?t=15&akid=3181%2E5885482%2E-WIVnG)

In solidarity,

Our Revolution

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48262175/357576070/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWMzNWFlMC1hYzBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2MaIsCOJHhnAkvuh0pnjWRELAp6c7zQvMI9jSLW3wPQ=&emci=5f68734b-ab0b-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=9ec35ae0-ac0b-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
Thirty-six years in the Navy gave me a ton of memories. Most are good; some are complex; others are conflicted...
It was early 2005, a stressful time. There were no days off or dinners with family, and I was with the Vice Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, a four-star General.
That night, our meeting at the White House was unexpectedly canceled. There was still a bit of daylight outside, and the General turned to me and said, “How ‘bout that, Franken. We have the evening off...”
I took a quick look at my watch, and it hit me: “I may get out of here in time to see my son play in the orchestra.”
I hadn’t even realized I’d said it aloud until the Vice Chief asked, “Oh, what instrument does he play?”
I’ve always thought of myself as a person with answers. I did my homework, worked hard, and put in the effort to be prepared. But I didn’t know the answer to this simple question about being a father, a doting parent, and one of my children.
I felt guilty, embarrassed, and uttered a weak, “I am not entirely sure,” past the lump in my throat.
I have long-since gotten used to people thanking me for my service – whether it was traveling through an airport in uniform or wearing my Navy hat in the grocery store. **But I always thank service members’ families. Their spouse. Their parents. Their children.**
It was my family who had to ‘get along’ without me. My parents aged during my long absences, then both died before I could tell them thank you. Too many long distance moves were done by Jordan, my wife, alone. And too many school events passed without me even knowing they were happening. My family sacrificed as much as I did for me to be able to serve.
I’m now running for Senate because I know what it means to live a life of service and sacrifice. Too many in Washington have long since forgotten who they work for. I know my opponent Chuck Grassley is one of those people. He’s still clinging to Senate office after more than four decades because he knows nothing else.
My question to Chuck Grassley is this: “Are you running again because that’s what Iowans want or that’s what your big corporate donors demand of you?” If you ask Iowans, they all say it is the latter.
Every poll shows we can win, and the GOP mob is already circling in response. But with your help now, I know we can defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Senate majority.
**We need to raise another $65,000 before our deadline at midnight tomorrow to fight back against all of Mitch McConnell’s Super PAC lies and win, but right now, it looks like we are about to fall short. I need your help now to fend them off and retire Grassley because control of the Senate is at stake.**
[**If you believe as I do that there are still good people running for office, then please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – every dollar you can afford – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48262176/357576071/-42398318?refcode=em20220724pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWMzNWFlMC1hYzBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2MaIsCOJHhnAkvuh0pnjWRELAp6c7zQvMI9jSLW3wPQ=)

My children are now grown. My son no longer plays the viola or any other instrument, but at one time, he was pretty good. I just wasn't there to hear it very often, and barely made the last set that evening, in khakis, standing in the back. As always, duty had called.
Thank you for letting me share this story with you,
Mike Franken, U.S. Navy (ret.)

Every poll shows we can win, and the GOP mob is already circling in response. But with your help now, I know we can defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Senate majority. We need to raise another $65,000 before our deadline at midnight tomorrow to fight back against all of Mitch McConnell’s Super PAC lies and win, but right now, it looks like we are about to fall short. I need your help now to fend them off and retire Grassley because control of the Senate is at stake. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = My children are now grown. My son no longer plays the viola or any other instrument, but at one time, he was pretty good. I just wasn't there to hear it very often, and barely made the last set that evening, in khakis, standing in the back. As always, duty had called. Thank you for letting me share this story with you, Mike Franken, U.S. Navy (ret.) clean_body: [] Peter- We're up with our first ad of the election. Check it out below [] There's too much at stake to leave this election to chance. The security of our democracy, the future of public education, a woman's right to choose – it's all on the ballot this year. Sara Rodriguez is the only pro-choice woman running for Lieutenant Governor. She's working around the clock to win this tough fight so we can keep moving Wisconsin forward. Every donation from our grassroots supporters helps us keep our ad up, and with this race expected to be close, every single person we reach matters. Will you donate $5 or more so we can keep our ad up and reach more voters? We're facing millions in attack ad spending this election and need to stay competitive to win! **In the race that will determine Senate control, I'm neck and neck with Marco Rubio – and top Democrats like Fred Guttenberg have said "we need an advocate like Val Demings, whose strength and integrity is exactly what Florida needs to replace him."**

name: Cheri Beasley HQ
subject: important numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
North Carolina is known for having the most competitive statewide races anywhere in the country
#

Friends — North Carolina is known for having some of the most competitive statewide races anywhere in the country, and the same is true this year. Take a look at these numbers:
**-2.5% to +4%**
Down 2.5 or up by 4. These are the margins in two of latest public polls of North Carolina. Either way, this race is well within the margin of error — making this seat a total toss-up!
**401**
That’s how many votes Cheri’s race for Chief Justice was decided by in 2020. Out of 5,391,501 votes, an incredibly small handful made the difference, and this race is shaping up to be just as close.
**$3**
That’s what we’re asking you to donate today to flip this seat and send Cheri Beasley to the U.S. Senate. What do you say?
[**Please make a $3 donation to Cheri Beasley’s campaign for U.S. Senate right now. In a race that could come down to a handful of votes, every dollar makes a difference.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-july22.kbaN_T&refcode=em220724-2-MA&t=1&akid=1290%2E357359%2E-_PPi4)
We cannot risk coming up short by such a small margin when the votes are counted. We need to do everything we can right now to organize across North Carolina and win. Together.
\- Team Beasley
**[DONATE](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-july22.kbaN_T&refcode=em220724-2-MA&t=2&akid=1290%2E357359%2E-_PPi4)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1290%2E357359%2E-_PPi4). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1290%2E357359%2E-_PPi4). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1290_357359_-_PPi4&akid=1290%2E357359%2E-_PPi4) today to help us make history.

name: Rebecca Parson
subject: [Deadline] Midnight tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebecca for Washington
body:
Asking for your help| | | Hi there, [**At midnight tonight, the fundraising week will close. Tomorrow morning, ActBlue will wire our campaign those funds, and that will determine what we can afford during this last week before the primary. I need to raise $705 before midnight. Can you rush a donation now to help me get there? Thank you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48264579/357585984/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDQyY2JmZC1hZjBiLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SkQD0HZpyAx5HE-zULnJw15IWtUXtsEhoTvUYpxtgAI=) My opponent is in danger. People in my district are learning that he signed a letter supporting Social Security cuts and that he supports a Trump-era Medicare privatization scheme. name: Eric Swalwell
subject: 🤬 are you serious???
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 15th Congressional District. If you no longer wish to receive emails, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/sSRynqGvEUuAD1QP3hBpsA2?unsubscribedata=TSTzaJpsn%2FfaLkjMCxlQK0MsFPtAkgRepN2OtlnmG8uMuhGPB7V3TrBrqLgsQqkNt3icPN7vrN9OfwJxrBGMXuYhaDGBQwk10e44wr1R0hDCyr1bVHLatUNVjlp%2FGaShuWTXX5zyNeKa0NgIN1UkjUXz1x4mTUEntRqYr8nfbtfu0cOEaUmdGp33qHLehaKcVxS0V%2FBBm%2BLKikh6FRbVlx%2BTCi4v%2BK63Dgus7RgF8WGgZ8ntHRvpioOnrJjlgPVHDHbEkK%2FbEz4LM%2BGDzXJOKwn0IF2UcUP3U8pD0m6myEZJ4vL6NE65I%2BS97tcSphKNBvKdf3lw1wuVHVLo2WexdDitEHIXM4IqgKWGNxMF7VR%2FFa5pO8jYnVMGI7XrMMz1U4wNSxTw16CEW%2F5SDn8rvv8TFTh04Oh8U55%2FJsBRMfA%3D .

Team,

I am absolutely livid. It’s 2022. And Republicans still want to litigate gay marriage. I don’t know if they got the memo, but we’ve moved on. This is a country with gay married couples. It’s 2022, and the world is not the same place they remember from 1965.

It’s time to move on.

I refuse to dignify this debate with any kind of reasoning or “policy” response. It’s really as simple as people being able to love who they love, with dignity and acceptance from their government.

CONTRIBUTE NOW and help me get these ridiculous anti-marriage (????) Republicans out of Congress >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-15-Email-July2022-FR-July?refcode=E17137-20220722-MarriageEquality2-SL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15]

Republicans are just homophobic. There’s nothing behind their stances, just bitterness and bigotry. I don’t care anymore, I’m willing to say it: the GOP is the party of homophobes.

Clearly, we need to get this party out of Congress as quickly as humanly possible. All they do is pine for the grand old times when gay marriage was illegal, segregation was considered constitutional, and women were seen and not heard. It’s disgusting. Help me get them out of Congress now: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-15-Email-July2022-FR-July?refcode=E17137-20220722-MarriageEquality2-SL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15]

Thanks team,

—Eric

name: Chris Evans, Beto for Texas
subject: Sharing a few photos from the road
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

Hey — it's
Chris.

I'm writing you from the back seat of the truck as Beto continues our
49-day drive to over 75 communities across Texas. We kicked off this Drive
for Texas in El Paso on Tuesday night, and the response so far has been
incredible.

In a minute, I'm going to explain more about our Drive for Texas. But
funding this many events across Texas takes a huge amount of resources, so
I have to ask: [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220724-2._V_Fc-&refcode=ema20220724-199911&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=199911%2E444211%2ERwsL2O ]If you're able, will you pitch in any amount now to help
us fund over 5,600 miles of travel to reach voters throughout this state?

Conventional wisdom says political candidates shouldn't go to areas that
traditionally vote for the other party. That's why Beto’s campaign is
different — we're going everywhere and talking to everyone.

Take Thursday for example: We started the day knocking on doors in Snyder
— a historically Republican stronghold with a population of just over
11,200. As we talked with voters at their doors, we kept hearing about the
importance of quality education, accessible health care, and new jobs.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220724-2._V_Fc-&refcode=ema20220724-199911&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=199911%2E444211%2ERwsL2O ]Photo of Beto chatting with a voter

After block walking, we headed to the County Library for a town-hall
discussion with Democrats, Republicans, and Independents alike — many of
whom said they've never seen a political candidate come to Snyder before.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220724-2._V_Fc-&refcode=ema20220724-199911&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=199911%2E444211%2ERwsL2O ]Town-hall discussion in Snyder

We finished off the day with a thousand people in Lubbock — the biggest
crowd we've seen there since launching this campaign! Beto took time to
hear voters' concerns and shared his plan to deliver for rural Texas.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220724-2._V_Fc-&refcode=ema20220724-199911&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=199911%2E444211%2ERwsL2O ]Town-hall discussion in Lubbock

The communities we're going to on this drive have been taken for granted
by Greg Abbott for too long, but Beto is showing up for every single one
of them. If we keep this up, Abbott's going to be in for a real surprise
on election night when we do better in rural Texas than any Democrat has
done in decades.

But whether or not we overtake Abbott all depends on having the resources
to build the largest organizing program Texas has ever seen before.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220724-2._V_Fc-&refcode=ema20220724-199911&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=199911%2E444211%2ERwsL2O ]Beto is giving this
race his all, but he needs to know we have his back. Please, chip in
$3 or more now to fund our upcoming travel and play a key
role in this campaign to defeat Greg Abbott.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220724-2._V_Fc-&refcode=ema20220724-199911&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=199911%2E444211%2ERwsL2O ]Donate Now »

Thanks for being a part of this,

Chris Evans
Communications Director, Beto for Texas

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=199911%2E444211%2ERwsL2O

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: Can you join me for a Zoom tonight?
body:
| Hi Friend -- Since it was such a big success last month, I'd like us to come together tonight via Zoom to focus on the importance of the oaths our leaders swear and the duty they have to defend our constitution and protect our institutions. We will reflect on the latest January 6th hearing I led, discuss the exciting work happening on the ground in Michigan, debut a new video, and host breakout sessions for us all to meet other reasonable people of goodwill from around the country. **It's tonight, Sunday, July 24th at 8pm ET / 7pm CT / 6pm MT / 5pm PT.** [**Click here to get the Zoom link.**](https://www.country1st.com/oath_campfire?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oath_campfire_followup_1_2&n=1) I know it's last minute, but I hope you can make it! Country First, Adam
---

To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.country1st.com/unsubscribe?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oath_campfire_followup_1_2&n=2).

Raphael Warnock, D-Ga., had $15 million more in his campaign account on June 30 than his opponent. Fellow American, This is our opponent - the $15 million dollar man. Senator Raphael Warnock is the Democrat Party's most successful fundraiser. He has voted with Joe Biden 96% of the time, so far-Left donors across the country are showering him with donations to thank him for his loyalty to the party. Senator Warnock is using those millions to attack me with non-stop ads. A new poll released by President Trump's pollster showed me trailing Senator Warnock by THREE POINTS, so it's critical that we respond and set the record straight. I spent my football career competing in and winning big showdowns, so I'm ready to win this race - which is the biggest and most important challenge in my life. Senator Warnock spent $12 million attacking me last quarter and STILL has another $22 million in the bank to fund even more attacks. It's absolutely critical that we fight back IMMEDIATELY! name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Emboldened Republican Attorneys General will do anything to end abortion access … and they might get away with it. The Democratic Attorneys General Association thinks it should cost them their jobs.
body:
Republican state AGs are going wild on abortion rights
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, it’s our worst nightmare coming true: Republican state attorneys general are coming after abortion rights using every trick in the book. We don’t have to let them get away with it. **[Will you join me in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to the Democratic Attorneys General Association?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta4b6bc4b-203d-48b6-824e-c9cb6793560a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **State Attorneys General are our last line of defense against creeping fascism, including state control over women’s bodies.** Right Wing Arizona AG Mark Brnovich---Republican, of course--is petitioning an Arizona court to allow an abortion ban from 1901 to go into effect, banning abortion for every woman in Arizona, except when her life is at risk. Women who will suffer bodily trauma from pregnancies with severe complications, 10 yr old rape victims, 12 yr olds molested by a member of the family, **_this soulless cretin wants to force every one of them to give control of their bodies, mental health, economic well-being--THEIR LIVES, to the state. _** Luckily, we have just the answer for Brnovich's evil, electing Kris Mayes the next Arizona Attorney General, a dedicated public servant who has won statewide office in Arizona in the past and, most importantly, an abortion rights fighter who will ensure that office is occupied by someone who will _always_ protect the right to choose. Sadly, the story in Arizona is not unique. **_In Ohio, Attorney General David Yost called the 10 yr old girl who was raped and, in a what became a national story, had to flee to Indiana to get an abortion, a "liar." _**This craven zealot said a 10 yr old girl just made it up...until the rapist was arrested in Columbus and Yost had to retreat to the safety of (for once) shutting up.
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: DEMOCRATIC ATTORNEYS GENERAL ASSOCIATION](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tda58295f-1ed3-4e37-bbfb-03b54990645a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_The Democratic Attorneys General Association takes on the Yosts and Brnovichs in every state across the country, electing Democrats like Kris Mays who will protect our control over our bodies, our right to vote, our right to breathe air that doesn't give us cancer and many other things we don't even think about._** **_We must help them prevent Republicans from rigging our elections, taking over women's bodies and handing out AR-15s to criminals and terrorists wihtout so much as a background check._** **[Will you join me in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to the Democratic Attorneys General Association?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T64396f1e-97a1-48dc-9294-3f099bad575f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** Thank you so much for protecting our democracy and our bodily autonomy. Cliff

Fellow American - There's no other way to say it ... **this is an emergency.**

We're being outraised by Senator Raphael Warnock by millions, and it's allowed him to run a barrage of misleading attack ads against us. To make matters worse - _**a new poll shows Senator Warnock is now leading slightly.**_

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs are flooding the airwaves in Georgia. body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Friend —
It's Robijn, Kirsten's campaign manager, and I wanted to give you an update on our race.
The good news: Kirsten is doing GREAT. Her message truly connects with voters, and we have incredible momentum going into our primary — which is just a week and a half away.
The not-as-good news: this is THE most competitive district in Arizona. Since day one, Kirsten has run this race with small-dollar contributions, not big-money out-of-state interests. Eighty-five percent of the support we've had came from Arizonans from every corner of our state. But now, outside money is POURING into her opponent's pockets.
With Kirsten locked in a dead heat with her opponent, we need all the support we can get.
Every dollar makes a difference. Will you chip in before our end-of-month deadline in a week? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_072422_EOM_A]
Thank you!
-- Robijn van Giesen
Campaign Manager for Engel for Arizona

clean_body: [] Friend — It's Robijn, Kirsten's campaign manager, and I wanted to give you an update on our race. The good news: Kirsten is doing GREAT. Her message truly connects with voters, and we have incredible momentum going into our primary — which is just a week and a half away. The not-as-good news: this is THE most competitive district in Arizona. Since day one, Kirsten has run this race with small-dollar contributions, not big-money out-of-state interests. Eighty-five percent of the support we've had came from Arizonans from every corner of our state. But now, outside money is POURING into her opponent's pockets. With Kirsten locked in a dead heat with her opponent, we need all the support we can get. Every dollar makes a difference. Will you chip in before our end-of-month deadline in a week? [] Thank you! -- Robijn van Giesen Campaign Manager for Engel for Arizona [] [] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a State Legislator who has spent the past 5 years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer. She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District. Will you help her fight for Arizona by chipping in now? name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: White House insults activists
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, folks who
support abortion rights from every wing of the Democratic Party have
rightly criticized President Biden’s lackluster response to the Supreme
Court overturning Roe v. Wade. What does the administration do in
response? It pretends that progressive activists are the only ones calling
them out.

This is what the White House Communications Director said in the
Washington Post: "Joe Biden’s goal in responding to Dobbs is not to
satisfy some activists who have been consistently out of step with the
mainstream of the Democratic Party. It’s to deliver help to women who are
in danger and assemble a broad-based coalition to defend a woman’s right
to choose now, just as he assembled such a coalition to win during the
2020 campaign."

Peter, those words
are insulting for a number of reasons. First, Pres. Biden responding in
full to secure abortion rights is a concern of all people who care about
health care and reproductive rights in this country, not just activists.
Second, activists were a major part of the coalition that helped elect
Biden in 2020.

This is not a winning message in a midterm election year. The mainstream
Democratic Party cannot take action to protect our rights, fight climate
change, and guarantee the health and safety of all people in this country
when it’s too busy attacking progressives.

Justice Democrats is fighting back. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/112290?refcode=em20220724-24427&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=24427%2E1203867%2Ehl9eat ]Peter,
can you donate $3 to help
us elect leaders who will FIGHT unequivocally for the people? We are
nearing primaries where we must lift Cori Bush, Rashida Tlaib, and Jamaal
Bowman to victory. We need their fight, their activism, and their advocacy
for us in Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/112290?refcode=em20220724-24427&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=24427%2E1203867%2Ehl9eat ]Contribute

We can’t just vote our way out of a broken status quo in November. Because
solving the crises of our day will require organizing, fighting, and
electing BETTER Democrats — not just the same old Democrats.

Nancy Pelosi supported anti-choice Democrat Henry Cuellar in a primary
against pro-choice progressive Justice Democrat Jessica Cisneros. And in
the face of the Supreme Court overturning Roe v. Wade, Biden took weeks to
issue an executive order on abortion access and it’s still not enough.
Now, the White House is trying to blame activists for criticism of Biden’s
lackluster action.

How can the Democratic establishment expect us to fight for a party that
criticizes activists, scapegoats progressives, and tries to stop young
progressive women of color from representing the people in Congress
instead of corporate donors?

We will always fight back against a corporate-backed Democratic Party
trying to sell us on the status quo. The status quo isn’t enough, and it’s
well past time that we transform the Party and see transformative change
in this country.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/112290?refcode=em20220724-24427&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=24427%2E1203867%2Ehl9eat ]Donate $3 right now to help us stand up for our
progressive fight and elect leaders who will fight for us. We’re up
against a Democratic establishment with unlimited funds from corporate
Super PACs and Wall Street mega-donors.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/112290?refcode=em20220724-24427&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=24427%2E1203867%2Ehl9eat ]Contribute

We will continue our activism, no matter what the Democratic establishment
thinks.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220724-24427-footer&t=1025&refcode2=24427_1203867_hl9eat&akid=24427%2E1203867%2Ehl9eat

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Chris Hayes said WHAT?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Did you catch this earlier on MSNBC?
#
Derek,
If there is one thing we know, it’s that John’s trolling game is unmatched.
Even MSNBC’s Chris Hayes took notice. 👇
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220724-1?refcode=em20220724-6627&refcode2=6627_434096_qqKtcw&akid=6627%2E434096%2EqqKtcw)
**"This is just the latest in Fetterman's unceasing campaign to clobber his opponent who again, has no reason to be the Senator for Pennsylvania." – Chris Hayes, MSNBC**
The thing is though, Dr. Oz makes it too easy. Shooting a campaign ad from his NJ mansion, posing with cheesesteaks at Geno’s, misspelling his “hometown”... it’s almost as though Dr. Oz is <checks notes> **not even from PA!!!**
Memes aside, Dr. Oz has no place representing the Commonwealth in the U.S. Senate. He thinks he can come here with the million$ he made on scams and lies f to buy this seat. John — and all of us — are not going to let that happen.
[**_To outmatch Dr. Oz’s spending, we’re relying on our grassroots supporters to help us raise what we need to remain competitive. So we’re asking you: Can you make a contribution today so we can send Dr. Oz a strong message that PA is not for sale?_**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220724-1?refcode=em20220724-6627&refcode2=6627_434096_qqKtcw&akid=6627%2E434096%2EqqKtcw)
**[MAKE A CONTRIBUTION »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220724-1?refcode=em20220724-6627&refcode2=6627_434096_qqKtcw&akid=6627%2E434096%2EqqKtcw)**
__
Let’s do this,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220724-6627-footer&t=1&refcode2=6627_434096_qqKtcw&akid=6627%2E434096%2EqqKtcw)**

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Will you support Ted Budd, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate
body:
|
---
Friend,

Republicans have the momentum to retake the Senate in 2022, but Democrats are spending millions to try and stop us.

That means we have to make sure we keep all of our Republican seats. If we lose even one, it could throw off our entire mission.

That’s why I’m standing with conservative Ted Budd, and I’m proud to endorse Ted Budd for Senate.

[**Will you chip in $24 to help elect Ted Budd in North Let me tell you a little bit about Ted:

Ted Budd is a dedicated husband and father, and small businessman. He learned the values of hard work, family, and faith growing up on his family’s farm. It’s the same farm he’s raising his kids on today.

Budd believes that we live in the greatest nation in the world, and we must protect our hard-working families from the liberal agenda.

And quite frankly..._I agree with him_.

He is exactly who we need in the Senate to stand up for conservative values to ensure that future generations have the same opportunities you and I have been blessed with. You can be sure he’ll defend our freedoms in Washington.

[**That’s why I’m asking you to donate $24 today to help Ted Budd get elected in North Carolina.**](http://links.tedbudd.co/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=56c60c241b2e4ed3b13a5fa030a7c763&_e=6rRu01H9Bz6SaEva_wLnXL-d5ZfMDbQS6dzTTSGxsEY-JqSIqKuIxfwYIy0k548tRjbA50nT7FJHVqa-HhfC_P6SM3ald5mMnNi-ULy4G1rZVFGEX4XtzyFehwXNDg_S65cQicUlWl376DEgwcdHUOX4L8CHZzS3p8-f9B7vL5XRT-WpJJo64y2u3WF3cqwzr6BoorZ7mtsYHPhs9f-tEBVmgEsJlDwzD1rfIXlj7GWh10yian1Stv2FESMryBUPh9gb5w3dabjtt9GHpCcIPbXQJg_YVUyMGzYSDkjOCLF_w1DR3vQZgeBli1vBHhv_vhOqnNmfXJTEVRWzUytIBWkz453zLUhCuGRP4C9O3yrI0KBz1k7YjRDqr-OqrllsG2Zk1efZQEPbbN5PLplB9rTcgTgisW4qZw_ZfWpPlT9ltVZw2gRmA-k1dkQmsCtS92ge4bpdQgePbBqt9G4tvD6QMo2-k-9ibG4utLGufxdHwZNwNtBsNPJOq5OsLzMMRhdoYeOKPKhr_vN1hnB36W8rWCNCFHjJaX61NM6niuo%3D) [**Contribute Now**](http://links.tedbudd.co/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=56c60c241b2e4ed3b13a5fa030a7c763&_e=6rRu01H9Bz6SaEva_wLnXL-d5ZfMDbQS6dzTTSGxsEY-JqSIqKuIxfwYIy0k548tRjbA50nT7FJHVqa-HhfC_P6SM3ald5mMnNi-ULy4G1rZVFGEX4XtzyFehwXNDg_S65cQicUlWl376DEgwcdHUOX4L8CHZzS3p8-f9B7vL5XRT-WpJJo64y2u3WF3cqwzr6BoorZ7mtsYHPhs9f-tEBVmgEsJlDwzD1rfIXlj7GWh10yian1Stv2FESMryBUPh9gb5w3dabjtt9GHpCcIPbXQJg_YVUyMGzYSDkjOCLE_9y6_38VZJ299vMVhJAa4yWT0Ddk2Cg5wXQIqAH9ef6gDq_hqqITNZwflhlzBQZjAni94Sd1TqN_Pifo2TuRXiYOG7P_t4rsSpJiwFyjNzZnjBAPKUaGAY3Nte2VFQr-MbJxgS0y3gO3b5MvEZvCnhGFrmRWL3O2Y_bgRmJEFRpzagEldmrosc2bWkzLMNjLA-TA0AfYc__BL4466WHs4PIzC-D-uLXbftwlQAsTBig%3D%3D)
---

I believe every single vote matters...and I also know every single dollar matters.

Your financial support today will play an important role in helping Ted Budd win the Senate seat and keep North Carolina in Republican hands.

Every dollar is key in funding get-out-the-vote efforts, ad buys, and everything else needed to get Ted Budd’s message out to voters.

[**Your donation is so important to electing Ted Budd, so please join me in standing with him today.**](http://links.tedbudd.co/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=56c60c241b2e4ed3b13a5fa030a7c763&_e=6rRu01H9Bz6SaEva_wLnXL-d5ZfMDbQS6dzTTSGxsEY-JqSIqKuIxfwYIy0k548tRjbA50nT7FJHVqa-HhfC_P6SM3ald5mMnNi-ULy4G1rZVFGEX4XtzyFehwXNDg_S65cQicUlWl376DEgwcdHUOX4L8CHZzS3p8-f9B7vL5XRT-WpJJo64y2u3WF3cqwzr6BoorZ7mtsYHPhs9f-tEBVmgEsJlDwzD1rfIXlj7GWh10yian1Stv2FESMryBUPh9gb5w3dabjtt9GHpCcIPbXQJg_YVUyMGzYSDkjOCLE_9y6_38VZJ299vMVhJAa4v4VgX6jtOsoUvqRR0U2Df5DiO_y8QuHQ-3Vy8kVIGRr77LLlxleydh7mXF32H7ULSiuqQzaZdzS1Uf2Ffot50_NBbe_IIlqq6Y8MFBeJGu3tFNDD0mlb8kpoaa3z24t36XpB8A8-fc2tAlukC8vcfnKaraPB4-FF9RpKmpZzYBvD5cWc8I9ofj8UQfqj00TFDsyF3yAfcYNTL04RlyKx8Q%3D%3D)

I know he’ll work to protect conservative values every day he serves in the Senate.

Thank you for your support.

My very best,

[](http://links.tedbudd.co/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=56c60c241b2e4ed3b13a5fa030a7c763&_e=6rRu01H9Bz6SaEva_wLnXL-d5ZfMDbQS6dzTTSGxsEY-JqSIqKuIxfwYIy0k548tRjbA50nT7FJHVqa-HhfC_P6SM3ald5mMnNi-ULy4G1rZVFGEX4XtzyFehwXNDg_S65cQicUlWl376DEgwcdHUOX4L8CHZzS3p8-f9B7vL5XRT-WpJJo64y2u3WF3cqwzr6BoorZ7mtsYHPhs9f-tEBVmgEsJlDwzD1rfIXlj7GWh10yian1Stv2FESMryBUPh9gb5w3dabjtt9GHpCcIPbXQJg_YVUyMGzYSDkjOCLE_9y6_38VZJ299vMVhJAa4CD1_KfRFnhguAVsaFyIyiy0Pp-mfmqMBPVDhAHxXMYUIBmbwYXArb0KSVAhy_Ox2Ev2XumuxmhoJBBptKjsjxQ8NQeH6TJqlu5FkDTXp0mJVuSu9E68CJpucRy-87QzsTSfKyd74kpEJmb3uLZpldZpR2k7URV3xS4pCawmFjNiSjlq5c82qTfs2Egc3GFGFidBTNzLwljQT4KHYCyxjeg%3D%3D)

clean_body: | Friend, Republicans have the momentum to retake the Senate in 2022, but Democrats are spending millions to try and stop us. That means we have to make sure we keep all of our Republican seats. If we lose even one, it could throw off our entire mission. That’s why I’m standing with conservative Ted Budd, and I’m proud to endorse Ted Budd for Senate. | Let me tell you a little bit about Ted: Ted Budd is a dedicated husband and father, and small businessman. He learned the values of hard work, family, and faith growing up on his family’s farm. It’s the same farm he’s raising his kids on today. Budd believes that we live in the greatest nation in the world, and we must protect our hard-working families from the liberal agenda. And quite frankly...I agree with him. He is exactly who we need in the Senate to stand up for conservative values to ensure that future generations have the same opportunities you and I have been blessed with. You can be sure he’ll defend our freedoms in Washington. I believe every single vote matters...and I also know every single dollar matters. Your financial support today will play an important role in helping Ted Budd win the Senate seat and keep North Carolina in Republican hands. Every dollar is key in funding get-out-the-vote efforts, ad buys, and everything else needed to get Ted Budd’s message out to voters. I know he’ll work to protect conservative values every day he serves in the Senate. Thank you for your support. My very best, Nikki R. subject: I never thought I’d get a high school diploma

body:
When I dropped out of high school at the age of 17, my parents said, “If you’re going to stop going to school, you got to start going to work.”| | | [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=2b69ec4aff2a430b96850967a22e30ba&_t=Mz5UNUoBpPBlFVboM5UVMdF-bGdjGZK_2cD7jViK_aFj7kNiD4JMwUpA9fqI4Y7yTBpebUgNx1xZyX9g-IMkoOSCaAZfGMCclZOH9AQd_m4_k1zSJ2Yr75CFNCWn2DBWfkprWgcfO2JTudLNqU6DW8c0jM3iiS-G_FHq5yGw-lE%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=2b69ec4aff2a430b96850967a22e30ba&_t=Mz5UNUoBpPBlFVboM5UVMdF-bGdjGZK_2cD7jViK_aFj7kNiD4JMwUpA9fqI4Y7yTBpebUgNx1xZyX9g-IMkoOSCaAZfGMCclZOH9AQd_m4_k1zSJ2Yr75CFNCWn2DBWfkprWgcfO2JTudLNqU6DW8c0jM3iiS-G_FHq5yGw-lE%3D)

[ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2b69ec4aff2a430b96850967a22e30ba&_e=HztAtlWo76A4BdA2HSmTcKDzHDmX1qxcFrwIcFxeo9Mn9TY6doLdjhZZqPlpoxIZC_fCyb6EmqvdA6CiyP6GnXQOr8xrQqb2QraA-shmN4wih9VtZ2HEa4D89bYYNvxMm-gMp9fiEp5F2yTu1RGFZUXUmFbej95_H5NL4X1uNzXkBD3sHcLw92uA7D0sHwY06M_Kz3edfhK_-4VzLegfpMxHHzm5NxaqhpyvsZ-hiUc5RJBZhiqKH-gekfJD7aVyfW1E3N5REZ9okryc85MHkvDXekjED4vluibHvOh7dDSfWq7ca88kxCrvuaiRFwCEt17nNVGM14Bof73VW1OivYl67YipsXi1Y4kDlAvGT0nAnQ7OGiyvp2DywnN_ieBYvNmMDZJ-fihRdeGf28bdhFcAlCEY0PpsZK-SuZIcK-JrTbB-GtjGyWAS_F7OUs8dxeknx_eR8ZNixTPbnJvB5w%3D%3D)

| | Peter,

When I dropped out of high school at the age of 17, my parents said, “If you're going to stop going to school, you got to start going to work.”

_I immediately got a job and started waitressing at Waffle House._

In my years since then, I've worked a lot of jobs and worn a lot of different hats – author, business-owner, waitress, marketer, commercial real-estate agent, mother, and now I serve as the Congresswoman for South Carolina's first district. **But I'll never forget the lessons I learned at my first job: work hard, do right by others, listen more than you talk, and never stop fighting for what you believe in.**

If we haven't met yet, [**I'm Nancy Mace**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2b69ec4aff2a430b96850967a22e30ba&_e=HztAtlWo76A4BdA2HSmTcKDzHDmX1qxcFrwIcFxeo9Mn9TY6doLdjhZZqPlpoxIZC_fCyb6EmqvdA6CiyP6GnXQOr8xrQqb2QraA-shmN4wih9VtZ2HEa4D89bYYNvxMm-gMp9fiEp5F2yTu1RGFZUXUmFbej95_H5NL4X1uNzXkBD3sHcLw92uA7D0sHwY06M_Kz3edfhK_-4VzLegfpMxHHzm5NxaqhpyvsZ-hiUc5RJBZhiqKH-gekfJD7aVy-LmZz6VUX6HQKnWJbY3_qWv8qSd37XWE0eer-PTOKvvxl3gC2BULCemQW0QVxS4P5GiEdN9BisRD-7Pd78mjVuoyl5tBFmy-oCgBfZBLEjJ_l1r4X2MaAUzUs33lXhsXqxrTWmYxd3Q5MqwNr9Dk65BiNLgJbpT6ggkf_u4nMVNQbPFxoy0lzrIyhgwokfK4SYTxOLW-xTOW3EOrHMIhVg%3D%3D). I'm a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America!

I don't have your typical run of the mill story because I'm not your typical Congresswoman. I ran for Congress because someone had to stand up and fight to protect the freedoms we have in our country and to serve the people of South Carolina.

In 2020, we took this seat back from the Democrats and now, we are fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red.

**I'm extremely proud of the work we've accomplished, but there's still so much to do. So, I want to make sure you are still on my team as[we continue on the path to re-election](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2b69ec4aff2a430b96850967a22e30ba&_e=HztAtlWo76A4BdA2HSmTcKDzHDmX1qxcFrwIcFxeo9Mn9TY6doLdjhZZqPlpoxIZC_fCyb6EmqvdA6CiyP6GnXQOr8xrQqb2QraA-shmN4wih9VtZ2HEa4D89bYYNvxMm-gMp9fiEp5F2yTu1RGFZUXUmFbej95_H5NL4X1uNzXkBD3sHcLw92uA7D0sHwY06M_Kz3edfhK_-4VzLegfpMxHHzm5NxaqhpyvsZ-hiUc5RJBZhiqKH-gekfJD7aVyV1nAPphJRBzPhN7D-99dhbdWpLK4CrzDmyyVbNEFh1JSOtzN4j3biZgipbEhMp0QQeM61mofs4Nbss78Rf8V-CD3bNeJn2Kc89ecTY0DX92v9TKMUMGu8qLuOh7Rr0KxA3vyfOM4UQJkvS1naAeQ1PEaFAbiDbzZf-odqLHMeNLhJCd9R5Hm06Km_O88YpflWkUcJ2tZXodVRksIcassjQ%3D%3D).**

[**Will you chip in whatever you can – whether it's $75, $50, or $10, so that I can win this race and restore our country.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2b69ec4aff2a430b96850967a22e30ba&_e=HztAtlWo76A4BdA2HSmTcKDzHDmX1qxcFrwIcFxeo9Mn9TY6doLdjhZZqPlpoxIZC_fCyb6EmqvdA6CiyP6GnXQOr8xrQqb2QraA-shmN4wih9VtZ2HEa4D89bYYNvxMm-gMp9fiEp5F2yTu1RGFZUXUmFbej95_H5NL4X1uNzXkBD3sHcLw92uA7D0sHwY06M_Kz3edfhK_-4VzLegfpMxHHzm5NxaqhpyvsZ-hiUc5RJBZhiqKH-gekfJD7aVypQ7x_xdsLYabtwlIcqSrssVKX8PmmfXkb_rfB7qjXvST0FayUTz2NJdVTeXHJ5uLP6du2SP3LnoTIPz9guIzdHXE-zJFefBCmVaoh-ifqG7JQqzn3XWYmh6I9IdXCZvjvg8e6GFNbookPK6e_e1-OEHIHSnQ8bU2dFdTLPvfdhUYryrIuZufiz-UB7rSCaByCpXHhTlkQ2bdjSHtteDjQA%3D%3D)

[ ** Chip In ➞ **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2b69ec4aff2a430b96850967a22e30ba&_e=HztAtlWo76A4BdA2HSmTcKDzHDmX1qxcFrwIcFxeo9Mn9TY6doLdjhZZqPlpoxIZC_fCyb6EmqvdA6CiyP6GnXQOr8xrQqb2QraA-shmN4wih9VtZ2HEa4D89bYYNvxMm-gMp9fiEp5F2yTu1RGFZUXUmFbej95_H5NL4X1uNzXkBD3sHcLw92uA7D0sHwY06M_Kz3edfhK_-4VzLegfpMxHHzm5NxaqhpyvsZ-hiUc5RJBZhiqKH-gekfJD7aVysuLwcTdV1S2kcNyybxqyRquttoL4vJiTpRMZdcwla9cUJMWzJh6AHkdc8lCQ4ImzSwxbHSdwE6aj9TvJniLfwaoJMqEKxmHS6NuoTSxFAepsQD_4TXTy26lE-k8qLJDQFvwabFiFAv6LN5N0x5QRcr6tc1Pcv9m9OaPrJsu57hB4Qvop5Mwn1Wgs-DmNOatzqXm-Rl5JT52u9lmbOpZAhQ%3D%3D)

There was a time in my life when I never thought I'd get a high school diploma, _let alone graduate from The Citadel, one day start a company, and now serve in Congress._

I made a promise to myself when I won two years ago that I would be fiscally conservative; I would be an independent voice and I wouldn't toe the party line especially when Republicans spent too much and taxed too much.

I'm proud of my conservative record and I'm proud of delivering results day in and day out for the Lowcountry. I'm proud I've never voted to raise your taxes. And as the daughter of a veteran, I'm proud of the work I've done to help our veterans throughout South Carolina. **Serving the Lowcountry is the honor of my lifetime.**

[**_Which is why I'm asking for your help to continue doing my job and serving you._** ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2b69ec4aff2a430b96850967a22e30ba&_e=HztAtlWo76A4BdA2HSmTcKDzHDmX1qxcFrwIcFxeo9Mn9TY6doLdjhZZqPlpoxIZC_fCyb6EmqvdA6CiyP6GnXQOr8xrQqb2QraA-shmN4wih9VtZ2HEa4D89bYYNvxMm-gMp9fiEp5F2yTu1RGFZUXUmFbej95_H5NL4X1uNzXkBD3sHcLw92uA7D0sHwY06M_Kz3edfhK_-4VzLegfpMxHHzm5NxaqhpyvsZ-hiUc5RJBZhiqKH-gekfJD7aVywljd0nw0bKRkwGJSEflmZwbYbLjzp2liJQX8BKi8gtTjUjZD_fim9gKT8NmDlcd4Lt8pGg6PXl5ZoxXK0vaAwUrjW26cTunRV1ZModrY2E5_5VkrcO2theEz7E27HMLZKizlTFHxBxhPk9-LLPEmiHmtU2cyjKZF_EO_SYwQps6wrMOHMcFTAcUxG4rKCvCa48VSjyNUEM9ivpYvjfmifw%3D%3D) [ ** KEEP THE FIRST ➞ **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2b69ec4aff2a430b96850967a22e30ba&_e=HztAtlWo76A4BdA2HSmTcKDzHDmX1qxcFrwIcFxeo9Mn9TY6doLdjhZZqPlpoxIZC_fCyb6EmqvdA6CiyP6GnXQOr8xrQqb2QraA-shmN4wih9VtZ2HEa4D89bYYNvxMm-gMp9fiEp5F2yTu1RGFZUXUmFbej95_H5NL4X1uNzXkBD3sHcLw92uA7D0sHwY06M_Kz3edfhK_-4VzLegfpMxHHzm5NxaqhpyvsZ-hiUc5RJBZhiqKH-gekfJD7aVycWWqiAXcN4zJBJDHuCyXVEiGvHvzfzNUqYNRP-w7a9ueeyH4IrawpUdu04UWPmAD1DUVe2ssKBqMFrYtc5X1PJQG7ZBs00irTQGc8MnAzvM_KBvtn5CJBBh3Rx1J9R1JZPRuJ_3XpXK40VsmmH9l94yMjl3bx2RLnFRGQcanG3uQ26-oPYy9xSv8qO3ZRuwYxkIxxNUXMnnz8pD8NZLp3w%3D%3D)

What's happening in America right now is _horrifying_. Kids are being used as political pawns, radical liberal ideas are becoming mainstream, the woke media is prioritizing clicks and view over the truth, and our so-called ‘leaders' have sold themselves out for fame and fortune.

As Americans, we deserve __so much better than this__. It's time to restore our economy, secure the southern border, put parents back in charge, support our military, and reestablish pride in our country.

[**It's time to stand up and say enough is enough! I'm running for re-election because I believe I'm the woman who can help save our country.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2b69ec4aff2a430b96850967a22e30ba&_e=HztAtlWo76A4BdA2HSmTcKDzHDmX1qxcFrwIcFxeo9Mn9TY6doLdjhZZqPlpoxIZC_fCyb6EmqvdA6CiyP6GnXQOr8xrQqb2QraA-shmN4wih9VtZ2HEa4D89bYYNvxMm-gMp9fiEp5F2yTu1RGFZUXUmFbej95_H5NL4X1uNzXkBD3sHcLw92uA7D0sHwY06M_Kz3edfhK_-4VzLegfpMxHHzm5NxaqhpyvsZ-hiUc5RJBZhiqKH-gekfJD7aVyOm8fjwQgQ9IxD2hwwDCwXzi1AAyJKJl3jbfXGS1-ldhCsH5RLHnJkzrVP2XDc8inEdl2TrH3bkZqXDqwNY90Sq7ZhSvzuP61qOOWNBNftPbZtiO2liAXYAf6WeQMkW2ZN6PxVofREl2fQLX9MmsAjCtiGTzWB8kNGo5jhYBEU3C-XemthJaZovTQ9wlj-AjMPBboYcPGzwY7RhwpBtFMuQ%3D%3D) I'm in Washington week in and week out, fighting for you and your family – I have a 100% record of voting to lower taxes and a 100% lifetime rating with Conservation Voters of South Carolina!

[ ** SEND NANCY TO CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2b69ec4aff2a430b96850967a22e30ba&_e=HztAtlWo76A4BdA2HSmTcKDzHDmX1qxcFrwIcFxeo9Mn9TY6doLdjhZZqPlpoxIZC_fCyb6EmqvdA6CiyP6GnXQOr8xrQqb2QraA-shmN4wih9VtZ2HEa4D89bYYNvxMm-gMp9fiEp5F2yTu1RGFZUXUmFbej95_H5NL4X1uNzXkBD3sHcLw92uA7D0sHwY06M_Kz3edfhK_-4VzLegfpMxHHzm5NxaqhpyvsZ-hiUc5RJBZhiqKH-gekfJD7aVy30V9GmOeRpoGdA0EtfQudnbzB7vSordjY4pAcN4-8XQvClu4RJEi-VWav__-Vu4BtxJQcgKslEqj3GwXUlhkuU9_fB1e5BvjZt3wUGLwXNuPTwnO0G471dOWkVLywcbEKjgsj8Ye3sxR-6hITPgOtzsWwjjmF9hrUB5xIxWakXAFUxRXbt-S1xQfwy18dmt-NCRnskp9TdZlpG_vX1C-aQ%3D%3D)

I'll leave you with this thought: I believe you can do anything you set your mind to. That's how a high-school drop-out like myself became a Congresswoman. _I believe we can fix our country and leave a stronger nation to the next generation._

Maybe it's how I was raised, or maybe it's just the fighting spirit in me, but I know we can fix the broken system in Washington. [**Join me today: let's take our country back, and keep the first!**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2b69ec4aff2a430b96850967a22e30ba&_e=HztAtlWo76A4BdA2HSmTcKDzHDmX1qxcFrwIcFxeo9Mn9TY6doLdjhZZqPlpoxIZC_fCyb6EmqvdA6CiyP6GnXQOr8xrQqb2QraA-shmN4wih9VtZ2HEa4D89bYYNvxMm-gMp9fiEp5F2yTu1RGFZUXUmFbej95_H5NL4X1uNzXkBD3sHcLw92uA7D0sHwY06M_Kz3edfhK_-4VzLegfpMxHHzm5NxaqhpyvsZ-hiUc5RJBZhiqKH-gekfJD7aVyJ0ik9-KPyeqolpdi3NBAdCodzyGJ2wVt_ECUWP0lJu8nfFJjL6x53zn9a1pxxBi9Qk6WFFpBUpJJtarPxct4mne69oWRAVsBTfGeufoY-avhhYfGgTgWywCZrtaWhXkSlvf_s7EPnF46SfbLGrpNtQVvCsVv8Q82d_3BJCoEq5HJHcOppq5Dvb0wOAt9m9zmbiiDJNNlNGIBalqvGcAPhg%3D%3D)

clean_body: When I dropped out of high school at the age of 17, my parents said, “If you’re going to stop going to school, you got to start going to work.”| | | | | | Peter, When I dropped out of high school at the age of 17, my parents said, “If you're going to stop going to school, you got to start going to work.” I immediately got a job and started waitressing at Waffle House. In my years since then, I've worked a lot of jobs and worn a lot of different hats – author, business-owner, waitress, marketer, commercial real-estate agent, mother, and now I serve as the Congresswoman for South Carolina's first district. But I'll never forget the lessons I learned at my first job: work hard, do right by others, listen more than you talk, and never stop fighting for what you believe in. If we haven't met yet, . I'm a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! I don't have your typical run of the mill story because I'm not your typical Congresswoman. I ran for Congress because someone had to stand up and fight to protect the freedoms we have in our country and to serve the people of South Carolina. In 2020, we took this seat back from the Democrats and now, we are fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. I'm extremely proud of the work we've accomplished, but there's still so much to do. So, I want to make sure you are still on my team as. There was a time in my life when I never thought I'd get a high school diploma, let alone graduate from The Citadel, one day start a company, and now serve in Congress. I made a promise to myself when I won two years ago that I would be fiscally conservative; I would be an independent voice and I wouldn't toe the party line especially when Republicans spent too much and taxed too much. I'm proud of my conservative record and I'm proud of delivering results day in and day out for the Lowcountry. I'm proud I've never voted to raise your taxes. And as the daughter of a veteran, I'm proud of the work I've done to help our veterans throughout South Carolina. Serving the Lowcountry is the honor of my lifetime. What's happening in America right now is horrifying. Kids are being used as political pawns, radical liberal ideas are becoming mainstream, the woke media is prioritizing clicks and view over the truth, and our so-called ‘leaders' have sold themselves out for fame and fortune. As Americans, we deserve so much better than this. It's time to restore our economy, secure the southern border, put parents back in charge, support our military, and reestablish pride in our country. I'm in Washington week in and week out, fighting for you and your family – I have a 100% record of voting to lower taxes and a 100% lifetime rating with Conservation Voters of South Carolina! I'll leave you with this thought: I believe you can do anything you set your mind to. That's how a high-school drop-out like myself became a Congresswoman. I believe we can fix our country and leave a stronger nation to the next generation. Maybe it's how I was raised, or maybe it's just the fighting spirit in me, but I know we can fix the broken system in Washington. **Welcome to the Miyares Roundup!** **Attorney General Miyares continues to fight for Virginians each and every day.**** Check out what our team accomplished this week.**
---
| | **Letter to Google: Don’t Censor Crisis Pregnancy Centers in Search Results** AG Miyares led a multistate letter with 16 other attorneys general across the country addressing the recent political pressure encouraging Google to discriminate against crisis pregnancy centers in search results, online advertising, and other products like Google Maps. Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) has advocated for the shutting down of crisis pregnancy centers, and Senator Mark Warner (D-VA) and Congresswoman Slotkin (D-MI), joined by 19 of their Democrat colleagues, sent Google their own respective letter, urging them to discriminate against these private charities by removing them from search results. Attorney General Miyares promises to investigate potential violations of antitrust laws and religious discrimination, should Google fall to this political pressure and attack free speech.

The settlement secured over $1 million in potential restitution for over 3,800 Virginians and $1.7 million in debt forgiveness for over 1,000 Virginians.

clean_body: | | | Welcome to the Miyares Roundup! Attorney General Miyares continues to fight for Virginians each and every day. Check out what our team accomplished this week. | | Letter to Google: Don’t Censor Crisis Pregnancy Centers in Search Results AG Miyares led a multistate letter with 16 other attorneys general across the country addressing the recent political pressure encouraging Google to discriminate against crisis pregnancy centers in search results, online advertising, and other products like Google Maps. Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) has advocated for the shutting down of crisis pregnancy centers, and Senator Mark Warner (D-VA) and Congresswoman Slotkin (D-MI), joined by 19 of their Democrat colleagues, sent Google their own respective letter, urging them to discriminate against these private charities by removing them from search results. Attorney General Miyares promises to investigate potential violations of antitrust laws and religious discrimination, should Google fall to this political pressure and attack free speech. | | | | | PROTECTING OUR SERVICE MEMBERS AG Miyares joined a multistate agreement recovering $34.2 million for thousands of U.S. Servicemembers defrauded by Harris Jewelry. The settlement secured over $1 million in potential restitution for over 3,800 Virginians and $1.7 million in debt forgiveness for over 1,000 Virginians. | | | “Harris Jewelry targeted our military community, misleading, deceiving, and defrauding thousands of active duty servicemembers through their financing program. Our servicemembers are critical to the American experiment, dedicating their lives to the protection of our freedoms and way of life. I’m grateful we were able to reach an agreement and provide relief to thousands of Virginians,” said Attorney General Miyares. | | | ICYMI Karl Rove wrote a must read op-ed in the Wall Street Journal about far-left prosecutors and the criminal first, victim last mentality plaguing our country. He highlights the work Attorney General Miyares is doing to fight back against these radicial prosecutors through Protecting Americans Action Fund. Read the full article | | Until next time,Team Miyares | | ---|--- | | | | | | | Paid for and Authorized by A Safer Virginia PAC | | A Safer Virginia PAC, PO Box 3193, Virginia Beach, VA 23454 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

subject: A Vote For Bolick is a Vote For Election Integrity
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
I’m The Only Candidate Bringing Solutions

Good afternoon Freedom Fighters,

The integrity and security of our elections are not only vital for our Republic, but they’re a rare quality that has made America the world’s “shining city on a hill” and beacon of freedom.

But today, a majority of voter (https://www.rasmussenreports.com/public_content/politics/public_surveys/election_integrity_50_think_cheating_likely_in_midterms?utm_campaign=RR07072022DN&utm_source=RR07072022DN&utm_medium=email&mc_cid=318d73ac1d&mc_eid=UNIQID) s believe cheating affected the outcome of the 2020 election and 50% think 2022 will also be tainted by cheating.

Arizona should be able to trust that our elections are conducted with integrity and transparency. We should be confident that the rules are consistent and predictable—not changing at the last minute to fit partisan agendas. The office of Secretary of State should only communicate rules, expectations, and results with voters, not use their office to influence elections.

I’m a proven conservative with a record you can trust. I led on election integrity as a State Representative and listened to and acted on voter concerns. Before I was even elected to the legislature, I started to work in the election integrity space. Once elected in 2018, I began studying cyber security and election procedures. Since 2019, I have co-chaired an elections integrity working process working group with other state legislators. I sounded the alarms about election integrity in 2019. And once again in 2020 when the Democrats tried to push for an all mail-in ballot election, I was the only Arizona legislator pushing back (https://www.azcentral.com/story/opinion/op-ed/2020/04/02/all-mail-balloting-would-only-compromise-integrity-arizona-elections/5105762002/?mc_cid=318d73ac1d&mc_eid=UNIQID) . I even joined forces with national election integrity experts to form a national task force (https://publicinterestlegal.org/press/national-task-force-outlines-2020-election-security-standards-for-voting-by-mail/?mc_cid=318d73ac1d&mc_eid=UNIQID) to secure
the Covid-driven expansion of mail-in ballots all across the country.

I believe many of the problems of the 2018 and 2020 elections could have been addressed if the policy makers at the Capitol listened to our growing concerns. We need bold and experienced leadership to secure Arizona’s elections. Restoring trust in elections will be my top priority as Secretary of State.
Support a Candidate Who Will Lead On Day One (https://secure.winred.com/vote-bolick/donate?mc_cid=318d73ac1d&mc_eid=UNIQID)
I’m the only candidate in this race with serious solutions. I created the Roadmap to Restore Election Integrity (https://www.bolickforarizona.com/roadmap-to-restore-election-integrity/?mc_cid=318d73ac1d&mc_eid=UNIQID) by collaborating with everyday Arizonans like yourself. This is a guide for legislators, county recorders, boards of supervisors, and most importantly, the Secretary of State to secure our elections and restore the confidence of voters.

I’ve signed every official letter calling for an election audit that came my way after the 2020 election, and I’ve sponsored or co-sponsored more than two dozen bills to secure Arizona’s elections.

You don’t have to wonder whether I’m serious about election integrity, my record (https://www.bolickforarizona.com/record/?mc_cid=318d73ac1d&mc_eid=UNIQID) is proof.

That’s why a vote for Shawnna Bolick for Secretary of State is a vote for restoring election integrity.

Now that early voting has started, please cast your vote for me, Shawnna Bolick for Secretary of State.
Thank you for your continued support,
Shawnna Bolick
Send a Serious Candidate With Real Solutions to the 8th Floor (https://secure.winred.com/vote-bolick/donate?mc_cid=318d73ac1d&mc_eid=UNIQID)
P.S. Help keep the momentum going by sending this email to 5+ friends and family to tell them to vote Bolick for Secretary of State too!

VOTING INFORMATION

If you received an early ballot, hand it in at any polling location on Election Day. Find a location here (http://url141.azpolicy.org/ls/click?upn=DyJOC-2B-2Bt2AJTtMMMztS3OTI6MDEmuN7ALSOxAqLNF2Q20iN2kWQszDHmOtsrKbjxnGFFubOPPhqYL28PMe6GQ-2BtLUgsC0xwSdJNCG3TDWEs-3DRska_yw-2BFsruRZRvGaTjlc1SIG4VKkFEEBIvmY4meOxrv4AihVYUVzmVkiE7h-2FAJamFr27ONpM6owB1O2KO6JFwjpe1-2BaZviMyE2At0I7rj7jbkTNXReuRk0RO2ZpTpkHiTgW9V9qrQG7Kw4A-2B1bapDSlpSVcigNQIjbg-2FZIKjsDHz046gwkQObiL06pycCjIVtzRmfBKvUGvkqk5b0UPp38gN5x3jVr0rThKYnwiDoxGzFyJ77X998CnUX7GndT6IgQWkQd9asyyOHlGtOqh3ZgtKu3V-2FFsS7yP4PHeIBjnRJm5xz-2F20pSe6P1xh7YMwHF-2BJ3uAGEOhA6J4ouctXfET1uw-3D-3D&mc_cid=318d73ac1d&mc_eid=UNIQID) .

Track your ballot here (http://url141.azpolicy.org/ls/click?upn=DyJOC-2B-2Bt2AJTtMMMztS3OUdF4HVShO-2BhgXHHLZ56SZwtJTzi4EKJs10-2BbLBEHQAPMa-2BNjP2SXb8XrUWOCxSb4g-3D-3DKeRu_yw-2BFsruRZRvGaTjlc1SIG4VKkFEEBIvmY4meOxrv4AihVYUVzmVkiE7h-2FAJamFr27ONpM6owB1O2KO6JFwjpe1-2BaZviMyE2At0I7rj7jbkTNXReuRk0RO2ZpTpkHiTgW9V9qrQG7Kw4A-2B1bapDSlpSVcigNQIjbg-2FZIKjsDHz05EJa3JN-2BUA-2FIDui4JlqblxBML1UMyb-2FBhvRS4PuyiXmHxrOSF0h-2BgpCwaS1gsL1D1SANGifIHAjV05uo2OJtmjL9vmohzRdGbvXS0KDgmTRwP234Qh949q4bpusljWeV6L4sOA0eYNFeskY-2FmQAK0rnLb7CXfn60LrbJzkdIXamA-3D-3D&mc_cid=318d73ac1d&mc_eid=UNIQID) .

Important upcoming dates:
Primary date — August 2
Early voting — July 6 to July 26
Poll hours — 6 a.m. to 7 p.m.
Absentee/mail-in deadline — July 26

Visit Arizona.Vote (http://url141.azpolicy.org/ls/click?upn=DyJOC-2B-2Bt2AJTtMMMztS3ORKivKOR-2BzCh-2FQJ6WmWb2ICPh2XQnuN17lC6XW6m0VHPjEpz_yw-2BFsruRZRvGaTjlc1SIG4VKkFEEBIvmY4meOxrv4AihVYUVzmVkiE7h-2FAJamFr27ONpM6owB1O2KO6JFwjpe1-2BaZviMyE2At0I7rj7jbkTNXReuRk0RO2ZpTpkHiTgW9V9qrQG7Kw4A-2B1bapDSlpSVcigNQIjbg-2FZIKjsDHz07IxV2oUUhL6eyy5lgqxQb3mq6yflDvj-2FXuqEJBk9D0x4FtGF-2B3dYN7Xo2A7hPY-2FVuNHqHFl0byGGwKHmd7bwq6cpb5itzAfVpMEF8-2BzDmaFmqegcqrnY-2FAKIgUCT1y3tvtepTJeUsQnF5JgJzjhq7G-2BTDl5aEQn4XRctmQXsnKxA-3D-3D&mc_cid=318d73ac1d&mc_eid=UNIQID) for more information.

Please join us at one of our upcoming events:

Wednesday, July 27^th
Please join me and two special guests for a fundraiser.
For address please RSVP to Ben at info@bolickforarizona.com (mailto:info@bolickforarizona.com) .

Peter, did you 🙄 (aka roll your eyes) at AOC's pretending to be handcuffed stunt?

It's reminiscent of a toddler throwing a tantrum...worse still...she's on the cusp of having a bunch more 'woke' allies joining the U.S. Senate if we don't get our act together because the Washington Examiner just reported, _"Democrats are outraising their GOP counterparts in key races for control of the evenly divided Senate..."_

Yeah, that really sucks!

Seriously. If you're AOC and you feel that everyone should stop eating 🐄, stop 🛫, stop driving the 🚘 we already own, or stop valuing the miracle of 🤰 in the womb - you just ring up your freshly elected 'woke' pals in the new and expanded Democrat Senate majority on January 3rd and what?

Tell them it's time to go wild: shred the constitution + pass the green new deal + pack the Supreme Court so that no one can stop you???

Friend,
**Biden is committed to CODIFYING ROE!**

The Radical Left is looking to **DESTROY THE RIGHT TO LIFE.** Even with the recent victory in the Supreme Court, the fight for life has just begun. Nancy Pelosi has said herself that she wants to codify abortion on demand into federal law. That’s why I need your help to ensure that we can stop these **ANTI-LIFE** politicians from getting into Congress.

clean_body: Sen. Warnock spent $12 million attacking me last quarter and STILL has another $22 million in the bank to fund even more attacks. | Sen. Raphael Warnock, D-Ga., had $15 million more in his campaign account on June 30 than his opponent. Peter, This is our opponent - the $15 million dollar man. Senator Raphael Warnock is the Democrat Party's most successful fundraiser. He has voted with Joe Biden 96% of the time, so far-Left donors across the country are showering him with donations to thank him for his loyalty to the party. Senator Warnock is using those millions to attack me with non-stop ads. A new poll released by President Trump's pollster showed me trailing Senator Warnock by THREE POINTS, so it's critical that we respond and set the record straight. I spent my football career competing in and winning big showdowns, so I'm ready to win this race - which is the biggest and most important challenge in my life. Senator Warnock spent $12 million attacking me last quarter and STILL has another $22 million in the bank to fund even more attacks. It's absolutely critical that we fight back IMMEDIATELY! Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

Trump is going to rush cash to his star pupil Kevin Kiley now that he’s in trouble, so we can’t let up now. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Let’s show Trump he can’t mess with California so easily! — Team Kermit | Kermit Jones is a Democrat, doctor, and Navy veteran running for Congress in California's 3rd District. = | = | Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress Kermit Jones for Congress PO Box 713 Roseville, CA 95661 United States Kermit Jones is a former member of the U.S. Navy. name: Tim
subject: call me old-fashioned
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17584?t=1009&amount=25&akid=4748%2E3611125%2EByEKa4 ]young Tim Ryan football

Folks,

Growing up in Northeast Ohio, I was taught to believe that if you worked
hard, you’d be able to keep a roof over your head, put food on the table,
and provide a better future for your children and their children, too.

But somewhere along the way, our country lost sight of that promise.

We sent politicians to Washington who refused to invest in an economy that
works for everyone. Instead, they decided only the wealthy and the
well-connected should be able to get ahead.

Well, call me old-fashioned if you’d like, but I believe it’s time to cut
workers in the deal.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17584?t=1010&amount=25&akid=4748%2E3611125%2EByEKa4 ]If you agree, will you chip in to fight back against business-as-usual
politics and make sure Ohio’s next senator will always put hardworking
Ohioans first?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17584?t=1011&amount=25&akid=4748%2E3611125%2EByEKa4 ]Donate

I’m not sure if you grew up near me, or if you don’t know Niles from
Neville.

But, if you’re anything like me, then you know it’s time to get rid of the
politics that prioritizes the top 1% and leaves hardworking Ohioans with
the short end of the stick.

It’s time for working class folks who do everything right to get ahead.

It’s time to rebuild the middle class and build an economy of the future.

It’s time for working people to finally catch a damn break and elect a
leader who won’t give up on them before ever stepping foot in Washington.

That’s why I’m running for Senate—and why I need your help fighting back
against the corporate greed and wealthy, dark money donors holding us back
for far too long now.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17584?t=1012&amount=25&akid=4748%2E3611125%2EByEKa4 ]If you’re with me, will you chip in to give Ohio the most pro-worker
delegation in the Senate? It’s time to step up and join the movement to
expand our Democratic Senate majority.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17584?t=1013&amount=25&akid=4748%2E3611125%2EByEKa4 ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17584?t=1014&amount=50&akid=4748%2E3611125%2EByEKa4 ]Donate $50

name: StaceyAbrams.com
subject: Answering your questions, Derek
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek,

Every day we get questions from grassroots
supporters about
Stacey’s campaign to be the next governor of Georgia. Here are some of the
most common:

What is the state of the race right now?
After polling showed Stacey is TIED with Kemp, he launched more than $1
million worth of attack ads. Now, we’re doing everything we can to correct
the record before his lies set in with voters.

How can I help?
[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220724_B3_FAQ_S1_T1_COM_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=3&amounts=3%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=1136%2E1862389%2E0bJM9Q ]We’re counting on grassroots donations to power our work. An investment
of just $3 gives us the resources to push back on Kemp,
educate voters about Stacey’s plans and mobilize our team of volunteers
across the state.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220724_B3_FAQ_S1_T1_COM_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=3&amounts=3%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1003&akid=1136%2E1862389%2E0bJM9Q ]DONATE

What is the number one challenge for the campaign?
Brian Kemp is a dangerous extremist and isn’t afraid to rig the rules to
his advantage. We have to be prepared for whatever obstacles he puts in
our way. Right now, he’s pushing right-wing billionaires to invest in his
campaign — we can’t afford to slow down.

Are grassroots contributions really that important?
Since December 2021, more than 240,000 grassroots donors have joined this
campaign. Because of all of that support, we’ve trained hundreds of
volunteers, made thousands of phone calls to voters and gotten Stacey’s
message out all across Georgia. None of that would have been possible
without the grassroots donors who power our campaign.

To be clear: if even just a fraction of the people reading this email
chipped in $3, it would immediately balance out Brian
Kemp’s latest negative ad buy.

When is the most impactful time to make a contribution?
[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220724_B3_FAQ_S1_T1_COM_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=3&amounts=3%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1004&akid=1136%2E1862389%2E0bJM9Q ]Georgia voters are just weeks away from requesting ballots in the mail.
If you’ve been waiting to make your
first
$3 donation to our campaign, now is the perfect moment.
Help us reach Georgians all across the state by chipping in now.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220724_B3_FAQ_S1_T1_COM_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=3&amounts=3%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1005&akid=1136%2E1862389%2E0bJM9Q ]DONATE

Now we have one question for you,
Derek: are you ready to fire
Brian Kemp and elect Stacey Abrams? Together we can build One Georgia,
where everyone can succeed no matter their background or zip code.

Let’s get it done,

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220724_B3_FAQ_S1_T1_COM_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=3&amounts=3%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1006&akid=1136%2E1862389%2E0bJM9Q ]StaceyAbrams.com

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

+---------------------------------+
| PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
+---------------------------------+

Abrams for Governor
931 Monroe Dr NE
Ste A102 #363
Atlanta, GA 30308
United States

Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical
tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let
us know if you would like to [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1468?t=1001&akid=1136%2E1862389%2E0bJM9Q ]receive fewer emails or

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.staceyabrams.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1136%2E1862389%2E0bJM9Q
